FILE: .env
Lines with Chinese text: 23
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Line 1: # LLM API配置（规划、模拟、报告、聊天）
  Line 2: # 推荐使用 OpenRouter 的 OpenAI 兼容接口
  Line 3: LLM_API_KEY=your_openrouter_api_key_here
  Line 4: LLM_BASE_URL=https://openrouter.ai/api/v1
  Line 5: LLM_MODEL_NAME=liquid/lfm-2.5-1.2b-thinking:free
  Line 7: # ===== Sports 研究配置（仅用于信息检索，推荐使用 Perplexity Sonar）=====
  Line 8: SPORTS_RESEARCH_API_KEY=your_perplexity_api_key_here
  Line 9: SPORTS_RESEARCH_BASE_URL=https://api.perplexity.ai
  Line 10: SPORTS_RESEARCH_MODEL_NAME=sonar-pro
  Line 12: # ===== Flask 生产环境配置 =====
  Line 13: SECRET_KEY=replace_with_a_long_random_secret
  Line 14: FLASK_DEBUG=False
  Line 16: # ===== ZEP记忆图谱配置 =====
  Line 17: # 每月免费额度即可支撑简单使用：https://app.getzep.com/
  Line 18: ZEP_API_KEY=your_zep_api_key_here
  Line 20: # ===== Sports public data configuration（可选，已不作为主路径）=====
  Line 21: SPORTS_DATA_BASE_URL=
  Line 22: SPORTS_DATA_API_KEY=
  Line 24: # ===== 加速 LLM 配置（可选）=====
  Line 25: # 注意如果不使用加速配置，env文件中就不要出现下面的配置项
  Line 26: LLM_BOOST_API_KEY=your_api_key_here
  Line 27: LLM_BOOST_BASE_URL=your_base_url_here
  Line 28: LLM_BOOST_MODEL_NAME=your_model_name_here

FILE: .env.example
Lines with Chinese text: 23
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Line 1: # LLM API配置（规划、模拟、报告、聊天）
  Line 2: # 推荐使用 OpenRouter 的 OpenAI 兼容接口
  Line 3: LLM_API_KEY=your_openrouter_api_key_here
  Line 4: LLM_BASE_URL=https://openrouter.ai/api/v1
  Line 5: LLM_MODEL_NAME=qwen/qwen3.6-plus:free
  Line 7: # ===== Sports 研究配置（仅用于信息检索，推荐使用 Perplexity Sonar）=====
  Line 8: SPORTS_RESEARCH_API_KEY=your_perplexity_api_key_here
  Line 9: SPORTS_RESEARCH_BASE_URL=https://api.perplexity.ai
  Line 10: SPORTS_RESEARCH_MODEL_NAME=sonar-pro
  Line 12: # ===== Flask 生产环境配置 =====
  Line 13: SECRET_KEY=replace_with_a_long_random_secret
  Line 14: FLASK_DEBUG=False
  Line 16: # ===== ZEP记忆图谱配置 =====
  Line 17: # 每月免费额度即可支撑简单使用：https://app.getzep.com/
  Line 18: ZEP_API_KEY=your_zep_api_key_here
  Line 20: # ===== Sports public data configuration（可选，已不作为主路径）=====
  Line 21: SPORTS_DATA_BASE_URL=
  Line 22: SPORTS_DATA_API_KEY=
  Line 24: # ===== 加速 LLM 配置（可选）=====
  Line 25: # 注意如果不使用加速配置，env文件中就不要出现下面的配置项
  Line 26: LLM_BOOST_API_KEY=your_api_key_here
  Line 27: LLM_BOOST_BASE_URL=your_base_url_here
  Line 28: LLM_BOOST_MODEL_NAME=your_model_name_here

========================================================================================================================
FILE: Dockerfile
Lines with Chinese text: 21
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Line 1: FROM python:3.11
  Line 3: # 安装 Node.js （满足 >=18）及必要工具
  Line 4: RUN apt-get update \
  Line 5:   && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs npm \
  Line 6:   && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  Line 8: # 从 uv 官方镜像复制 uv
  Line 9: COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:0.9.26 /uv /uvx /bin/
  Line 11: WORKDIR /app
  Line 13: # 先复制依赖描述文件以利用缓存
  Line 14: COPY package.json package-lock.json ./
  Line 15: COPY frontend/package.json frontend/package-lock.json ./frontend/
  Line 16: COPY backend/pyproject.toml backend/uv.lock ./backend/
  Line 18: # 安装依赖（Node + Python）
  Line 19: RUN npm ci \
  Line 20:   && npm ci --prefix frontend \
  Line 21:   && cd backend && uv sync --frozen
  Line 23: # 复制项目源码
  Line 24: COPY . .
  Line 26: EXPOSE 3000 5001
  Line 28: # 同时启动前后端（开发模式）
  Line 29: CMD ["npm", "run", "dev"]

FILE: README.md
Lines with Chinese text: 257
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Line 1: <div align="center">
  Line 3: # HERMES
  Line 5: A concise and versatile group intelligence engine that predicts everything.
  Line 7: **Rehearse the future in a digital sandbox, and win decisions after countless simulations.**
  Line 10: </div>
  Line 12: ## Overview
  Line 14: **Hermes** is a multi-agent social simulation and prediction engine. It transforms unstructured documents -- news articles, policy drafts, financial reports, or creative writing -- into a parallel digital world where hundreds of AI-powered agents with distinct personalities freely interact on simulated social media platforms (Twitter and Reddit). The system then produces analytical reports about the emergent behavior, letting you see how scenarios might unfold before they happen.
  Line 16: > **You provide:** Seed documents + a natural language description of what you want to predict.
  Line 17: >
  Line 18: > **Hermes returns:** A detailed prediction report and an interactive digital world you can interrogate.
  Line 20: ### Use Cases
  Line 22: - **Policy Analysis**: Test how a new policy might be received before implementing it
  Line 23: - **Public Opinion Prediction**: Simulate how news events might spread and be discussed
  Line 24: - **Creative Exploration**: Explore "what if" scenarios for novels, worldbuilding, or fiction
  Line 25: - **Strategic Planning**: Rehearse PR strategies, product launches, or crisis responses at zero risk
  Line 26: - **Financial Forecasting**: Model market reactions to events using agent-based simulation
  Line 28: ## How It Works
  Line 30: Hermes runs a 5-stage pipeline that goes from raw text to interactive prediction:
  Line 32: ```
  Line 33: Seed Documents ──► Knowledge Graph ──► Agent Personas ──► Simulation ──► Report ──► Chat
  Line 34: ```
  Line 36: ### Stage 1: Graph Building (Knowledge Graph Construction)
  Line 38: 1. Upload documents (PDF, Markdown, TXT) and describe your simulation requirement
  Line 39: 2. Text is extracted, chunked (500 chars with 50-char overlap, respecting sentence boundaries)
  Line 40: 3. An LLM analyzes the content and generates an **ontology** -- a schema defining entity types (Student, Professor, MediaOutlet, etc.) and relationship types (WORKS_FOR, STUDIES_AT, etc.)
  Line 41: 4. Text chunks are sent to **Zep Cloud** as episodes, which automatically extracts entities and relationships using its built-in NLP pipeline
  Line 42: 5. The ontology is registered with Zep to guide extraction toward meaningful, custom-typed nodes
  Line 44: ### Stage 2: Environment Setup (Agent Generation)
  Line 46: 1. All entities are read from the Zep graph, filtered to custom-labeled nodes (not generic "Entity" labels)
  Line 47: 2. For each entity, a detailed **OASIS Agent Profile** is generated via LLM:
  Line 48:    - Bio, background, personality (MBTI), age, gender, profession
  Line 49:    - Social media behavior patterns, interests, stance, unique traits
  Line 50:    - Different prompts for individuals vs. organizations
  Line 51: 3. A **simulation configuration** is auto-generated by LLM:
  Line 52:    - **Time config**: Total simulated hours, minutes per round, peak/off-peak hours with activity multipliers
  Line 53:    - **Event config**: Hot topics, narrative direction, initial seed posts
  Line 54:    - **Per-agent config**: Activity level, posts/hour, comments/hour, active hours, sentiment bias, stance, influence weight
  Line 56: ### Stage 3: Simulation (Multi-Agent Execution)
  Line 58: 1. The **OASIS** (Open Agent Social Interaction Simulations) engine runs as a subprocess
  Line 59: 2. Agents interact on **Twitter** and **Reddit** platforms in parallel:
  Line 60:    - **Twitter actions**: CREATE_POST, LIKE_POST, REPOST, FOLLOW, QUOTE_POST, DO_NOTHING
  Line 61:    - **Reddit actions**: CREATE_POST, CREATE_COMMENT, LIKE_POST, DISLIKE_POST, LIKE_COMMENT, DISLIKE_COMMENT, SEARCH_POSTS, SEARCH_USER, TREND, REFRESH, FOLLOW, MUTE, DO_NOTHING
  Line 62: 3. Each round represents a time slice (~60 simulated minutes); agents decide actions based on persona, current state, and activity config
  Line 63: 4. Platform algorithms determine content visibility using recency and popularity weights
  Line 64: 5. Real-time monitoring tracks round progress, action counts, and recent agent activities
  Line 65: 6. Optional: Agent activities stream back to Zep graph as new episodes during simulation
  Line 67: ### Stage 4: Report Generation (ReACT Agent)
  Line 69: A **Report Agent** (ReACT-style LLM agent) generates a "Future Prediction Report":
  Line 71: 1. **Planning**: LLM creates an outline with 2-5 sections based on simulation results
  Line 72: 2. **Generation**: For each section, runs a ReACT loop:
  Line 73:    - **Thought**: What information do I need?
  Line 74:    - **Action**: Call a tool (InsightForge, PanoramaSearch, QuickSearch, InterviewAgents)
  Line 75:    - **Observation**: Analyze tool results
  Line 76:    - **Final Answer**: Write section content in markdown
  Line 77: 3. Sections are generated sequentially and displayed in real-time as they complete
  Line 79: **Report Agent Tools:**
  Line 80: - **InsightForge**: Decomposes queries into sub-questions, searches each, extracts related entities, builds relationship chains
  Line 81: - **PanoramaSearch**: Full graph view including historical/expired facts (temporal graph features)
  Line 82: - **QuickSearch**: Simple semantic search with local keyword fallback
  Line 83: - **InterviewAgents**: Selects relevant agents, generates interview questions, calls OASIS interview API
  Line 85: ### Stage 5: Deep Interaction
  Line 87: After the report is complete, you can:
  Line 88: - **Chat with the Report Agent** -- ask follow-up questions; the agent searches the graph for answers
  Line 89: - **Interview individual agents** -- send questions to specific simulated agents and get in-character responses
  Line 90: - **Batch interview** -- ask multiple agents the same question simultaneously
  Line 91: - **Browse** the full report, agent profiles, and simulation timeline
  Line 93: ## Architecture
  Line 95: ```
  Line 96: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  Line 97: │                        Frontend (Vue 3)                      │
  Line 98: │  Home → Process (5 Steps) → Simulation → Report → Interaction│
  Line 99: └──────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────┘
  Line 100:                            │ REST API
  Line 101: ┌──────────────────────────▼──────────────────────────────────┐
  Line 102: │                     Backend (Flask)                          │
  Line 103: │  ┌─────────────┐ ┌──────────────┐ ┌───────────────────────┐ │
  Line 104: │  │ Graph Builder│ │Simulation Mgr│ │    Report Agent       │ │
  Line 105: │  │ Ontology Gen │ │Profile Gen   │ │  (ReACT + Tools)      │ │
  Line 106: │  │Text Processor│ │Config Gen    │ │ InsightForge          │ │
  Line 107: │  └──────┬──────┘ └──────┬───────┘ │ PanoramaSearch        │ │
  Line 108: │         │               │         │ QuickSearch           │ │
  Line 109: │         ▼               ▼         │ InterviewAgents       │ │
  Line 110: │  ┌─────────────┐ ┌──────────────┐ └───────────┬───────────┘ │
  Line 111: │  │  Zep Cloud  │ │  OASIS Engine│             │             │
  Line 112: │  │ (GraphRAG)  │ │ (subprocess) │             │             │
  Line 113: │  └─────────────┘ └──────────────┘             │             │
  Line 114: └───────────────────────────────────────────────┼─────────────┘
  Line 115:                                                 │
  Line 116:                                     LLM API (OpenRouter/etc.)
  Line 117: ```
  Line 119: ### Technology Stack
  Line 121: | Component | Technology |
  Line 122: |-----------|------------|
  Line 123: | Backend | Python / Flask (port 5001) |
  Line 124: | Frontend | Vue 3 + Vite (port 3000) |
  Line 125: | Knowledge Graph | Zep Cloud API (GraphRAG) |
  Line 126: | LLM | OpenAI-compatible API (OpenRouter, Qwen, etc.) |
  Line 127: | Simulation Engine | OASIS (external Python library, run as subprocess) |
  Line 128: | Deployment | Docker (single container) |
  Line 129: | i18n | 7 languages: Chinese, English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Russian, German |
  Line 131: ## Quick Start
  Line 133: ### Prerequisites
  Line 135: | Tool | Version | Description |
  Line 136: |------|---------|-------------|
  Line 137: | **Node.js** | 18+ | Frontend runtime, includes npm |
  Line 138: | **Python** | >=3.11, <=3.12 | Backend runtime |
  Line 139: | **uv** | Latest | Python package manager |
  Line 141: ### 1. Configure Environment Variables
  Line 143: ```bash
  Line 144: cp .env.example .env
  Line 145: ```
  Line 147: Edit `.env` with your API keys:
  Line 149: ```env
  Line 150: # LLM API (planning, simulation config, reports, chat)
  Line 151: LLM_API_KEY=your_api_key
  Line 152: LLM_BASE_URL=https://openrouter.ai/api/v1
  Line 153: LLM_MODEL_NAME=qwen/qwen3.6-plus:free
  Line 155: # Zep Cloud (knowledge graph + GraphRAG)
  Line 156: # Free monthly quota: https://app.getzep.com/
  Line 157: ZEP_API_KEY=your_zep_api_key
  Line 158: ```
  Line 160: ### 2. Install Dependencies
  Line 162: ```bash
  Line 163: # One-click: all dependencies (root + frontend + backend)
  Line 164: npm run setup:all
  Line 165: ```
  Line 167: Or step by step:
  Line 169: ```bash
  Line 170: npm run setup              # Node dependencies (root + frontend)
  Line 171: npm run setup:backend      # Python dependencies (auto-creates venv)
  Line 172: ```
  Line 174: ### 3. Start Services
  Line 176: ```bash
  Line 177: npm run dev                # Start both frontend and backend
  Line 178: ```
  Line 180: | Service | URL |
  Line 181: |---------|-----|
  Line 182: | Frontend | http://localhost:3000 |
  Line 183: | Backend API | http://localhost:5001 |
  Line 185: ```bash
  Line 186: npm run backend            # Start backend only
  Line 187: npm run frontend           # Start frontend only
  Line 188: ```
  Line 190: ### Docker Deployment
  Line 192: ```bash
  Line 193: cp .env.example .env
  Line 194: docker compose up -d
  Line 195: ```
  Line 197: Reads `.env` from root directory, maps ports `3000` (frontend) and `5001` (backend), persists `./backend/uploads`.
  Line 199: ## API Reference
  Line 201: ### Graph & Project Management (`/api/graph/`)
  Line 203: | Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
  Line 204: |--------|----------|---------|
  Line 205: | POST | `/ontology/generate` | Upload files + requirement, generate ontology |
  Line 206: | POST | `/build` | Build knowledge graph from project |
  Line 207: | GET | `/project/<id>` | Get project details |
  Line 208: | GET | `/project/list` | List all projects |
  Line 209: | DELETE | `/project/<id>` | Delete project |
  Line 210: | GET | `/task/<id>` | Get async task status |
  Line 211: | GET | `/data/<graph_id>` | Get full graph data (nodes + edges) |
  Line 213: ### Simulation Management (`/api/simulation/`)
  Line 215: | Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
  Line 216: |--------|----------|---------|
  Line 217: | POST | `/create` | Create new simulation instance |
  Line 218: | POST | `/prepare` | Prepare simulation (read entities, generate profiles, generate config) |
  Line 219: | POST | `/start` | Start OASIS simulation |
  Line 220: | POST | `/stop` | Stop running simulation |
  Line 221: | GET | `/<id>/run-status` | Get real-time run status |
  Line 222: | GET | `/<id>/run-status/detail` | Get detailed status with recent actions |
  Line 223: | GET | `/<id>/actions` | Get action history (paginated) |
  Line 224: | GET | `/<id>/agent-stats` | Get per-agent statistics |
  Line 225: | GET | `/<id>/timeline` | Get timeline by round |
  Line 226: | POST | `/interview/batch` | Batch interview agents |
  Line 227: | GET | `/<id>/profiles` | Get agent profiles |
  Line 229: ### Report Generation (`/api/report/`)
  Line 231: | Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
  Line 232: |--------|----------|---------|
  Line 233: | POST | `/generate` | Generate report (async) |
  Line 234: | GET | `/<id>/sections` | Get generated sections |
  Line 235: | GET | `/<id>/section/<n>` | Get single section content |
  Line 236: | POST | `/chat` | Chat with Report Agent |
  Line 237: | GET | `/<id>/download` | Download report as Markdown |
  Line 238: | GET | `/<id>/agent-log` | Get structured agent execution log |
  Line 240: ## Project Structure
  Line 242: ```
  Line 243: Hermes/
  Line 244: ├── backend/
  Line 245: │   ├── run.py                        # Flask entry point
  Line 246: │   ├── app/

  Line 309: ```

  Line 31:     if hasattr(app, 'json') and hasattr(app.json, 'ensure_ascii'):
  Line 32:         app.json.ensure_ascii = False

  Line 39:     debug_mode = app.config.get('DEBUG', False)
  Line 40:     should_log_startup = not debug_mode or is_reloader_process
  Line 42:     if should_log_startup:
  Line 43:         logger.info("=" * 50)
  Line 44:         logger.info("Hermes Backend 启动中...")
  Line 45:         logger.info("=" * 50)
  Line 47:     # 启用CORS
  Line 48:     CORS(app, resources={r"/api/*": {"origins": "*"}})
  Line 50:     disabled_components = []
  Line 52:     # 注册模拟进程清理函数（确保服务器关闭时终止所有模拟进程）
  Line 53:     try:
  Line 54:         from .services.simulation_runner import SimulationRunner
  Line 55:         SimulationRunner.register_cleanup()

  Line 57:             logger.info("已注册模拟进程清理函数")

  Line 59:         disabled_components.append(f"simulation_cleanup:{exc.name}")

  Line 67:         if request.content_type and 'json' in request.content_type:
  Line 68:             logger.debug(f"请求体: {request.get_json(silent=True)}")
  Line 70:     @app.after_request

  Line 72:         logger = get_logger('hermes.request')
  Line 73:         logger.debug(f"响应: {response.status_code}")
  Line 74:         return response

  Line 85:         ('.api.report', report_bp, '/api/report', 'report_api'),
  Line 86:     ]

  Line 89:         try:

  Line 91:             app.register_blueprint(blueprint, url_prefix=url_prefix)

  Line 102:             'status': 'ok',
  Line 103:             'service': 'Hermes Backend',

  Line 105:         }

  Line 29:         return False
  Line 30:     ext = os.path.splitext(filename)[1].lower().lstrip('.')
  Line 31:     return ext in Config.ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS

  Line 120: # ============== 接口1：上传文件并生成本体 ==============
  Line 122: @graph_bp.route('/ontology/generate', methods=['POST'])
  Line 123: def generate_ontology():
  Line 125:     接口1：上传文件，分析生成本体定义
  Line 127:     请求方式：multipart/form-data
  Line 129:     参数：
  Line 130:         files: 上传的文件（PDF/MD/TXT），可多个
  Line 131:         simulation_requirement: 模拟需求描述（必填）
  Line 132:         project_name: 项目名称（可选）
  Line 133:         additional_context: 额外说明（可选）
  Line 135:     返回：
  Line 136:         {
  Line 137:             "success": true,
  Line 138:             "data": {
  Line 139:                 "project_id": "proj_xxxx",
  Line 140:                 "ontology": {
  Line 141:                     "entity_types": [...],
  Line 142:                     "edge_types": [...],
  Line 143:                     "analysis_summary": "..."
  Line 144:                 },
  Line 145:                 "files": [...],
  Line 146:                 "total_text_length": 12345
  Line 147:             }
  Line 148:         }
  Line 150:     try:
  Line 151:         logger.info("=== 开始生成本体定义 ===")
  Line 153:         # 获取参数
  Line 154:         simulation_requirement = request.form.get('simulation_requirement', '')
  Line 155:         project_name = request.form.get('project_name', 'Unnamed Project')
  Line 156:         additional_context = request.form.get('additional_context', '')
  Line 158:         logger.debug(f"项目名称: {project_name}")
  Line 159:         logger.debug(f"模拟需求: {simulation_requirement[:100]}...")
  Line 161:         if not simulation_requirement:
  Line 162:             return jsonify({
  Line 163:                 "success": False,
  Line 164:                 "error": t('api.requireSimulationRequirement')
  Line 165:             }), 400
  Line 167:         # 获取上传的文件
  Line 168:         uploaded_files = request.files.getlist('files')
  Line 169:         if not uploaded_files or all(not f.filename for f in uploaded_files):
  Line 170:             return jsonify({
  Line 171:                 "success": False,
  Line 172:                 "error": t('api.requireFileUpload')
  Line 173:             }), 400
  Line 175:         # 创建项目
  Line 176:         project = ProjectManager.create_project(name=project_name)
  Line 177:         project.simulation_requirement = simulation_requirement
  Line 178:         logger.info(f"创建项目: {project.project_id}")
  Line 180:         # 保存文件并提取文本
  Line 181:         document_texts = []
  Line 182:         all_text = ""
  Line 184:         for file in uploaded_files:
  Line 185:             if file and file.filename and allowed_file(file.filename):
  Line 186:                 # 保存文件到项目目录
  Line 187:                 file_info = ProjectManager.save_file_to_project(
  Line 188:                     project.project_id,
  Line 189:                     file,
  Line 190:                     file.filename
  Line 192:                 project.files.append({
  Line 193:                     "filename": file_info["original_filename"],
  Line 194:                     "size": file_info["size"]
  Line 195:                 })
  Line 197:                 # 提取文本
  Line 198:                 text = FileParser.extract_text(file_info["path"])
  Line 199:                 text = TextProcessor.preprocess_text(text)
  Line 200:                 document_texts.append(text)
  Line 201:                 all_text += f"\n\n=== {file_info['original_filename']} ===\n{text}"
  Line 203:         if not document_texts:
  Line 204:             ProjectManager.delete_project(project.project_id)
  Line 205:             return jsonify({
  Line 206:                 "success": False,
  Line 207:                 "error": t('api.noDocProcessed')
  Line 208:             }), 400
  Line 210:         # 保存提取的文本
  Line 211:         project.total_text_length = len(all_text)
  Line 212:         ProjectManager.save_extracted_text(project.project_id, all_text)
  Line 213:         logger.info(f"文本提取完成，共 {len(all_text)} 字符")
  Line 215:         # 生成本体
  Line 216:         logger.info("调用 LLM 生成本体定义...")
  Line 217:         generator = OntologyGenerator()
  Line 218:         ontology = generator.generate(
  Line 219:             document_texts=document_texts,
  Line 220:             simulation_requirement=simulation_requirement,
  Line 221:             additional_context=additional_context if additional_context else None
  Line 224:         # 保存本体到项目
  Line 225:         entity_count = len(ontology.get("entity_types", []))
  Line 226:         edge_count = len(ontology.get("edge_types", []))
  Line 227:         logger.info(f"本体生成完成: {entity_count} 个实体类型, {edge_count} 个关系类型")
  Line 229:         project.ontology = {
  Line 230:             "entity_types": ontology.get("entity_types", []),
  Line 231:             "edge_types": ontology.get("edge_types", [])
  Line 232:         }
  Line 233:         project.analysis_summary = ontology.get("analysis_summary", "")
  Line 234:         project.status = ProjectStatus.ONTOLOGY_GENERATED
  Line 235:         ProjectManager.save_project(project)
  Line 236:         logger.info(f"=== 本体生成完成 === 项目ID: {project.project_id}")
  Line 238:         return jsonify({
  Line 239:             "success": True,
  Line 240:             "data": {
  Line 241:                 "project_id": project.project_id,
  Line 242:                 "project_name": project.name,
  Line 243:                 "ontology": project.ontology,
  Line 244:                 "analysis_summary": project.analysis_summary,
  Line 245:                 "files": project.files,
  Line 246:                 "total_text_length": project.total_text_length
  Line 247:             }
  Line 248:         })
  Line 250:     except Exception as e:
  Line 251:         return jsonify({
  Line 252:             "success": False,
  Line 253:             "error": str(e),
  Line 254:             "traceback": traceback.format_exc()
  Line 255:         }), 500
  Line 258: # ============== 接口2：构建图谱 ==============
  Line 260: @graph_bp.route('/build', methods=['POST'])
  Line 261: def build_graph():
  Line 263:     接口2：根据project_id构建图谱
  Line 265:     请求（JSON）：
  Line 266:         {
  Line 267:             "project_id": "proj_xxxx",  // 必填，来自接口1
  Line 268:             "graph_name": "图谱名称",    // 可选
  Line 269:             "chunk_size": 500,          // 可选，默认500
  Line 270:             "chunk_overlap": 50         // 可选，默认50
  Line 271:         }
  Line 273:     返回：
  Line 274:         {
  Line 275:             "success": true,
  Line 276:             "data": {
  Line 277:                 "project_id": "proj_xxxx",
  Line 278:                 "task_id": "task_xxxx",
  Line 279:                 "message": "图谱构建任务已启动"
  Line 280:             }
  Line 281:         }
  Line 283:     try:
  Line 284:         logger.info("=== 开始构建图谱 ===")
  Line 286:         # 检查配置
  Line 287:         errors = []
  Line 288:         if not Config.ZEP_API_KEY:
  Line 289:             errors.append(t('api.zepApiKeyMissing'))
  Line 290:         if errors:
  Line 291:             logger.error(f"配置错误: {errors}")
  Line 292:             return jsonify({
  Line 293:                 "success": False,
  Line 294:                 "error": t('api.configError', details="; ".join(errors))
  Line 295:             }), 500
  Line 297:         # 解析请求
  Line 298:         data = request.get_json() or {}
  Line 299:         project_id = data.get('project_id')
  Line 300:         logger.debug(f"请求参数: project_id={project_id}")
  Line 302:         if not project_id:
  Line 303:             return jsonify({
  Line 304:                 "success": False,
  Line 305:                 "error": t('api.requireProjectId')
  Line 306:             }), 400
  Line 308:         # 获取项目
  Line 309:         project = ProjectManager.get_project(project_id)
  Line 310:         if not project:
  Line 311:             return jsonify({
  Line 312:                 "success": False,
  Line 313:                 "error": t('api.projectNotFound', id=project_id)
  Line 314:             }), 404
  Line 316:         # 检查项目状态
  Line 317:         force = data.get('force', False)  # 强制重新构建
  Line 319:         if project.status == ProjectStatus.CREATED:
  Line 320:             return jsonify({
  Line 321:                 "success": False,
  Line 322:                 "error": t('api.ontologyNotGenerated')
  Line 323:             }), 400
  Line 325:         if project.status == ProjectStatus.GRAPH_BUILDING and not force:
  Line 326:             return jsonify({
  Line 327:                 "success": False,
  Line 328:                 "error": t('api.graphBuilding'),
  Line 329:                 "task_id": project.graph_build_task_id
  Line 330:             }), 400
  Line 332:         # 如果强制重建，重置状态
  Line 333:         if force and project.status in [ProjectStatus.GRAPH_BUILDING, ProjectStatus.FAILED, ProjectStatus.GRAPH_COMPLETED]:
  Line 334:             project.status = ProjectStatus.ONTOLOGY_GENERATED
  Line 335:             project.graph_id = None
  Line 336:             project.graph_build_task_id = None
  Line 337:             project.error = None
  Line 339:         # 获取配置
  Line 340:         graph_name = data.get('graph_name', project.name or 'Hermes Graph')
  Line 341:         chunk_size = data.get('chunk_size', project.chunk_size or Config.DEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZE)
  Line 342:         chunk_overlap = data.get('chunk_overlap', project.chunk_overlap or Config.DEFAULT_CHUNK_OVERLAP)
  Line 344:         # 更新项目配置
  Line 345:         project.chunk_size = chunk_size
  Line 346:         project.chunk_overlap = chunk_overlap
  Line 348:         # 获取提取的文本
  Line 349:         text = ProjectManager.get_extracted_text(project_id)
  Line 350:         if not text:
  Line 351:             return jsonify({
  Line 352:                 "success": False,
  Line 353:                 "error": t('api.textNotFound')
  Line 354:             }), 400
  Line 356:         # 获取本体
  Line 357:         ontology = project.ontology
  Line 358:         if not ontology:
  Line 359:             return jsonify({
  Line 360:                 "success": False,
  Line 361:                 "error": t('api.ontologyNotFound')
  Line 362:             }), 400
  Line 364:         # 创建异步任务
  Line 365:         task_manager = TaskManager()
  Line 366:         task_id = task_manager.create_task(f"构建图谱: {graph_name}")
  Line 367:         logger.info(f"创建图谱构建任务: task_id={task_id}, project_id={project_id}")
  Line 369:         # 更新项目状态
  Line 370:         project.status = ProjectStatus.GRAPH_BUILDING
  Line 371:         project.graph_build_task_id = task_id
  Line 372:         ProjectManager.save_project(project)
  Line 374:         # Capture locale before spawning background thread
  Line 375:         current_locale = get_locale()
  Line 377:         # 启动后台任务
  Line 378:         def build_task():
  Line 379:             set_locale(current_locale)
  Line 380:             build_logger = get_logger('hermes.build')
  Line 381:             try:
  Line 382:                 build_logger.info(f"[{task_id}] 开始构建图谱...")
  Line 383:                 task_manager.update_task(
  Line 384:                     task_id,
  Line 385:                     status=TaskStatus.PROCESSING,
  Line 386:                     message=t('progress.initGraphService')
  Line 389:                 # 创建图谱构建服务
  Line 390:                 builder = GraphBuilderService(api_key=Config.ZEP_API_KEY)
  Line 392:                 # 分块
  Line 393:                 task_manager.update_task(
  Line 394:                     task_id,
  Line 395:                     message=t('progress.textChunking'),
  Line 396:                     progress=5
  Line 398:                 chunks = TextProcessor.split_text(
  Line 399:                     text,
  Line 400:                     chunk_size=chunk_size,
  Line 401:                     overlap=chunk_overlap
  Line 403:                 total_chunks = len(chunks)
  Line 405:                 # 创建图谱
  Line 406:                 task_manager.update_task(
  Line 407:                     task_id,
  Line 408:                     message=t('progress.creatingZepGraph'),
  Line 409:                     progress=10
  Line 411:                 graph_id = builder.create_graph(name=graph_name)
  Line 413:                 # 更新项目的graph_id
  Line 414:                 project.graph_id = graph_id
  Line 415:                 ProjectManager.save_project(project)
  Line 417:                 # 设置本体
  Line 418:                 task_manager.update_task(
  Line 419:                     task_id,
  Line 420:                     message=t('progress.settingOntology'),
  Line 421:                     progress=15
  Line 423:                 builder.set_ontology(graph_id, ontology)
  Line 425:                 # 添加文本（progress_callback 签名是 (msg, progress_ratio)）
  Line 426:                 def add_progress_callback(msg, progress_ratio):
  Line 427:                     progress = 15 + int(progress_ratio * 40)  # 15% - 55%
  Line 428:                     task_manager.update_task(
  Line 429:                         task_id,
  Line 430:                         message=msg,
  Line 431:                         progress=progress
  Line 434:                 task_manager.update_task(
  Line 435:                     task_id,
  Line 436:                     message=t('progress.addingChunks', count=total_chunks),
  Line 437:                     progress=15
  Line 440:                 episode_uuids = builder.add_text_batches(
  Line 441:                     graph_id,
  Line 442:                     chunks,
  Line 443:                     batch_size=3,
  Line 444:                     progress_callback=add_progress_callback
  Line 447:                 # 等待Zep处理完成（查询每个episode的processed状态）
  Line 448:                 task_manager.update_task(
  Line 449:                     task_id,
  Line 450:                     message=t('progress.waitingZepProcess'),
  Line 451:                     progress=55
  Line 454:                 def wait_progress_callback(msg, progress_ratio):
  Line 455:                     progress = 55 + int(progress_ratio * 35)  # 55% - 90%
  Line 456:                     task_manager.update_task(
  Line 457:                         task_id,
  Line 458:                         message=msg,
  Line 459:                         progress=progress
  Line 462:                 builder._wait_for_episodes(episode_uuids, wait_progress_callback)
  Line 464:                 # 获取图谱数据
  Line 465:                 task_manager.update_task(
  Line 466:                     task_id,
  Line 467:                     message=t('progress.fetchingGraphData'),
  Line 468:                     progress=95
  Line 470:                 graph_data = builder.get_graph_data(graph_id)
  Line 472:                 # 更新项目状态
  Line 473:                 project.status = ProjectStatus.GRAPH_COMPLETED
  Line 474:                 ProjectManager.save_project(project)
  Line 476:                 node_count = graph_data.get("node_count", 0)
  Line 477:                 edge_count = graph_data.get("edge_count", 0)
  Line 478:                 build_logger.info(f"[{task_id}] 图谱构建完成: graph_id={graph_id}, 节点={node_count}, 边={edge_count}")
  Line 480:                 # 完成
  Line 481:                 task_manager.update_task(
  Line 482:                     task_id,
  Line 483:                     status=TaskStatus.COMPLETED,
  Line 484:                     message=t('progress.graphBuildComplete'),
  Line 485:                     progress=100,
  Line 486:                     result={
  Line 487:                         "project_id": project_id,
  Line 488:                         "graph_id": graph_id,
  Line 489:                         "node_count": node_count,
  Line 490:                         "edge_count": edge_count,
  Line 491:                         "chunk_count": total_chunks
  Line 492:                     }
  Line 495:             except Exception as e:
  Line 496:                 # 更新项目状态为失败
  Line 497:                 build_logger.error(f"[{task_id}] 图谱构建失败: {str(e)}")
  Line 498:                 build_logger.debug(traceback.format_exc())
  Line 500:                 project.status = ProjectStatus.FAILED
  Line 501:                 project.error = str(e)
  Line 502:                 ProjectManager.save_project(project)
  Line 504:                 task_manager.update_task(
  Line 505:                     task_id,
  Line 506:                     status=TaskStatus.FAILED,
  Line 507:                     message=t('progress.buildFailed', error=str(e)),
  Line 508:                     error=traceback.format_exc()
  Line 511:         # 启动后台线程
  Line 512:         thread = threading.Thread(target=build_task, daemon=True)
  Line 513:         thread.start()
  Line 515:         return jsonify({
  Line 516:             "success": True,
  Line 517:             "data": {
  Line 518:                 "project_id": project_id,
  Line 519:                 "task_id": task_id,
  Line 520:                 "message": t('api.graphBuildStarted', taskId=task_id)
  Line 521:             }
  Line 522:         })
  Line 524:     except Exception as e:
  Line 525:         return jsonify({
  Line 526:             "success": False,
  Line 527:             "error": str(e),
  Line 528:             "traceback": traceback.format_exc()
  Line 529:         }), 500

  Line 25: @report_bp.route('/generate', methods=['POST'])
  Line 26: def generate_report():
  Line 28:     生成模拟分析报告（异步任务）
  Line 30:     这是一个耗时操作，接口会立即返回task_id，
  Line 31:     使用 GET /api/report/generate/status 查询进度
  Line 33:     请求（JSON）：
  Line 34:         {
  Line 35:             "simulation_id": "sim_xxxx",    // 必填，模拟ID
  Line 36:             "force_regenerate": false        // 可选，强制重新生成
  Line 37:         }
  Line 39:     返回：
  Line 40:         {
  Line 41:             "success": true,
  Line 42:             "data": {
  Line 43:                 "simulation_id": "sim_xxxx",
  Line 44:                 "task_id": "task_xxxx",
  Line 45:                 "status": "generating",
  Line 46:                 "message": "报告生成任务已启动"
  Line 47:             }
  Line 48:         }
  Line 50:     try:
  Line 51:         data = request.get_json() or {}
  Line 53:         simulation_id = data.get('simulation_id')
  Line 54:         if not simulation_id:
  Line 55:             return jsonify({
  Line 56:                 "success": False,
  Line 57:                 "error": t('api.requireSimulationId')
  Line 58:             }), 400
  Line 60:         force_regenerate = data.get('force_regenerate', False)
  Line 62:         # 获取模拟信息
  Line 63:         manager = SimulationManager()
  Line 64:         state = manager.get_simulation(simulation_id)
  Line 66:         if not state:
  Line 67:             return jsonify({
  Line 68:                 "success": False,
  Line 69:                 "error": t('api.simulationNotFound', id=simulation_id)
  Line 70:             }), 404
  Line 72:         # 检查是否已有报告
  Line 73:         if not force_regenerate:
  Line 74:             existing_report = ReportManager.get_report_by_simulation(simulation_id)
  Line 75:             if existing_report and existing_report.status == ReportStatus.COMPLETED:
  Line 76:                 return jsonify({
  Line 77:                     "success": True,
  Line 78:                     "data": {
  Line 79:                         "simulation_id": simulation_id,
  Line 80:                         "report_id": existing_report.report_id,
  Line 81:                         "status": "completed",
  Line 82:                         "message": t('api.reportAlreadyExists'),
  Line 83:                         "already_generated": True
  Line 84:                     }
  Line 85:                 })
  Line 87:         # 获取项目信息
  Line 88:         project = ProjectManager.get_project(state.project_id)
  Line 89:         if not project:
  Line 90:             return jsonify({
  Line 91:                 "success": False,
  Line 92:                 "error": t('api.projectNotFound', id=state.project_id)
  Line 93:             }), 404
  Line 95:         graph_id = state.graph_id or project.graph_id
  Line 96:         if not graph_id:
  Line 97:             return jsonify({
  Line 98:                 "success": False,
  Line 99:                 "error": t('api.missingGraphIdEnsure')
  Line 100:             }), 400
  Line 102:         simulation_requirement = project.simulation_requirement
  Line 103:         if not simulation_requirement:
  Line 104:             return jsonify({
  Line 105:                 "success": False,
  Line 106:                 "error": t('api.missingSimRequirement')
  Line 107:             }), 400
  Line 109:         # 提前生成 report_id，以便立即返回给前端
  Line 110:         import uuid
  Line 111:         report_id = f"report_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:12]}"
  Line 113:         # 创建异步任务
  Line 114:         task_manager = TaskManager()
  Line 115:         task_id = task_manager.create_task(
  Line 116:             task_type="report_generate",
  Line 117:             metadata={
  Line 118:                 "simulation_id": simulation_id,
  Line 119:                 "graph_id": graph_id,
  Line 120:                 "report_id": report_id
  Line 121:             }
  Line 124:         # Capture locale before spawning background thread
  Line 125:         current_locale = get_locale()
  Line 127:         # 定义后台任务
  Line 128:         def run_generate():
  Line 129:             set_locale(current_locale)
  Line 130:             try:
  Line 131:                 task_manager.update_task(
  Line 132:                     task_id,
  Line 133:                     status=TaskStatus.PROCESSING,
  Line 134:                     progress=0,
  Line 135:                     message=t('api.initReportAgent')
  Line 138:                 # 创建Report Agent
  Line 139:                 agent = ReportAgent(
  Line 140:                     graph_id=graph_id,
  Line 141:                     simulation_id=simulation_id,
  Line 142:                     simulation_requirement=simulation_requirement
  Line 145:                 # 进度回调
  Line 146:                 def progress_callback(stage, progress, message):
  Line 147:                     task_manager.update_task(
  Line 148:                         task_id,
  Line 149:                         progress=progress,
  Line 150:                         message=f"[{stage}] {message}"
  Line 153:                 # 生成报告（传入预先生成的 report_id）
  Line 154:                 report = agent.generate_report(
  Line 155:                     progress_callback=progress_callback,
  Line 156:                     report_id=report_id
  Line 159:                 # 保存报告
  Line 160:                 ReportManager.save_report(report)
  Line 162:                 if report.status == ReportStatus.COMPLETED:
  Line 163:                     task_manager.complete_task(
  Line 164:                         task_id,
  Line 165:                         result={
  Line 166:                             "report_id": report.report_id,
  Line 167:                             "simulation_id": simulation_id,
  Line 168:                             "status": "completed"
  Line 169:                         }
  Line 171:                 else:
  Line 172:                     task_manager.fail_task(task_id, report.error or t('api.reportGenerateFailed'))
  Line 174:             except Exception as e:
  Line 175:                 logger.error(f"报告生成失败: {str(e)}")
  Line 176:                 task_manager.fail_task(task_id, str(e))
  Line 178:         # 启动后台线程
  Line 179:         thread = threading.Thread(target=run_generate, daemon=True)
  Line 180:         thread.start()
  Line 182:         return jsonify({
  Line 183:             "success": True,
  Line 184:             "data": {
  Line 185:                 "simulation_id": simulation_id,
  Line 186:                 "report_id": report_id,
  Line 187:                 "task_id": task_id,
  Line 188:                 "status": "generating",
  Line 189:                 "message": t('api.reportGenerateStarted'),
  Line 190:                 "already_generated": False
  Line 191:             }
  Line 192:         })
  Line 194:     except Exception as e:
  Line 195:         logger.error(f"启动报告生成任务失败: {str(e)}")
  Line 196:         return jsonify({
  Line 197:             "success": False,
  Line 198:             "error": str(e),
  Line 199:             "traceback": traceback.format_exc()
  Line 200:         }), 500

  Line 398: @report_bp.route('/<report_id>/download', methods=['GET'])

  Line 401:     下载报告（Markdown格式）
  Line 403:     返回Markdown文件
  Line 405:     try:
  Line 406:         report = ReportManager.get_report(report_id)
  Line 408:         if not report:
  Line 409:             return jsonify({
  Line 410:                 "success": False,
  Line 411:                 "error": t('api.reportNotFound', id=report_id)
  Line 412:             }), 404
  Line 414:         md_path = ReportManager._get_report_markdown_path(report_id)
  Line 416:         if not os.path.exists(md_path):
  Line 417:             # 如果MD文件不存在，生成一个临时文件
  Line 418:             import tempfile
  Line 419:             with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w', suffix='.md', delete=False) as f:
  Line 420:                 f.write(report.markdown_content)
  Line 421:                 temp_path = f.name
  Line 423:             return send_file(
  Line 424:                 temp_path,
  Line 425:                 as_attachment=True,
  Line 426:                 download_name=f"{report_id}.md"
  Line 429:         return send_file(
  Line 430:             md_path,
  Line 431:             as_attachment=True,
  Line 432:             download_name=f"{report_id}.md"
  Line 435:     except Exception as e:
  Line 436:         logger.error(f"下载报告失败: {str(e)}")

  Line 506:         if not simulation_id:
  Line 507:             return jsonify({
  Line 508:                 "success": False,
  Line 509:                 "error": t('api.requireSimulationId')
  Line 510:             }), 400

  Line 514:                 "success": False,

  Line 516:             }), 400

  Line 525:                 "error": t('api.simulationNotFound', id=simulation_id)
  Line 526:             }), 404

  Line 529:         if not project:
  Line 530:             return jsonify({
  Line 531:                 "success": False,
  Line 532:                 "error": t('api.projectNotFound', id=state.project_id)
  Line 533:             }), 404

  Line 536:         if not graph_id:
  Line 537:             return jsonify({
  Line 538:                 "success": False,
  Line 539:                 "error": t('api.missingGraphId')
  Line 540:             }), 400
  Line 542:         simulation_requirement = project.simulation_requirement or ""
  Line 544:         # 创建Agent并进行对话

  Line 547:             simulation_id=simulation_id,
  Line 548:             simulation_requirement=simulation_requirement

  Line 553:         return jsonify({

  Line 555:             "data": result
  Line 556:         })

  Line 28: def optimize_interview_prompt(prompt: str) -> str:
  Line 30:     优化Interview提问，添加前缀避免Agent调用工具
  Line 32:     Args:
  Line 33:         prompt: 原始提问
  Line 35:     Returns:
  Line 36:         优化后的提问
  Line 38:     if not prompt:
  Line 39:         return prompt
  Line 40:     # 避免重复添加前缀
  Line 41:     if prompt.startswith(INTERVIEW_PROMPT_PREFIX):
  Line 42:         return prompt
  Line 43:     return f"{INTERVIEW_PROMPT_PREFIX}{prompt}"

  Line 240: def _check_simulation_prepared(simulation_id: str) -> tuple:
  Line 242:     检查模拟是否已经准备完成
  Line 244:     检查条件：
  Line 245:     1. state.json 存在且 status 为 "ready"
  Line 246:     2. 必要文件存在：reddit_profiles.json, twitter_profiles.csv, simulation_config.json
  Line 248:     注意：运行脚本(run_*.py)保留在 backend/scripts/ 目录，不再复制到模拟目录
  Line 250:     Args:
  Line 251:         simulation_id: 模拟ID
  Line 253:     Returns:
  Line 254:         (is_prepared: bool, info: dict)
  Line 256:     import os
  Line 257:     from ..config import Config
  Line 259:     simulation_dir = os.path.join(Config.OASIS_SIMULATION_DATA_DIR, simulation_id)
  Line 261:     # 检查目录是否存在
  Line 262:     if not os.path.exists(simulation_dir):
  Line 263:         return False, {"reason": "模拟目录不存在"}
  Line 265:     # 必要文件列表（不包括脚本，脚本位于 backend/scripts/）
  Line 266:     required_files = [
  Line 267:         "state.json",
  Line 268:         "simulation_config.json",
  Line 269:         "reddit_profiles.json",
  Line 270:         "twitter_profiles.csv"
  Line 271:     ]
  Line 273:     # 检查文件是否存在
  Line 274:     existing_files = []
  Line 275:     missing_files = []
  Line 276:     for f in required_files:
  Line 277:         file_path = os.path.join(simulation_dir, f)
  Line 278:         if os.path.exists(file_path):
  Line 279:             existing_files.append(f)
  Line 280:         else:
  Line 281:             missing_files.append(f)
  Line 283:     if missing_files:
  Line 284:         return False, {
  Line 285:             "reason": "缺少必要文件",
  Line 286:             "missing_files": missing_files,
  Line 287:             "existing_files": existing_files
  Line 288:         }
  Line 290:     # 检查state.json中的状态
  Line 291:     state_file = os.path.join(simulation_dir, "state.json")
  Line 292:     try:
  Line 293:         import json
  Line 294:         with open(state_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  Line 295:             state_data = json.load(f)
  Line 297:         status = state_data.get("status", "")
  Line 298:         config_generated = state_data.get("config_generated", False)
  Line 300:         # 详细日志
  Line 301:         logger.debug(f"检测模拟准备状态: {simulation_id}, status={status}, config_generated={config_generated}")
  Line 303:         # 如果 config_generated=True 且文件存在，认为准备完成
  Line 304:         # 以下状态都说明准备工作已完成：
  Line 305:         # - ready: 准备完成，可以运行
  Line 306:         # - preparing: 如果 config_generated=True 说明已完成
  Line 307:         # - running: 正在运行，说明准备早就完成了
  Line 308:         # - completed: 运行完成，说明准备早就完成了
  Line 309:         # - stopped: 已停止，说明准备早就完成了
  Line 310:         # - failed: 运行失败（但准备是完成的）
  Line 311:         prepared_statuses = ["ready", "preparing", "running", "completed", "stopped", "failed"]
  Line 312:         if status in prepared_statuses and config_generated:
  Line 313:             # 获取文件统计信息
  Line 314:             profiles_file = os.path.join(simulation_dir, "reddit_profiles.json")
  Line 315:             config_file = os.path.join(simulation_dir, "simulation_config.json")
  Line 317:             profiles_count = 0
  Line 318:             if os.path.exists(profiles_file):
  Line 319:                 with open(profiles_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  Line 320:                     profiles_data = json.load(f)
  Line 321:                     profiles_count = len(profiles_data) if isinstance(profiles_data, list) else 0
  Line 323:             # 如果状态是preparing但文件已完成，自动更新状态为ready
  Line 324:             if status == "preparing":
  Line 325:                 try:
  Line 326:                     state_data["status"] = "ready"
  Line 327:                     from datetime import datetime
  Line 328:                     state_data["updated_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
  Line 329:                     with open(state_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  Line 330:                         json.dump(state_data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
  Line 331:                     logger.info(f"自动更新模拟状态: {simulation_id} preparing -> ready")
  Line 332:                     status = "ready"
  Line 333:                 except Exception as e:
  Line 334:                     logger.warning(f"自动更新状态失败: {e}")
  Line 336:             logger.info(f"模拟 {simulation_id} 检测结果: 已准备完成 (status={status}, config_generated={config_generated})")
  Line 337:             return True, {
  Line 338:                 "status": status,
  Line 339:                 "entities_count": state_data.get("entities_count", 0),
  Line 340:                 "profiles_count": profiles_count,
  Line 341:                 "entity_types": state_data.get("entity_types", []),
  Line 342:                 "config_generated": config_generated,
  Line 343:                 "created_at": state_data.get("created_at"),
  Line 344:                 "updated_at": state_data.get("updated_at"),
  Line 345:                 "existing_files": existing_files
  Line 346:             }
  Line 347:         else:
  Line 348:             logger.warning(f"模拟 {simulation_id} 检测结果: 未准备完成 (status={status}, config_generated={config_generated})")
  Line 349:             return False, {
  Line 350:                 "reason": f"状态不在已准备列表中或config_generated为false: status={status}, config_generated={config_generated}",
  Line 351:                 "status": status,
  Line 352:                 "config_generated": config_generated
  Line 353:             }
  Line 355:     except Exception as e:
  Line 356:         return False, {"reason": f"读取状态文件失败: {str(e)}"}
  Line 359: @simulation_bp.route('/prepare', methods=['POST'])
  Line 360: def prepare_simulation():
  Line 362:     准备模拟环境（异步任务，LLM智能生成所有参数）
  Line 364:     这是一个耗时操作，接口会立即返回task_id，
  Line 365:     使用 GET /api/simulation/prepare/status 查询进度
  Line 367:     特性：
  Line 368:     - 自动检测已完成的准备工作，避免重复生成
  Line 369:     - 如果已准备完成，直接返回已有结果
  Line 370:     - 支持强制重新生成（force_regenerate=true）
  Line 372:     步骤：
  Line 373:     1. 检查是否已有完成的准备工作
  Line 374:     2. 从Zep图谱读取并过滤实体
  Line 375:     3. 为每个实体生成OASIS Agent Profile（带重试机制）
  Line 376:     4. LLM智能生成模拟配置（带重试机制）
  Line 377:     5. 保存配置文件和预设脚本
  Line 379:     请求（JSON）：
  Line 380:         {
  Line 381:             "simulation_id": "sim_xxxx",                   // 必填，模拟ID
  Line 382:             "entity_types": ["Student", "PublicFigure"],  // 可选，指定实体类型
  Line 383:             "use_llm_for_profiles": true,                 // 可选，是否用LLM生成人设
  Line 384:             "parallel_profile_count": 5,                  // 可选，并行生成人设数量，默认5
  Line 385:             "force_regenerate": false                     // 可选，强制重新生成，默认false
  Line 386:         }
  Line 388:     返回：
  Line 389:         {
  Line 390:             "success": true,
  Line 391:             "data": {
  Line 392:                 "simulation_id": "sim_xxxx",
  Line 393:                 "task_id": "task_xxxx",           // 新任务时返回
  Line 394:                 "status": "preparing|ready",
  Line 395:                 "message": "准备任务已启动|已有完成的准备工作",
  Line 396:                 "already_prepared": true|false    // 是否已准备完成
  Line 397:             }
  Line 398:         }
  Line 400:     import threading
  Line 401:     import os
  Line 402:     from ..models.task import TaskManager, TaskStatus
  Line 403:     from ..config import Config
  Line 405:     try:
  Line 406:         data = request.get_json() or {}
  Line 408:         simulation_id = data.get('simulation_id')
  Line 409:         if not simulation_id:
  Line 410:             return jsonify({
  Line 411:                 "success": False,
  Line 412:                 "error": t('api.requireSimulationId')
  Line 413:             }), 400
  Line 415:         manager = SimulationManager()
  Line 416:         state = manager.get_simulation(simulation_id)
  Line 418:         if not state:
  Line 419:             return jsonify({
  Line 420:                 "success": False,
  Line 421:                 "error": t('api.simulationNotFound', id=simulation_id)
  Line 422:             }), 404
  Line 424:         # 检查是否强制重新生成
  Line 425:         force_regenerate = data.get('force_regenerate', False)
  Line 426:         logger.info(f"开始处理 /prepare 请求: simulation_id={simulation_id}, force_regenerate={force_regenerate}")
  Line 428:         # 检查是否已经准备完成（避免重复生成）
  Line 429:         if not force_regenerate:
  Line 430:             logger.debug(f"检查模拟 {simulation_id} 是否已准备完成...")
  Line 431:             is_prepared, prepare_info = _check_simulation_prepared(simulation_id)
  Line 432:             logger.debug(f"检查结果: is_prepared={is_prepared}, prepare_info={prepare_info}")
  Line 433:             if is_prepared:
  Line 434:                 logger.info(f"模拟 {simulation_id} 已准备完成，跳过重复生成")
  Line 435:                 return jsonify({
  Line 436:                     "success": True,
  Line 437:                     "data": {
  Line 438:                         "simulation_id": simulation_id,
  Line 439:                         "status": "ready",
  Line 440:                         "message": t('api.alreadyPrepared'),
  Line 441:                         "already_prepared": True,
  Line 442:                         "prepare_info": prepare_info
  Line 443:                     }
  Line 444:                 })
  Line 445:             else:
  Line 446:                 logger.info(f"模拟 {simulation_id} 未准备完成，将启动准备任务")
  Line 448:         # 从项目获取必要信息
  Line 449:         project = ProjectManager.get_project(state.project_id)
  Line 450:         if not project:
  Line 451:             return jsonify({
  Line 452:                 "success": False,
  Line 453:                 "error": t('api.projectNotFound', id=state.project_id)
  Line 454:             }), 404
  Line 456:         # 获取模拟需求
  Line 457:         simulation_requirement = project.simulation_requirement or ""
  Line 458:         if not simulation_requirement:
  Line 459:             return jsonify({
  Line 460:                 "success": False,
  Line 461:                 "error": t('api.projectMissingRequirement')
  Line 462:             }), 400
  Line 464:         # 获取文档文本
  Line 465:         document_text = ProjectManager.get_extracted_text(state.project_id) or ""
  Line 467:         entity_types_list = data.get('entity_types')
  Line 468:         use_llm_for_profiles = data.get('use_llm_for_profiles', True)
  Line 469:         parallel_profile_count = data.get('parallel_profile_count', 5)
  Line 471:         # ========== 同步获取实体数量（在后台任务启动前） ==========
  Line 472:         # 这样前端在调用prepare后立即就能获取到预期Agent总数
  Line 473:         try:
  Line 474:             logger.info(f"同步获取实体数量: graph_id={state.graph_id}")
  Line 475:             reader = ZepEntityReader()
  Line 476:             # 快速读取实体（不需要边信息，只统计数量）
  Line 477:             filtered_preview = reader.filter_defined_entities(
  Line 478:                 graph_id=state.graph_id,
  Line 479:                 defined_entity_types=entity_types_list,
  Line 480:                 enrich_with_edges=False  # 不获取边信息，加快速度
  Line 482:             # 保存实体数量到状态（供前端立即获取）
  Line 483:             state.entities_count = filtered_preview.filtered_count
  Line 484:             state.entity_types = list(filtered_preview.entity_types)
  Line 485:             logger.info(f"预期实体数量: {filtered_preview.filtered_count}, 类型: {filtered_preview.entity_types}")
  Line 486:         except Exception as e:
  Line 487:             logger.warning(f"同步获取实体数量失败（将在后台任务中重试）: {e}")
  Line 488:             # 失败不影响后续流程，后台任务会重新获取
  Line 490:         # 创建异步任务
  Line 491:         task_manager = TaskManager()
  Line 492:         task_id = task_manager.create_task(
  Line 493:             task_type="simulation_prepare",
  Line 494:             metadata={
  Line 495:                 "simulation_id": simulation_id,
  Line 496:                 "project_id": state.project_id
  Line 497:             }
  Line 500:         # 更新模拟状态（包含预先获取的实体数量）
  Line 501:         state.status = SimulationStatus.PREPARING
  Line 502:         manager._save_simulation_state(state)
  Line 504:         # Capture locale before spawning background thread
  Line 505:         current_locale = get_locale()
  Line 507:         # 定义后台任务
  Line 508:         def run_prepare():
  Line 509:             set_locale(current_locale)
  Line 510:             try:
  Line 511:                 task_manager.update_task(
  Line 512:                     task_id,
  Line 513:                     status=TaskStatus.PROCESSING,
  Line 514:                     progress=0,
  Line 515:                     message=t('progress.startPreparingEnv')
  Line 518:                 # 准备模拟（带进度回调）
  Line 519:                 # 存储阶段进度详情
  Line 520:                 stage_details = {}
  Line 522:                 def progress_callback(stage, progress, message, **kwargs):
  Line 523:                     # 计算总进度
  Line 524:                     stage_weights = {
  Line 525:                         "reading": (0, 20),           # 0-20%
  Line 526:                         "generating_profiles": (20, 70),  # 20-70%
  Line 527:                         "generating_config": (70, 90),    # 70-90%
  Line 528:                         "copying_scripts": (90, 100)       # 90-100%
  Line 529:                     }
  Line 531:                     start, end = stage_weights.get(stage, (0, 100))
  Line 532:                     current_progress = int(start + (end - start) * progress / 100)
  Line 534:                     # 构建详细进度信息
  Line 535:                     stage_names = {
  Line 536:                         "reading": t('progress.readingGraphEntities'),
  Line 537:                         "generating_profiles": t('progress.generatingProfiles'),
  Line 538:                         "generating_config": t('progress.generatingSimConfig'),
  Line 539:                         "copying_scripts": t('progress.preparingScripts')
  Line 540:                     }
  Line 542:                     stage_index = list(stage_weights.keys()).index(stage) + 1 if stage in stage_weights else 1
  Line 543:                     total_stages = len(stage_weights)
  Line 545:                     # 更新阶段详情
  Line 546:                     stage_details[stage] = {
  Line 547:                         "stage_name": stage_names.get(stage, stage),
  Line 548:                         "stage_progress": progress,
  Line 549:                         "current": kwargs.get("current", 0),
  Line 550:                         "total": kwargs.get("total", 0),
  Line 551:                         "item_name": kwargs.get("item_name", "")
  Line 552:                     }
  Line 554:                     # 构建详细进度信息
  Line 555:                     detail = stage_details[stage]
  Line 556:                     progress_detail_data = {
  Line 557:                         "current_stage": stage,
  Line 558:                         "current_stage_name": stage_names.get(stage, stage),
  Line 559:                         "stage_index": stage_index,
  Line 560:                         "total_stages": total_stages,
  Line 561:                         "stage_progress": progress,
  Line 562:                         "current_item": detail["current"],
  Line 563:                         "total_items": detail["total"],
  Line 564:                         "item_description": message
  Line 565:                     }

  Line 817: def _get_report_id_for_simulation(simulation_id: str) -> str:
  Line 819:     获取 simulation 对应的最新 report_id
  Line 821:     遍历 reports 目录，找出 simulation_id 匹配的 report，
  Line 822:     如果有多个则返回最新的（按 created_at 排序）
  Line 824:     Args:
  Line 825:         simulation_id: 模拟ID
  Line 827:     Returns:
  Line 828:         report_id 或 None
  Line 830:     import json
  Line 831:     from datetime import datetime
  Line 833:     # reports 目录路径：backend/uploads/reports
  Line 834:     # __file__ 是 app/api/simulation.py，需要向上两级到 backend/
  Line 835:     reports_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '../../uploads/reports')
  Line 836:     if not os.path.exists(reports_dir):
  Line 837:         return None
  Line 839:     matching_reports = []
  Line 841:     try:
  Line 842:         for report_folder in os.listdir(reports_dir):
  Line 843:             report_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, report_folder)
  Line 844:             if not os.path.isdir(report_path):
  Line 845:                 continue
  Line 847:             meta_file = os.path.join(report_path, "meta.json")
  Line 848:             if not os.path.exists(meta_file):
  Line 849:                 continue
  Line 851:             try:
  Line 852:                 with open(meta_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  Line 853:                     meta = json.load(f)
  Line 855:                 if meta.get("simulation_id") == simulation_id:
  Line 856:                     matching_reports.append({
  Line 857:                         "report_id": meta.get("report_id"),
  Line 858:                         "created_at": meta.get("created_at", ""),
  Line 859:                         "status": meta.get("status", "")
  Line 860:                     })
  Line 861:             except Exception:
  Line 862:                 continue
  Line 864:         if not matching_reports:
  Line 865:             return None
  Line 867:         # 按创建时间倒序排序，返回最新的
  Line 868:         matching_reports.sort(key=lambda x: x.get("created_at", ""), reverse=True)
  Line 869:         return matching_reports[0].get("report_id")
  Line 871:     except Exception as e:
  Line 872:         logger.warning(f"查找 simulation {simulation_id} 的 report 失败: {e}")
  Line 873:         return None
  Line 876: @simulation_bp.route('/history', methods=['GET'])
  Line 877: def get_simulation_history():

  Line 917:         # 增强模拟数据，只从 Simulation 文件读取

  Line 919:         for sim in simulations:
  Line 920:             sim_dict = sim.to_dict()
  Line 922:             # 获取模拟配置信息（从 simulation_config.json 读取 simulation_requirement）
  Line 923:             config = manager.get_simulation_config(sim.simulation_id)
  Line 924:             if config:

  Line 928:                 # 推荐轮数（后备值）
  Line 929:                 recommended_rounds = int(
  Line 930:                     time_config.get("total_simulation_hours", 0) * 60 /
  Line 931:                     max(time_config.get("minutes_per_round", 60), 1)
  Line 933:             else:
  Line 934:                 sim_dict["simulation_requirement"] = ""
  Line 935:                 sim_dict["total_simulation_hours"] = 0
  Line 936:                 recommended_rounds = 0
  Line 938:             # 获取运行状态（从 run_state.json 读取用户设置的实际轮数）
  Line 939:             run_state = SimulationRunner.get_run_state(sim.simulation_id)
  Line 940:             if run_state:
  Line 941:                 sim_dict["current_round"] = run_state.current_round
  Line 942:                 sim_dict["runner_status"] = run_state.runner_status.value
  Line 943:                 # 使用用户设置的 total_rounds，若无则使用推荐轮数
  Line 944:                 sim_dict["total_rounds"] = run_state.total_rounds if run_state.total_rounds > 0 else recommended_rounds
  Line 945:             else:
  Line 946:                 sim_dict["current_round"] = 0
  Line 947:                 sim_dict["runner_status"] = "idle"
  Line 948:                 sim_dict["total_rounds"] = recommended_rounds
  Line 950:             # 获取关联项目的文件列表（最多3个）
  Line 951:             project = ProjectManager.get_project(sim.project_id)
  Line 952:             if project and hasattr(project, 'files') and project.files:
  Line 953:                 sim_dict["files"] = [
  Line 954:                     {"filename": f.get("filename", "未知文件")}
  Line 955:                     for f in project.files[:3]
  Line 956:                 ]
  Line 957:             else:
  Line 958:                 sim_dict["files"] = []
  Line 960:             # 获取关联的 report_id（查找该 simulation 最新的 report）
  Line 961:             sim_dict["report_id"] = _get_report_id_for_simulation(sim.simulation_id)
  Line 963:             # 添加版本号
  Line 964:             sim_dict["version"] = "v1.0.2"
  Line 966:             # 格式化日期
  Line 967:             try:
  Line 968:                 created_date = sim_dict.get("created_at", "")[:10]
  Line 969:                 sim_dict["created_date"] = created_date
  Line 970:             except:
  Line 971:                 sim_dict["created_date"] = ""
  Line 973:             enriched_simulations.append(sim_dict)
  Line 975:         return jsonify({
  Line 976:             "success": True,
  Line 977:             "data": enriched_simulations,
  Line 978:             "count": len(enriched_simulations)
  Line 979:         })
  Line 981:     except Exception as e:
  Line 982:         logger.error(f"获取历史模拟失败: {str(e)}")
  Line 983:         return jsonify({
  Line 984:             "success": False,
  Line 985:             "error": str(e),
  Line 986:             "traceback": traceback.format_exc()
  Line 987:         }), 500

  Line 1028: @simulation_bp.route('/<simulation_id>/profiles/realtime', methods=['GET'])
  Line 1029: def get_simulation_profiles_realtime(simulation_id: str):
  Line 1031:     实时获取模拟的Agent Profile（用于在生成过程中实时查看进度）

  Line 1041:     返回：

  Line 1050:                 "file_exists": true,
  Line 1051:                 "file_modified_at": "2025-12-04T18:20:00",
  Line 1052:                 "profiles": [...]
  Line 1053:             }
  Line 1054:         }
  Line 1056:     import json
  Line 1057:     import csv
  Line 1058:     from datetime import datetime
  Line 1060:     try:
  Line 1061:         platform = request.args.get('platform', 'reddit')

  Line 1066:         if not os.path.exists(sim_dir):

  Line 1068:                 "success": False,
  Line 1069:                 "error": t('api.simulationNotFound', id=simulation_id)
  Line 1070:             }), 404

  Line 1075:         else:

  Line 1078:         # 检查文件是否存在
  Line 1079:         file_exists = os.path.exists(profiles_file)
  Line 1080:         profiles = []
  Line 1081:         file_modified_at = None
  Line 1083:         if file_exists:
  Line 1084:             # 获取文件修改时间
  Line 1085:             file_stat = os.stat(profiles_file)
  Line 1086:             file_modified_at = datetime.fromtimestamp(file_stat.st_mtime).isoformat()
  Line 1088:             try:
  Line 1089:                 if platform == "reddit":
  Line 1090:                     with open(profiles_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  Line 1091:                         profiles = json.load(f)
  Line 1092:                 else:

  Line 1094:                         reader = csv.DictReader(f)
  Line 1095:                         profiles = list(reader)

  Line 1098:                 profiles = []

  Line 1110:                     is_generating = status == "preparing"

  Line 1377: @simulation_bp.route('/generate-profiles', methods=['POST'])
  Line 1378: def generate_profiles():

  Line 1387:             "platform": "reddit"              // 可选
  Line 1388:         }
  Line 1390:     try:
  Line 1391:         data = request.get_json() or {}
  Line 1393:         graph_id = data.get('graph_id')
  Line 1394:         if not graph_id:
  Line 1395:             return jsonify({
  Line 1396:                 "success": False,
  Line 1397:                 "error": t('api.requireGraphId')
  Line 1398:             }), 400
  Line 1400:         entity_types = data.get('entity_types')

  Line 1402:         platform = data.get('platform', 'reddit')
  Line 1404:         reader = ZepEntityReader()

  Line 1406:             graph_id=graph_id,
  Line 1407:             defined_entity_types=entity_types,
  Line 1408:             enrich_with_edges=True
  Line 1411:         if filtered.filtered_count == 0:
  Line 1412:             return jsonify({
  Line 1413:                 "success": False,
  Line 1414:                 "error": t('api.noMatchingEntities')
  Line 1415:             }), 400
  Line 1417:         generator = OasisProfileGenerator()
  Line 1418:         profiles = generator.generate_profiles_from_entities(
  Line 1419:             entities=filtered.entities,
  Line 1420:             use_llm=use_llm
  Line 1423:         if platform == "reddit":
  Line 1424:             profiles_data = [p.to_reddit_format() for p in profiles]
  Line 1425:         elif platform == "twitter":
  Line 1426:             profiles_data = [p.to_twitter_format() for p in profiles]
  Line 1427:         else:
  Line 1428:             profiles_data = [p.to_dict() for p in profiles]
  Line 1430:         return jsonify({
  Line 1431:             "success": True,
  Line 1432:             "data": {
  Line 1433:                 "platform": platform,
  Line 1434:                 "entity_types": list(filtered.entity_types),
  Line 1435:                 "count": len(profiles_data),
  Line 1436:                 "profiles": profiles_data
  Line 1437:             }
  Line 1438:         })
  Line 1440:     except Exception as e:
  Line 1441:         logger.error(f"生成Profile失败: {str(e)}")
  Line 1442:         return jsonify({
  Line 1443:             "success": False,
  Line 1444:             "error": str(e),
  Line 1445:             "traceback": traceback.format_exc()
  Line 1446:         }), 500
  Line 1449: # ============== 模拟运行控制接口 ==============
  Line 1451: @simulation_bp.route('/start', methods=['POST'])
  Line 1452: def start_simulation():
  Line 1454:     开始运行模拟
  Line 1456:     请求（JSON）：
  Line 1457:         {
  Line 1458:             "simulation_id": "sim_xxxx",          // 必填，模拟ID
  Line 1459:             "platform": "parallel",                // 可选: twitter / reddit / parallel (默认)
  Line 1460:             "max_rounds": 100,                     // 可选: 最大模拟轮数，用于截断过长的模拟
  Line 1461:             "enable_graph_memory_update": false,   // 可选: 是否将Agent活动动态更新到Zep图谱记忆
  Line 1462:             "force": false                         // 可选: 强制重新开始（会停止运行中的模拟并清理日志）
  Line 1463:         }
  Line 1465:     关于 force 参数：
  Line 1466:         - 启用后，如果模拟正在运行或已完成，会先停止并清理运行日志
  Line 1467:         - 清理的内容包括：run_state.json, actions.jsonl, simulation.log 等
  Line 1468:         - 不会清理配置文件（simulation_config.json）和 profile 文件
  Line 1469:         - 适用于需要重新运行模拟的场景
  Line 1471:     关于 enable_graph_memory_update：
  Line 1472:         - 启用后，模拟中所有Agent的活动（发帖、评论、点赞等）都会实时更新到Zep图谱
  Line 1473:         - 这可以让图谱"记住"模拟过程，用于后续分析或AI对话
  Line 1474:         - 需要模拟关联的项目有有效的 graph_id
  Line 1475:         - 采用批量更新机制，减少API调用次数
  Line 1477:     返回：
  Line 1478:         {
  Line 1479:             "success": true,
  Line 1480:             "data": {
  Line 1481:                 "simulation_id": "sim_xxxx",
  Line 1482:                 "runner_status": "running",
  Line 1483:                 "process_pid": 12345,
  Line 1484:                 "twitter_running": true,
  Line 1485:                 "reddit_running": true,
  Line 1486:                 "started_at": "2025-12-01T10:00:00",
  Line 1487:                 "graph_memory_update_enabled": true,  // 是否启用了图谱记忆更新
  Line 1488:                 "force_restarted": true               // 是否是强制重新开始
  Line 1489:             }
  Line 1490:         }
  Line 1492:     try:
  Line 1493:         data = request.get_json() or {}
  Line 1495:         simulation_id = data.get('simulation_id')
  Line 1496:         if not simulation_id:
  Line 1497:             return jsonify({
  Line 1498:                 "success": False,
  Line 1499:                 "error": t('api.requireSimulationId')
  Line 1500:             }), 400
  Line 1502:         platform = data.get('platform', 'parallel')
  Line 1503:         max_rounds = data.get('max_rounds')  # 可选：最大模拟轮数
  Line 1504:         enable_graph_memory_update = data.get('enable_graph_memory_update', False)  # 可选：是否启用图谱记忆更新
  Line 1505:         force = data.get('force', False)  # 可选：强制重新开始
  Line 1507:         # 验证 max_rounds 参数
  Line 1508:         if max_rounds is not None:
  Line 1509:             try:
  Line 1510:                 max_rounds = int(max_rounds)
  Line 1511:                 if max_rounds <= 0:
  Line 1512:                     return jsonify({
  Line 1513:                         "success": False,
  Line 1514:                         "error": t('api.maxRoundsPositive')
  Line 1515:                     }), 400
  Line 1516:             except (ValueError, TypeError):
  Line 1517:                 return jsonify({
  Line 1518:                     "success": False,
  Line 1519:                     "error": t('api.maxRoundsInvalid')
  Line 1520:                 }), 400

  Line 1523:             return jsonify({
  Line 1524:                 "success": False,
  Line 1525:                 "error": t('api.invalidPlatform', platform=platform)
  Line 1526:             }), 400
  Line 1528:         # 检查模拟是否已准备好
  Line 1529:         manager = SimulationManager()
  Line 1530:         state = manager.get_simulation(simulation_id)
  Line 1532:         if not state:
  Line 1533:             return jsonify({
  Line 1534:                 "success": False,
  Line 1535:                 "error": t('api.simulationNotFound', id=simulation_id)
  Line 1536:             }), 404

  Line 1542:             # 检查准备工作是否已完成

  Line 1548:                     # 检查模拟进程是否真的在运行
  Line 1549:                     run_state = SimulationRunner.get_run_state(simulation_id)
  Line 1550:                     if run_state and run_state.runner_status.value == "running":
  Line 1551:                         # 进程确实在运行
  Line 1552:                         if force:
  Line 1553:                             # 强制模式：停止运行中的模拟
  Line 1554:                             logger.info(f"强制模式：停止运行中的模拟 {simulation_id}")
  Line 1555:                             try:
  Line 1556:                                 SimulationRunner.stop_simulation(simulation_id)
  Line 1557:                             except Exception as e:
  Line 1558:                                 logger.warning(f"停止模拟时出现警告: {str(e)}")
  Line 1559:                         else:
  Line 1560:                             return jsonify({
  Line 1561:                                 "success": False,
  Line 1562:                                 "error": t('api.simRunningForceHint')
  Line 1563:                             }), 400

  Line 1566:                 if force:
  Line 1567:                     logger.info(f"强制模式：清理模拟日志 {simulation_id}")
  Line 1568:                     cleanup_result = SimulationRunner.cleanup_simulation_logs(simulation_id)
  Line 1569:                     if not cleanup_result.get("success"):
  Line 1570:                         logger.warning(f"清理日志时出现警告: {cleanup_result.get('errors')}")
  Line 1571:                     force_restarted = True
  Line 1573:                 # 进程不存在或已结束，重置状态为 ready
  Line 1574:                 logger.info(f"模拟 {simulation_id} 准备工作已完成，重置状态为 ready（原状态: {state.status.value}）")
  Line 1575:                 state.status = SimulationStatus.READY
  Line 1576:                 manager._save_simulation_state(state)

  Line 1579:                 return jsonify({
  Line 1580:                     "success": False,
  Line 1581:                     "error": t('api.simNotReady', status=state.status.value)
  Line 1582:                 }), 400

  Line 1585:         graph_id = None
  Line 1586:         if enable_graph_memory_update:
  Line 1587:             # 从模拟状态或项目中获取 graph_id
  Line 1588:             graph_id = state.graph_id
  Line 1589:             if not graph_id:

  Line 1679:         if state:
  Line 1680:             state.status = SimulationStatus.PAUSED

  Line 1685:             "data": run_state.to_dict()

  Line 1987: @simulation_bp.route('/<simulation_id>/posts', methods=['GET'])
  Line 1988: def get_simulation_posts(simulation_id: str):
  Line 1990:     获取模拟中的帖子
  Line 1992:     Query参数：
  Line 1993:         platform: 平台类型（twitter/reddit）
  Line 1994:         limit: 返回数量（默认50）
  Line 1995:         offset: 偏移量
  Line 1997:     返回帖子列表（从SQLite数据库读取）
  Line 1999:     try:
  Line 2000:         platform = request.args.get('platform', 'reddit')
  Line 2001:         limit = request.args.get('limit', 50, type=int)
  Line 2002:         offset = request.args.get('offset', 0, type=int)
  Line 2004:         sim_dir = os.path.join(
  Line 2005:             os.path.dirname(__file__),
  Line 2006:             f'../../uploads/simulations/{simulation_id}'
  Line 2009:         db_file = f"{platform}_simulation.db"
  Line 2010:         db_path = os.path.join(sim_dir, db_file)
  Line 2012:         if not os.path.exists(db_path):
  Line 2013:             return jsonify({
  Line 2014:                 "success": True,
  Line 2015:                 "data": {
  Line 2016:                     "platform": platform,
  Line 2017:                     "count": 0,
  Line 2018:                     "posts": [],
  Line 2019:                     "message": t('api.dbNotExist')
  Line 2020:                 }
  Line 2021:             })
  Line 2023:         import sqlite3
  Line 2024:         conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
  Line 2025:         conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
  Line 2026:         cursor = conn.cursor()
  Line 2028:         try:
  Line 2029:             cursor.execute("""
  Line 2030:                 SELECT * FROM post
  Line 2031:                 ORDER BY created_at DESC
  Line 2032:                 LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
  Line 2033:             """, (limit, offset))
  Line 2035:             posts = [dict(row) for row in cursor.fetchall()]
  Line 2037:             cursor.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post")
  Line 2038:             total = cursor.fetchone()[0]
  Line 2040:         except sqlite3.OperationalError:
  Line 2041:             posts = []
  Line 2042:             total = 0
  Line 2044:         conn.close()
  Line 2046:         return jsonify({
  Line 2047:             "success": True,
  Line 2048:             "data": {
  Line 2049:                 "platform": platform,
  Line 2050:                 "total": total,
  Line 2051:                 "count": len(posts),
  Line 2052:                 "posts": posts
  Line 2053:             }
  Line 2054:         })
  Line 2056:     except Exception as e:
  Line 2057:         logger.error(f"获取帖子失败: {str(e)}")
  Line 2058:         return jsonify({
  Line 2059:             "success": False,
  Line 2060:             "error": str(e),
  Line 2061:             "traceback": traceback.format_exc()
  Line 2062:         }), 500
