FILE: backend/app/utils/file_parser.py
Lines with Chinese text: 136
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Line 2: 文件解析工具
  Line 3: 支持PDF、Markdown、TXT文件的文本提取
  Line 6: import os
  Line 7: from pathlib import Path
  Line 8: from typing import List, Optional
  Line 11: def _read_text_with_fallback(file_path: str) -> str:
  Line 13:     读取文本文件，UTF-8失败时自动探测编码。
  Line 15:     采用多级回退策略：
  Line 16:     1. 首先尝试 UTF-8 解码
  Line 17:     2. 使用 charset_normalizer 检测编码
  Line 18:     3. 回退到 chardet 检测编码
  Line 19:     4. 最终使用 UTF-8 + errors='replace' 兜底
  Line 21:     Args:
  Line 22:         file_path: 文件路径
  Line 24:     Returns:
  Line 25:         解码后的文本内容
  Line 27:     data = Path(file_path).read_bytes()
  Line 29:     # 首先尝试 UTF-8
  Line 30:     try:
  Line 31:         return data.decode('utf-8')
  Line 32:     except UnicodeDecodeError:
  Line 33:         pass
  Line 35:     # 尝试使用 charset_normalizer 检测编码
  Line 36:     encoding = None
  Line 37:     try:
  Line 38:         from charset_normalizer import from_bytes
  Line 39:         best = from_bytes(data).best()
  Line 40:         if best and best.encoding:
  Line 41:             encoding = best.encoding
  Line 42:     except Exception:
  Line 43:         pass
  Line 45:     # 回退到 chardet
  Line 46:     if not encoding:
  Line 47:         try:
  Line 48:             import chardet
  Line 49:             result = chardet.detect(data)
  Line 50:             encoding = result.get('encoding') if result else None
  Line 51:         except Exception:
  Line 52:             pass
  Line 54:     # 最终兜底：使用 UTF-8 + replace
  Line 55:     if not encoding:
  Line 56:         encoding = 'utf-8'
  Line 58:     return data.decode(encoding, errors='replace')
  Line 61: class FileParser:
  Line 62:     """文件解析器"""
  Line 64:     SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS = {'.pdf', '.md', '.markdown', '.txt'}
  Line 66:     @classmethod
  Line 67:     def extract_text(cls, file_path: str) -> str:
  Line 69:         从文件中提取文本
  Line 71:         Args:
  Line 72:             file_path: 文件路径
  Line 74:         Returns:
  Line 75:             提取的文本内容
  Line 77:         path = Path(file_path)
  Line 79:         if not path.exists():
  Line 80:             raise FileNotFoundError(f"文件不存在: {file_path}")
  Line 82:         suffix = path.suffix.lower()
  Line 84:         if suffix not in cls.SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS:
  Line 85:             raise ValueError(f"不支持的文件格式: {suffix}")
  Line 87:         if suffix == '.pdf':
  Line 88:             return cls._extract_from_pdf(file_path)
  Line 89:         elif suffix in {'.md', '.markdown'}:
  Line 90:             return cls._extract_from_md(file_path)
  Line 91:         elif suffix == '.txt':
  Line 92:             return cls._extract_from_txt(file_path)
  Line 94:         raise ValueError(f"无法处理的文件格式: {suffix}")
  Line 96:     @staticmethod
  Line 97:     def _extract_from_pdf(file_path: str) -> str:
  Line 98:         """从PDF提取文本"""
  Line 99:         try:
  Line 100:             import fitz  # PyMuPDF
  Line 101:         except ImportError:
  Line 102:             raise ImportError("需要安装PyMuPDF: pip install PyMuPDF")
  Line 104:         text_parts = []
  Line 105:         with fitz.open(file_path) as doc:
  Line 106:             for page in doc:
  Line 107:                 text = page.get_text()
  Line 108:                 if text.strip():
  Line 109:                     text_parts.append(text)
  Line 111:         return "\n\n".join(text_parts)
  Line 113:     @staticmethod
  Line 114:     def _extract_from_md(file_path: str) -> str:
  Line 115:         """从Markdown提取文本，支持自动编码检测"""
  Line 116:         return _read_text_with_fallback(file_path)
  Line 118:     @staticmethod
  Line 119:     def _extract_from_txt(file_path: str) -> str:
  Line 120:         """从TXT提取文本，支持自动编码检测"""
  Line 121:         return _read_text_with_fallback(file_path)
  Line 123:     @classmethod
  Line 124:     def extract_from_multiple(cls, file_paths: List[str]) -> str:
  Line 126:         从多个文件提取文本并合并
  Line 128:         Args:
  Line 129:             file_paths: 文件路径列表
  Line 131:         Returns:
  Line 132:             合并后的文本
  Line 134:         all_texts = []
  Line 136:         for i, file_path in enumerate(file_paths, 1):
  Line 137:             try:
  Line 138:                 text = cls.extract_text(file_path)
  Line 139:                 filename = Path(file_path).name
  Line 140:                 all_texts.append(f"=== 文档 {i}: {filename} ===\n{text}")
  Line 141:             except Exception as e:
  Line 142:                 all_texts.append(f"=== 文档 {i}: {file_path} (提取失败: {str(e)}) ===")
  Line 144:         return "\n\n".join(all_texts)
  Line 147: def split_text_into_chunks(
  Line 148:     text: str,
  Line 149:     chunk_size: int = 500,
  Line 150:     overlap: int = 50
  Line 151: ) -> List[str]:
  Line 153:     将文本分割成小块
  Line 155:     Args:
  Line 156:         text: 原始文本
  Line 157:         chunk_size: 每块的字符数
  Line 158:         overlap: 重叠字符数
  Line 160:     Returns:
  Line 161:         文本块列表
  Line 163:     if len(text) <= chunk_size:
  Line 164:         return [text] if text.strip() else []
  Line 166:     chunks = []
  Line 167:     start = 0
  Line 169:     while start < len(text):
  Line 170:         end = start + chunk_size
  Line 172:         # 尝试在句子边界处分割
  Line 173:         if end < len(text):
  Line 174:             # 查找最近的句子结束符
  Line 175:             for sep in ['。', '！', '？', '.\n', '!\n', '?\n', '\n\n', '. ', '! ', '? ']:
  Line 176:                 last_sep = text[start:end].rfind(sep)
  Line 177:                 if last_sep != -1 and last_sep > chunk_size * 0.3:
  Line 178:                     end = start + last_sep + len(sep)
  Line 179:                     break
  Line 181:         chunk = text[start:end].strip()
  Line 182:         if chunk:
  Line 183:             chunks.append(chunk)
  Line 185:         # 下一个块从重叠位置开始
  Line 186:         start = end - overlap if end < len(text) else len(text)
  Line 188:     return chunks

  Line 43:         发送聊天请求

  Line 70:     def _extract_json_object(self, text: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  Line 71:         cleaned_response = (text or "").strip()
  Line 72:         cleaned_response = re.sub(r'^```(?:json)?\s*\n?', '', cleaned_response, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
  Line 73:         cleaned_response = re.sub(r'\n?```\s*$', '', cleaned_response)
  Line 74:         cleaned_response = cleaned_response.strip()
  Line 76:         try:
  Line 77:             return json.loads(cleaned_response)
  Line 78:         except json.JSONDecodeError:
  Line 79:             pass
  Line 81:         start = cleaned_response.find('{')
  Line 82:         if start == -1:
  Line 83:             raise ValueError(f"LLM返回的JSON格式无效: {cleaned_response}")
  Line 85:         depth = 0
  Line 86:         in_string = False
  Line 87:         escape = False
  Line 88:         for idx in range(start, len(cleaned_response)):
  Line 89:             char = cleaned_response[idx]
  Line 90:             if in_string:
  Line 91:                 if escape:
  Line 92:                     escape = False
  Line 93:                 elif char == '\\':
  Line 94:                     escape = True
  Line 95:                 elif char == '"':
  Line 96:                     in_string = False
  Line 97:                 continue
  Line 99:             if char == '"':
  Line 100:                 in_string = True
  Line 101:             elif char == '{':
  Line 102:                 depth += 1
  Line 103:             elif char == '}':
  Line 104:                 depth -= 1
  Line 105:                 if depth == 0:
  Line 106:                     candidate = cleaned_response[start:idx + 1]
  Line 107:                     try:
  Line 108:                         return json.loads(candidate)
  Line 109:                     except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
  Line 110:                         raise ValueError(f"LLM返回的JSON格式无效: {candidate}") from exc
  Line 112:         raise ValueError(f"LLM返回的JSON格式无效: {cleaned_response}")

  Line 133:             response = self.chat(
  Line 134:                 messages=messages,
  Line 135:                 temperature=temperature,
  Line 136:                 max_tokens=max_tokens,
  Line 137:                 response_format=None
  Line 139:             return self._extract_json_object(response)

  Line 143:             temperature=temperature,

  Line 23: def set_locale(locale: str):
  Line 24:     """Set locale for current thread. Call at the start of background threads."""
  Line 25:     _thread_local.locale = locale
  Line 28: def get_locale() -> str:
  Line 29:     if has_request_context():
  Line 30:         raw = request.headers.get('Accept-Language', 'zh')
  Line 31:         return raw if raw in _translations else 'zh'

FILE: backend/app/utils/retry.py
Lines with Chinese text: 173

  Line 2: API调用重试机制
  Line 3: 用于处理LLM等外部API调用的重试逻辑
  Line 6: import time
  Line 7: import random
  Line 8: import functools
  Line 9: from typing import Callable, Any, Optional, Type, Tuple
  Line 10: from ..utils.logger import get_logger
  Line 12: logger = get_logger('hermes.retry')
  Line 15: def retry_with_backoff(
  Line 16:     max_retries: int = 3,
  Line 17:     initial_delay: float = 1.0,
  Line 18:     max_delay: float = 30.0,
  Line 19:     backoff_factor: float = 2.0,
  Line 20:     jitter: bool = True,
  Line 21:     exceptions: Tuple[Type[Exception], ...] = (Exception,),
  Line 22:     on_retry: Optional[Callable[[Exception, int], None]] = None
  Line 23: ):
  Line 25:     带指数退避的重试装饰器
  Line 27:     Args:
  Line 28:         max_retries: 最大重试次数
  Line 29:         initial_delay: 初始延迟（秒）
  Line 30:         max_delay: 最大延迟（秒）
  Line 31:         backoff_factor: 退避因子
  Line 32:         jitter: 是否添加随机抖动
  Line 33:         exceptions: 需要重试的异常类型
  Line 34:         on_retry: 重试时的回调函数 (exception, retry_count)
  Line 36:     Usage:
  Line 37:         @retry_with_backoff(max_retries=3)
  Line 38:         def call_llm_api():
  Line 41:     def decorator(func: Callable) -> Callable:
  Line 42:         @functools.wraps(func)
  Line 43:         def wrapper(*args, **kwargs) -> Any:
  Line 44:             last_exception = None
  Line 45:             delay = initial_delay
  Line 47:             for attempt in range(max_retries + 1):
  Line 48:                 try:
  Line 49:                     return func(*args, **kwargs)
  Line 51:                 except exceptions as e:
  Line 52:                     last_exception = e
  Line 54:                     if attempt == max_retries:
  Line 55:                         logger.error(f"函数 {func.__name__} 在 {max_retries} 次重试后仍失败: {str(e)}")
  Line 56:                         raise
  Line 58:                     # 计算延迟
  Line 59:                     current_delay = min(delay, max_delay)
  Line 60:                     if jitter:
  Line 61:                         current_delay = current_delay * (0.5 + random.random())
  Line 63:                     logger.warning(
  Line 64:                         f"函数 {func.__name__} 第 {attempt + 1} 次尝试失败: {str(e)}, "
  Line 65:                         f"{current_delay:.1f}秒后重试..."
  Line 68:                     if on_retry:
  Line 69:                         on_retry(e, attempt + 1)
  Line 71:                     time.sleep(current_delay)
  Line 72:                     delay *= backoff_factor
  Line 74:             raise last_exception
  Line 76:         return wrapper
  Line 77:     return decorator
  Line 80: def retry_with_backoff_async(
  Line 81:     max_retries: int = 3,
  Line 82:     initial_delay: float = 1.0,
  Line 83:     max_delay: float = 30.0,
  Line 84:     backoff_factor: float = 2.0,
  Line 85:     jitter: bool = True,
  Line 86:     exceptions: Tuple[Type[Exception], ...] = (Exception,),
  Line 87:     on_retry: Optional[Callable[[Exception, int], None]] = None
  Line 88: ):
  Line 90:     异步版本的重试装饰器
  Line 92:     import asyncio
  Line 94:     def decorator(func: Callable) -> Callable:
  Line 95:         @functools.wraps(func)
  Line 96:         async def wrapper(*args, **kwargs) -> Any:
  Line 97:             last_exception = None
  Line 98:             delay = initial_delay
  Line 100:             for attempt in range(max_retries + 1):
  Line 101:                 try:
  Line 102:                     return await func(*args, **kwargs)
  Line 104:                 except exceptions as e:
  Line 105:                     last_exception = e
  Line 107:                     if attempt == max_retries:
  Line 108:                         logger.error(f"异步函数 {func.__name__} 在 {max_retries} 次重试后仍失败: {str(e)}")
  Line 109:                         raise
  Line 111:                     current_delay = min(delay, max_delay)
  Line 112:                     if jitter:
  Line 113:                         current_delay = current_delay * (0.5 + random.random())
  Line 115:                     logger.warning(
  Line 116:                         f"异步函数 {func.__name__} 第 {attempt + 1} 次尝试失败: {str(e)}, "
  Line 117:                         f"{current_delay:.1f}秒后重试..."
  Line 120:                     if on_retry:
  Line 121:                         on_retry(e, attempt + 1)
  Line 123:                     await asyncio.sleep(current_delay)
  Line 124:                     delay *= backoff_factor
  Line 126:             raise last_exception
  Line 128:         return wrapper
  Line 129:     return decorator
  Line 132: class RetryableAPIClient:
  Line 134:     可重试的API客户端封装
  Line 137:     def __init__(
  Line 138:         self,
  Line 139:         max_retries: int = 3,
  Line 140:         initial_delay: float = 1.0,
  Line 141:         max_delay: float = 30.0,
  Line 142:         backoff_factor: float = 2.0
  Line 143:     ):
  Line 144:         self.max_retries = max_retries
  Line 145:         self.initial_delay = initial_delay
  Line 146:         self.max_delay = max_delay
  Line 147:         self.backoff_factor = backoff_factor
  Line 149:     def call_with_retry(
  Line 150:         self,
  Line 151:         func: Callable,
  Line 152:         *args,
  Line 153:         exceptions: Tuple[Type[Exception], ...] = (Exception,),
  Line 154:         **kwargs
  Line 155:     ) -> Any:
  Line 157:         执行函数调用并在失败时重试
  Line 159:         Args:
  Line 160:             func: 要调用的函数
  Line 161:             *args: 函数参数
  Line 162:             exceptions: 需要重试的异常类型
  Line 163:             **kwargs: 函数关键字参数
  Line 165:         Returns:
  Line 166:             函数返回值
  Line 168:         last_exception = None
  Line 169:         delay = self.initial_delay
  Line 171:         for attempt in range(self.max_retries + 1):
  Line 172:             try:
  Line 173:                 return func(*args, **kwargs)
  Line 175:             except exceptions as e:
  Line 176:                 last_exception = e
  Line 178:                 if attempt == self.max_retries:
  Line 179:                     logger.error(f"API调用在 {self.max_retries} 次重试后仍失败: {str(e)}")
  Line 180:                     raise
  Line 182:                 current_delay = min(delay, self.max_delay)
  Line 183:                 current_delay = current_delay * (0.5 + random.random())
  Line 185:                 logger.warning(
  Line 186:                     f"API调用第 {attempt + 1} 次尝试失败: {str(e)}, "
  Line 187:                     f"{current_delay:.1f}秒后重试..."
  Line 190:                 time.sleep(current_delay)
  Line 191:                 delay *= self.backoff_factor
  Line 193:         raise last_exception
  Line 195:     def call_batch_with_retry(
  Line 196:         self,
  Line 197:         items: list,
  Line 198:         process_func: Callable,
  Line 199:         exceptions: Tuple[Type[Exception], ...] = (Exception,),
  Line 200:         continue_on_failure: bool = True
  Line 201:     ) -> Tuple[list, list]:
  Line 203:         批量调用并对每个失败项单独重试
  Line 205:         Args:
  Line 206:             items: 要处理的项目列表
  Line 207:             process_func: 处理函数，接收单个item作为参数
  Line 208:             exceptions: 需要重试的异常类型
  Line 209:             continue_on_failure: 单项失败后是否继续处理其他项
  Line 211:         Returns:
  Line 212:             (成功结果列表, 失败项列表)
  Line 214:         results = []
  Line 215:         failures = []
  Line 217:         for idx, item in enumerate(items):
  Line 218:             try:
  Line 219:                 result = self.call_with_retry(
  Line 220:                     process_func,
  Line 221:                     item,
  Line 222:                     exceptions=exceptions
  Line 224:                 results.append(result)
  Line 226:             except Exception as e:
  Line 227:                 logger.error(f"处理第 {idx + 1} 项失败: {str(e)}")
  Line 228:                 failures.append({
  Line 229:                     "index": idx,
  Line 230:                     "item": item,
  Line 231:                     "error": str(e)
  Line 232:                 })
  Line 234:                 if not continue_on_failure:
  Line 235:                     raise
  Line 237:         return results, failures

FILE: backend/app/utils/zep_paging.py
Lines with Chinese text: 113
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Line 1: """Zep Graph 分页读取工具。
  Line 3: Zep 的 node/edge 列表接口使用 UUID cursor 分页，
  Line 4: 本模块封装自动翻页逻辑（含单页重试），对调用方透明地返回完整列表。
  Line 7: from __future__ import annotations
  Line 9: import time
  Line 10: from collections.abc import Callable
  Line 11: from typing import Any
  Line 13: from zep_cloud import InternalServerError
  Line 14: from zep_cloud.client import Zep
  Line 16: from .logger import get_logger
  Line 18: logger = get_logger('hermes.zep_paging')
  Line 20: _DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 100
  Line 21: _MAX_NODES = 2000
  Line 22: _DEFAULT_MAX_RETRIES = 3
  Line 23: _DEFAULT_RETRY_DELAY = 2.0  # seconds, doubles each retry
  Line 26: def _fetch_page_with_retry(
  Line 27:     api_call: Callable[..., list[Any]],
  Line 28:     *args: Any,
  Line 29:     max_retries: int = _DEFAULT_MAX_RETRIES,
  Line 30:     retry_delay: float = _DEFAULT_RETRY_DELAY,
  Line 31:     page_description: str = "page",
  Line 32:     **kwargs: Any,
  Line 33: ) -> list[Any]:
  Line 34:     """单页请求，失败时指数退避重试。仅重试网络/IO类瞬态错误。"""
  Line 35:     if max_retries < 1:
  Line 36:         raise ValueError("max_retries must be >= 1")
  Line 38:     last_exception: Exception | None = None
  Line 39:     delay = retry_delay
  Line 41:     for attempt in range(max_retries):
  Line 42:         try:
  Line 43:             return api_call(*args, **kwargs)
  Line 44:         except (ConnectionError, TimeoutError, OSError, InternalServerError) as e:
  Line 45:             last_exception = e
  Line 46:             if attempt < max_retries - 1:
  Line 47:                 logger.warning(
  Line 48:                     f"Zep {page_description} attempt {attempt + 1} failed: {str(e)[:100]}, retrying in {delay:.1f}s..."
  Line 50:                 time.sleep(delay)
  Line 51:                 delay *= 2
  Line 52:             else:
  Line 53:                 logger.error(f"Zep {page_description} failed after {max_retries} attempts: {str(e)}")
  Line 55:     assert last_exception is not None
  Line 56:     raise last_exception
  Line 59: def fetch_all_nodes(
  Line 60:     client: Zep,
  Line 61:     graph_id: str,
  Line 62:     page_size: int = _DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE,
  Line 63:     max_items: int = _MAX_NODES,
  Line 64:     max_retries: int = _DEFAULT_MAX_RETRIES,
  Line 65:     retry_delay: float = _DEFAULT_RETRY_DELAY,
  Line 66: ) -> list[Any]:
  Line 67:     """分页获取图谱节点，最多返回 max_items 条（默认 2000）。每页请求自带重试。"""
  Line 68:     all_nodes: list[Any] = []
  Line 69:     cursor: str | None = None
  Line 70:     page_num = 0
  Line 72:     while True:
  Line 73:         kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {"limit": page_size}
  Line 74:         if cursor is not None:
  Line 75:             kwargs["uuid_cursor"] = cursor
  Line 77:         page_num += 1
  Line 78:         batch = _fetch_page_with_retry(
  Line 79:             client.graph.node.get_by_graph_id,
  Line 80:             graph_id,
  Line 81:             max_retries=max_retries,
  Line 82:             retry_delay=retry_delay,
  Line 83:             page_description=f"fetch nodes page {page_num} (graph={graph_id})",
  Line 84:             **kwargs,
  Line 86:         if not batch:
  Line 87:             break
  Line 89:         all_nodes.extend(batch)
  Line 90:         if len(all_nodes) >= max_items:
  Line 91:             all_nodes = all_nodes[:max_items]
  Line 92:             logger.warning(f"Node count reached limit ({max_items}), stopping pagination for graph {graph_id}")
  Line 93:             break
  Line 94:         if len(batch) < page_size:
  Line 95:             break
  Line 97:         cursor = getattr(batch[-1], "uuid_", None) or getattr(batch[-1], "uuid", None)
  Line 98:         if cursor is None:
  Line 99:             logger.warning(f"Node missing uuid field, stopping pagination at {len(all_nodes)} nodes")
  Line 100:             break
  Line 102:     return all_nodes
  Line 105: def fetch_all_edges(
  Line 106:     client: Zep,
  Line 107:     graph_id: str,
  Line 108:     page_size: int = _DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE,
  Line 109:     max_retries: int = _DEFAULT_MAX_RETRIES,
  Line 110:     retry_delay: float = _DEFAULT_RETRY_DELAY,
  Line 111: ) -> list[Any]:
  Line 112:     """分页获取图谱所有边，返回完整列表。每页请求自带重试。"""
  Line 113:     all_edges: list[Any] = []
  Line 114:     cursor: str | None = None
  Line 115:     page_num = 0
  Line 117:     while True:
  Line 118:         kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {"limit": page_size}
  Line 119:         if cursor is not None:
  Line 120:             kwargs["uuid_cursor"] = cursor
  Line 122:         page_num += 1
  Line 123:         batch = _fetch_page_with_retry(
  Line 124:             client.graph.edge.get_by_graph_id,
  Line 125:             graph_id,
  Line 126:             max_retries=max_retries,
  Line 127:             retry_delay=retry_delay,
  Line 128:             page_description=f"fetch edges page {page_num} (graph={graph_id})",
  Line 129:             **kwargs,
  Line 131:         if not batch:
  Line 132:             break
  Line 134:         all_edges.extend(batch)
  Line 135:         if len(batch) < page_size:
  Line 136:             break
  Line 138:         cursor = getattr(batch[-1], "uuid_", None) or getattr(batch[-1], "uuid", None)
  Line 139:         if cursor is None:
  Line 140:             logger.warning(f"Edge missing uuid field, stopping pagination at {len(all_edges)} edges")
  Line 141:             break
  Line 143:     return all_edges

Lines with Chinese text: 1342
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Line 2: OASIS 双平台并行模拟预设脚本
  Line 3: 同时运行Twitter和Reddit模拟，读取相同的配置文件
  Line 5: 功能特性:
  Line 6: - 双平台（Twitter + Reddit）并行模拟
  Line 7: - 完成模拟后不立即关闭环境，进入等待命令模式
  Line 8: - 支持通过IPC接收Interview命令
  Line 9: - 支持单个Agent采访和批量采访
  Line 10: - 支持远程关闭环境命令
  Line 12: 使用方式:
  Line 13:     python run_parallel_simulation.py --config simulation_config.json
  Line 14:     python run_parallel_simulation.py --config simulation_config.json --no-wait  # 完成后立即关闭
  Line 15:     python run_parallel_simulation.py --config simulation_config.json --twitter-only
  Line 16:     python run_parallel_simulation.py --config simulation_config.json --reddit-only
  Line 18: 日志结构:
  Line 19:     sim_xxx/
  Line 20:     ├── twitter/
  Line 21:     │   └── actions.jsonl    # Twitter 平台动作日志
  Line 22:     ├── reddit/
  Line 23:     │   └── actions.jsonl    # Reddit 平台动作日志
  Line 24:     ├── simulation.log       # 主模拟进程日志
  Line 25:     └── run_state.json       # 运行状态（API 查询用）
  Line 28: # ============================================================
  Line 29: # 解决 Windows 编码问题：在所有 import 之前设置 UTF-8 编码
  Line 30: # 这是为了修复 OASIS 第三方库读取文件时未指定编码的问题
  Line 31: # ============================================================
  Line 32: import sys
  Line 33: import os
  Line 35: if sys.platform == 'win32':
  Line 36:     # 设置 Python 默认 I/O 编码为 UTF-8
  Line 37:     # 这会影响所有未指定编码的 open() 调用
  Line 38:     os.environ.setdefault('PYTHONUTF8', '1')
  Line 39:     os.environ.setdefault('PYTHONIOENCODING', 'utf-8')
  Line 41:     # 重新配置标准输出流为 UTF-8（解决控制台中文乱码）
  Line 42:     if hasattr(sys.stdout, 'reconfigure'):
  Line 43:         sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
  Line 44:     if hasattr(sys.stderr, 'reconfigure'):
  Line 45:         sys.stderr.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
  Line 47:     # 强制设置默认编码（影响 open() 函数的默认编码）
  Line 48:     # 注意：这需要在 Python 启动时就设置，运行时设置可能不生效
  Line 49:     # 所以我们还需要 monkey-patch 内置的 open 函数
  Line 50:     import builtins
  Line 51:     _original_open = builtins.open
  Line 53:     def _utf8_open(file, mode='r', buffering=-1, encoding=None, errors=None,
  Line 54:                    newline=None, closefd=True, opener=None):
  Line 56:         包装 open() 函数，对于文本模式默认使用 UTF-8 编码
  Line 57:         这可以修复第三方库（如 OASIS）读取文件时未指定编码的问题
  Line 59:         # 只对文本模式（非二进制）且未指定编码的情况设置默认编码
  Line 60:         if encoding is None and 'b' not in mode:
  Line 61:             encoding = 'utf-8'
  Line 62:         return _original_open(file, mode, buffering, encoding, errors,
  Line 63:                               newline, closefd, opener)
  Line 65:     builtins.open = _utf8_open
  Line 67: import argparse
  Line 68: import asyncio
  Line 69: import json
  Line 70: import logging
  Line 71: import multiprocessing
  Line 72: import random
  Line 73: import signal
  Line 74: import sqlite3
  Line 75: import warnings
  Line 76: from datetime import datetime
  Line 77: from typing import Dict, Any, List, Optional, Tuple

  Line 106: class MaxTokensWarningFilter(logging.Filter):
  Line 107:     """过滤掉 camel-ai 关于 max_tokens 的警告（我们故意不设置 max_tokens，让模型自行决定）"""
  Line 109:     def filter(self, record):
  Line 110:         # 过滤掉包含 max_tokens 警告的日志
  Line 111:         if "max_tokens" in record.getMessage() and "Invalid or missing" in record.getMessage():
  Line 112:             return False
  Line 113:         return True
  Line 116: # 在模块加载时立即添加过滤器，确保在 camel 代码执行前生效
  Line 117: logging.getLogger().addFilter(MaxTokensWarningFilter())
  Line 120: def disable_oasis_logging():
  Line 122:     禁用 OASIS 库的详细日志输出
  Line 123:     OASIS 的日志太冗余（记录每个 agent 的观察和动作），我们使用自己的 action_logger
  Line 125:     # 禁用 OASIS 的所有日志器
  Line 126:     oasis_loggers = [
  Line 127:         "social.agent",
  Line 128:         "social.twitter",
  Line 129:         "social.rec",
  Line 130:         "oasis.env",

  Line 256:     def poll_command(self) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
  Line 257:         """轮询获取待处理命令"""
  Line 258:         if not os.path.exists(self.commands_dir):
  Line 259:             return None
  Line 261:         # 获取命令文件（按时间排序）
  Line 262:         command_files = []
  Line 263:         for filename in os.listdir(self.commands_dir):
  Line 264:             if filename.endswith('.json'):
  Line 265:                 filepath = os.path.join(self.commands_dir, filename)
  Line 266:                 command_files.append((filepath, os.path.getmtime(filepath)))
  Line 268:         command_files.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
  Line 270:         for filepath, _ in command_files:
  Line 271:             try:
  Line 272:                 with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  Line 273:                     return json.load(f)
  Line 274:             except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
  Line 275:                 continue
  Line 277:         return None
  Line 279:     def send_response(self, command_id: str, status: str, result: Dict = None, error: str = None):
  Line 280:         """发送响应"""
  Line 281:         response = {
  Line 282:             "command_id": command_id,
  Line 283:             "status": status,
  Line 284:             "result": result,
  Line 285:             "error": error,
  Line 286:             "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat()
  Line 287:         }
  Line 289:         response_file = os.path.join(self.responses_dir, f"{command_id}.json")
  Line 290:         with open(response_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  Line 291:             json.dump(response, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
  Line 293:         # 删除命令文件
  Line 294:         command_file = os.path.join(self.commands_dir, f"{command_id}.json")
  Line 295:         try:
  Line 296:             os.remove(command_file)
  Line 297:         except OSError:
  Line 298:             pass
  Line 300:     def _get_env_and_graph(self, platform: str):
  Line 302:         获取指定平台的环境和agent_graph
  Line 304:         Args:
  Line 305:             platform: 平台名称 ("twitter" 或 "reddit")
  Line 307:         Returns:
  Line 308:             (env, agent_graph, platform_name) 或 (None, None, None)
  Line 310:         if platform == "twitter" and self.twitter_env:
  Line 311:             return self.twitter_env, self.twitter_agent_graph, "twitter"
  Line 312:         elif platform == "reddit" and self.reddit_env:
  Line 313:             return self.reddit_env, self.reddit_agent_graph, "reddit"
  Line 314:         else:
  Line 315:             return None, None, None
  Line 317:     async def _interview_single_platform(self, agent_id: int, prompt: str, platform: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  Line 319:         在单个平台上执行Interview
  Line 321:         Returns:
  Line 322:             包含结果的字典，或包含error的字典
  Line 324:         env, agent_graph, actual_platform = self._get_env_and_graph(platform)
  Line 326:         if not env or not agent_graph:
  Line 327:             return {"platform": platform, "error": f"{platform}平台不可用"}
  Line 329:         try:
  Line 330:             agent = agent_graph.get_agent(agent_id)
  Line 331:             interview_action = ManualAction(
  Line 332:                 action_type=ActionType.INTERVIEW,
  Line 333:                 action_args={"prompt": prompt}
  Line 335:             actions = {agent: interview_action}
  Line 336:             await env.step(actions)
  Line 338:             result = self._get_interview_result(agent_id, actual_platform)
  Line 339:             result["platform"] = actual_platform
  Line 340:             return result
  Line 342:         except Exception as e:
  Line 343:             return {"platform": platform, "error": str(e)}
  Line 345:     async def handle_interview(self, command_id: str, agent_id: int, prompt: str, platform: str = None) -> bool:
  Line 347:         处理单个Agent采访命令
  Line 349:         Args:
  Line 350:             command_id: 命令ID
  Line 351:             agent_id: Agent ID
  Line 352:             prompt: 采访问题
  Line 353:             platform: 指定平台（可选）
  Line 354:                 - "twitter": 只采访Twitter平台
  Line 355:                 - "reddit": 只采访Reddit平台
  Line 356:                 - None/不指定: 同时采访两个平台，返回整合结果
  Line 358:         Returns:
  Line 359:             True 表示成功，False 表示失败
  Line 361:         # 如果指定了平台，只采访该平台
  Line 362:         if platform in ("twitter", "reddit"):
  Line 363:             result = await self._interview_single_platform(agent_id, prompt, platform)
  Line 365:             if "error" in result:
  Line 366:                 self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error=result["error"])
  Line 367:                 print(f"  Interview失败: agent_id={agent_id}, platform={platform}, error={result['error']}")
  Line 368:                 return False
  Line 369:             else:
  Line 370:                 self.send_response(command_id, "completed", result=result)
  Line 371:                 print(f"  Interview完成: agent_id={agent_id}, platform={platform}")
  Line 372:                 return True
  Line 374:         # 未指定平台：同时采访两个平台
  Line 375:         if not self.twitter_env and not self.reddit_env:
  Line 376:             self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error="没有可用的模拟环境")
  Line 377:             return False
  Line 379:         results = {
  Line 380:             "agent_id": agent_id,
  Line 381:             "prompt": prompt,
  Line 382:             "platforms": {}
  Line 383:         }
  Line 384:         success_count = 0
  Line 386:         # 并行采访两个平台
  Line 387:         tasks = []
  Line 388:         platforms_to_interview = []
  Line 390:         if self.twitter_env:
  Line 391:             tasks.append(self._interview_single_platform(agent_id, prompt, "twitter"))
  Line 392:             platforms_to_interview.append("twitter")
  Line 394:         if self.reddit_env:
  Line 395:             tasks.append(self._interview_single_platform(agent_id, prompt, "reddit"))
  Line 396:             platforms_to_interview.append("reddit")
  Line 398:         # 并行执行
  Line 399:         platform_results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
  Line 401:         for platform_name, platform_result in zip(platforms_to_interview, platform_results):
  Line 402:             results["platforms"][platform_name] = platform_result
  Line 403:             if "error" not in platform_result:
  Line 404:                 success_count += 1
  Line 406:         if success_count > 0:
  Line 407:             self.send_response(command_id, "completed", result=results)
  Line 408:             print(f"  Interview完成: agent_id={agent_id}, 成功平台数={success_count}/{len(platforms_to_interview)}")
  Line 409:             return True
  Line 410:         else:
  Line 411:             errors = [f"{p}: {r.get('error', '未知错误')}" for p, r in results["platforms"].items()]
  Line 412:             self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error="; ".join(errors))
  Line 413:             print(f"  Interview失败: agent_id={agent_id}, 所有平台都失败")
  Line 414:             return False
  Line 416:     async def handle_batch_interview(self, command_id: str, interviews: List[Dict], platform: str = None) -> bool:
  Line 418:         处理批量采访命令
  Line 420:         Args:
  Line 421:             command_id: 命令ID
  Line 422:             interviews: [{"agent_id": int, "prompt": str, "platform": str(optional)}, ...]
  Line 423:             platform: 默认平台（可被每个interview项覆盖）
  Line 424:                 - "twitter": 只采访Twitter平台
  Line 425:                 - "reddit": 只采访Reddit平台
  Line 426:                 - None/不指定: 每个Agent同时采访两个平台
  Line 428:         # 按平台分组
  Line 429:         twitter_interviews = []
  Line 430:         reddit_interviews = []
  Line 431:         both_platforms_interviews = []  # 需要同时采访两个平台的
  Line 433:         for interview in interviews:
  Line 434:             item_platform = interview.get("platform", platform)
  Line 435:             if item_platform == "twitter":
  Line 436:                 twitter_interviews.append(interview)
  Line 437:             elif item_platform == "reddit":
  Line 438:                 reddit_interviews.append(interview)
  Line 439:             else:
  Line 440:                 # 未指定平台：两个平台都采访
  Line 441:                 both_platforms_interviews.append(interview)
  Line 443:         # 把 both_platforms_interviews 拆分到两个平台
  Line 444:         if both_platforms_interviews:
  Line 445:             if self.twitter_env:
  Line 446:                 twitter_interviews.extend(both_platforms_interviews)
  Line 447:             if self.reddit_env:
  Line 448:                 reddit_interviews.extend(both_platforms_interviews)
  Line 450:         results = {}
  Line 452:         # 处理Twitter平台的采访
  Line 453:         if twitter_interviews and self.twitter_env:
  Line 454:             try:
  Line 455:                 twitter_actions = {}
  Line 456:                 for interview in twitter_interviews:
  Line 457:                     agent_id = interview.get("agent_id")
  Line 458:                     prompt = interview.get("prompt", "")
  Line 459:                     try:
  Line 460:                         agent = self.twitter_agent_graph.get_agent(agent_id)
  Line 461:                         twitter_actions[agent] = ManualAction(
  Line 462:                             action_type=ActionType.INTERVIEW,
  Line 463:                             action_args={"prompt": prompt}
  Line 465:                     except Exception as e:
  Line 466:                         print(f"  警告: 无法获取Twitter Agent {agent_id}: {e}")
  Line 468:                 if twitter_actions:
  Line 469:                     await self.twitter_env.step(twitter_actions)
  Line 471:                     for interview in twitter_interviews:
  Line 472:                         agent_id = interview.get("agent_id")
  Line 473:                         result = self._get_interview_result(agent_id, "twitter")
  Line 474:                         result["platform"] = "twitter"
  Line 475:                         results[f"twitter_{agent_id}"] = result
  Line 476:             except Exception as e:
  Line 477:                 print(f"  Twitter批量Interview失败: {e}")
  Line 479:         # 处理Reddit平台的采访
  Line 480:         if reddit_interviews and self.reddit_env:
  Line 481:             try:
  Line 482:                 reddit_actions = {}
  Line 483:                 for interview in reddit_interviews:
  Line 484:                     agent_id = interview.get("agent_id")
  Line 485:                     prompt = interview.get("prompt", "")
  Line 486:                     try:
  Line 487:                         agent = self.reddit_agent_graph.get_agent(agent_id)
  Line 488:                         reddit_actions[agent] = ManualAction(
  Line 489:                             action_type=ActionType.INTERVIEW,
  Line 490:                             action_args={"prompt": prompt}
  Line 492:                     except Exception as e:
  Line 493:                         print(f"  警告: 无法获取Reddit Agent {agent_id}: {e}")
  Line 495:                 if reddit_actions:
  Line 496:                     await self.reddit_env.step(reddit_actions)
  Line 498:                     for interview in reddit_interviews:
  Line 499:                         agent_id = interview.get("agent_id")
  Line 500:                         result = self._get_interview_result(agent_id, "reddit")
  Line 501:                         result["platform"] = "reddit"
  Line 502:                         results[f"reddit_{agent_id}"] = result
  Line 503:             except Exception as e:
  Line 504:                 print(f"  Reddit批量Interview失败: {e}")
  Line 506:         if results:
  Line 507:             self.send_response(command_id, "completed", result={
  Line 508:                 "interviews_count": len(results),
  Line 509:                 "results": results
  Line 510:             })
  Line 511:             print(f"  批量Interview完成: {len(results)} 个Agent")
  Line 512:             return True
  Line 513:         else:
  Line 514:             self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error="没有成功的采访")
  Line 515:             return False
  Line 517:     def _get_interview_result(self, agent_id: int, platform: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  Line 518:         """从数据库获取最新的Interview结果"""
  Line 519:         db_path = os.path.join(self.simulation_dir, f"{platform}_simulation.db")
  Line 521:         result = {
  Line 522:             "agent_id": agent_id,
  Line 523:             "response": None,
  Line 524:             "timestamp": None
  Line 525:         }
  Line 527:         if not os.path.exists(db_path):
  Line 528:             return result
  Line 530:         try:
  Line 531:             conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
  Line 532:             cursor = conn.cursor()
  Line 534:             # 查询最新的Interview记录
  Line 535:             cursor.execute("""
  Line 536:                 SELECT user_id, info, created_at
  Line 537:                 FROM trace
  Line 538:                 WHERE action = ? AND user_id = ?
  Line 539:                 ORDER BY created_at DESC
  Line 540:                 LIMIT 1
  Line 541:             """, (ActionType.INTERVIEW.value, agent_id))
  Line 543:             row = cursor.fetchone()
  Line 544:             if row:
  Line 545:                 user_id, info_json, created_at = row
  Line 546:                 try:
  Line 547:                     info = json.loads(info_json) if info_json else {}
  Line 548:                     result["response"] = info.get("response", info)
  Line 549:                     result["timestamp"] = created_at
  Line 550:                 except json.JSONDecodeError:
  Line 551:                     result["response"] = info_json
  Line 553:             conn.close()
  Line 555:         except Exception as e:
  Line 556:             print(f"  读取Interview结果失败: {e}")
  Line 558:         return result
  Line 560:     async def process_commands(self) -> bool:
  Line 562:         处理所有待处理命令
  Line 564:         Returns:
  Line 565:             True 表示继续运行，False 表示应该退出
  Line 567:         command = self.poll_command()
  Line 568:         if not command:

  Line 571:         command_id = command.get("command_id")
  Line 572:         command_type = command.get("command_type")
  Line 573:         args = command.get("args", {})
  Line 575:         print(f"\n收到IPC命令: {command_type}, id={command_id}")
  Line 577:         if command_type == CommandType.INTERVIEW:
  Line 578:             await self.handle_interview(
  Line 579:                 command_id,
  Line 580:                 args.get("agent_id", 0),
  Line 581:                 args.get("prompt", ""),
  Line 582:                 args.get("platform")
  Line 584:             return True
  Line 586:         elif command_type == CommandType.BATCH_INTERVIEW:
  Line 587:             await self.handle_batch_interview(
  Line 588:                 command_id,
  Line 589:                 args.get("interviews", []),
  Line 590:                 args.get("platform")
  Line 592:             return True
  Line 594:         elif command_type == CommandType.CLOSE_ENV:
  Line 595:             print("收到关闭环境命令")
  Line 596:             self.send_response(command_id, "completed", result={"message": "环境即将关闭"})
  Line 597:             return False
  Line 599:         else:
  Line 600:             self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error=f"未知命令类型: {command_type}")
  Line 601:             return True
  Line 604: def load_config(config_path: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  Line 605:     """加载配置文件"""
  Line 606:     with open(config_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  Line 607:         return json.load(f)
  Line 610: # 需要过滤掉的非核心动作类型（这些动作对分析价值较低）
  Line 611: FILTERED_ACTIONS = {'refresh', 'sign_up'}
  Line 613: # 动作类型映射表（数据库中的名称 -> 标准名称）
  Line 614: ACTION_TYPE_MAP = {
  Line 615:     'create_post': 'CREATE_POST',
  Line 616:     'like_post': 'LIKE_POST',
  Line 617:     'dislike_post': 'DISLIKE_POST',
  Line 618:     'repost': 'REPOST',
  Line 619:     'quote_post': 'QUOTE_POST',

  Line 633: def get_agent_names_from_config(config: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[int, str]:
  Line 635:     从 simulation_config 中获取 agent_id -> entity_name 的映射
  Line 637:     这样可以在 actions.jsonl 中显示真实的实体名称，而不是 "Agent_0" 这样的代号
  Line 639:     Args:
  Line 640:         config: simulation_config.json 的内容
  Line 642:     Returns:
  Line 643:         agent_id -> entity_name 的映射字典
  Line 645:     agent_names = {}
  Line 646:     agent_configs = config.get("agent_configs", [])
  Line 648:     for agent_config in agent_configs:
  Line 649:         agent_id = agent_config.get("agent_id")
  Line 650:         entity_name = agent_config.get("entity_name", f"Agent_{agent_id}")
  Line 651:         if agent_id is not None:
  Line 652:             agent_names[agent_id] = entity_name
  Line 654:     return agent_names
  Line 657: def fetch_new_actions_from_db(
  Line 658:     db_path: str,
  Line 659:     last_rowid: int,
  Line 660:     agent_names: Dict[int, str]
  Line 661: ) -> Tuple[List[Dict[str, Any]], int]:
  Line 663:     从数据库中获取新的动作记录，并补充完整的上下文信息
  Line 665:     Args:
  Line 666:         db_path: 数据库文件路径
  Line 667:         last_rowid: 上次读取的最大 rowid 值（使用 rowid 而不是 created_at，因为不同平台的 created_at 格式不同）
  Line 668:         agent_names: agent_id -> agent_name 映射
  Line 670:     Returns:
  Line 671:         (actions_list, new_last_rowid)
  Line 672:         - actions_list: 动作列表，每个元素包含 agent_id, agent_name, action_type, action_args（含上下文信息）
  Line 673:         - new_last_rowid: 新的最大 rowid 值
  Line 675:     actions = []
  Line 676:     new_last_rowid = last_rowid
  Line 678:     if not os.path.exists(db_path):
  Line 679:         return actions, new_last_rowid
  Line 681:     try:
  Line 682:         conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
  Line 683:         cursor = conn.cursor()
  Line 685:         # 使用 rowid 来追踪已处理的记录（rowid 是 SQLite 的内置自增字段）
  Line 686:         # 这样可以避免 created_at 格式差异问题（Twitter 用整数，Reddit 用日期时间字符串）
  Line 687:         cursor.execute("""
  Line 688:             SELECT rowid, user_id, action, info
  Line 689:             FROM trace
  Line 690:             WHERE rowid > ?
  Line 691:             ORDER BY rowid ASC
  Line 692:         """, (last_rowid,))
  Line 694:         for rowid, user_id, action, info_json in cursor.fetchall():
  Line 695:             # 更新最大 rowid
  Line 696:             new_last_rowid = rowid
  Line 698:             # 过滤非核心动作
  Line 699:             if action in FILTERED_ACTIONS:
  Line 700:                 continue
  Line 702:             # 解析动作参数
  Line 703:             try:
  Line 704:                 action_args = json.loads(info_json) if info_json else {}
  Line 705:             except json.JSONDecodeError:
  Line 706:                 action_args = {}
  Line 708:             # 精简 action_args，只保留关键字段（保留完整内容，不截断）
  Line 709:             simplified_args = {}
  Line 710:             if 'content' in action_args:
  Line 711:                 simplified_args['content'] = action_args['content']
  Line 712:             if 'post_id' in action_args:
  Line 713:                 simplified_args['post_id'] = action_args['post_id']
  Line 714:             if 'comment_id' in action_args:
  Line 715:                 simplified_args['comment_id'] = action_args['comment_id']
  Line 716:             if 'quoted_id' in action_args:
  Line 717:                 simplified_args['quoted_id'] = action_args['quoted_id']

  Line 719:                 simplified_args['new_post_id'] = action_args['new_post_id']
  Line 720:             if 'follow_id' in action_args:
  Line 721:                 simplified_args['follow_id'] = action_args['follow_id']

  Line 723:                 simplified_args['query'] = action_args['query']

  Line 725:                 simplified_args['like_id'] = action_args['like_id']
  Line 726:             if 'dislike_id' in action_args:
  Line 727:                 simplified_args['dislike_id'] = action_args['dislike_id']
  Line 729:             # 转换动作类型名称
  Line 730:             action_type = ACTION_TYPE_MAP.get(action, action.upper())
  Line 732:             # 补充上下文信息（帖子内容、用户名等）
  Line 733:             _enrich_action_context(cursor, action_type, simplified_args, agent_names)
  Line 735:             actions.append({
  Line 736:                 'agent_id': user_id,
  Line 737:                 'agent_name': agent_names.get(user_id, f'Agent_{user_id}'),
  Line 738:                 'action_type': action_type,
  Line 739:                 'action_args': simplified_args,
  Line 740:             })
  Line 742:         conn.close()
  Line 743:     except Exception as e:
  Line 744:         print(f"读取数据库动作失败: {e}")
  Line 746:     return actions, new_last_rowid
  Line 749: def _enrich_action_context(
  Line 750:     cursor,
  Line 751:     action_type: str,
  Line 752:     action_args: Dict[str, Any],
  Line 753:     agent_names: Dict[int, str]
  Line 754: ) -> None:
  Line 756:     为动作补充上下文信息（帖子内容、用户名等）
  Line 758:     Args:
  Line 759:         cursor: 数据库游标
  Line 760:         action_type: 动作类型
  Line 761:         action_args: 动作参数（会被修改）
  Line 762:         agent_names: agent_id -> agent_name 映射
  Line 764:     try:
  Line 765:         # 点赞/踩帖子：补充帖子内容和作者
  Line 766:         if action_type in ('LIKE_POST', 'DISLIKE_POST'):
  Line 767:             post_id = action_args.get('post_id')
  Line 768:             if post_id:
  Line 769:                 post_info = _get_post_info(cursor, post_id, agent_names)
  Line 770:                 if post_info:
  Line 771:                     action_args['post_content'] = post_info.get('content', '')
  Line 772:                     action_args['post_author_name'] = post_info.get('author_name', '')
  Line 774:         # 转发帖子：补充原帖内容和作者
  Line 775:         elif action_type == 'REPOST':
  Line 776:             new_post_id = action_args.get('new_post_id')
  Line 777:             if new_post_id:
  Line 778:                 # 转发帖子的 original_post_id 指向原帖
  Line 779:                 cursor.execute("""
  Line 780:                     SELECT original_post_id FROM post WHERE post_id = ?
  Line 781:                 """, (new_post_id,))
  Line 782:                 row = cursor.fetchone()
  Line 783:                 if row and row[0]:
  Line 784:                     original_post_id = row[0]
  Line 785:                     original_info = _get_post_info(cursor, original_post_id, agent_names)
  Line 786:                     if original_info:
  Line 787:                         action_args['original_content'] = original_info.get('content', '')
  Line 788:                         action_args['original_author_name'] = original_info.get('author_name', '')
  Line 790:         # 引用帖子：补充原帖内容、作者和引用评论
  Line 791:         elif action_type == 'QUOTE_POST':
  Line 792:             quoted_id = action_args.get('quoted_id')
  Line 793:             new_post_id = action_args.get('new_post_id')
  Line 795:             if quoted_id:
  Line 796:                 original_info = _get_post_info(cursor, quoted_id, agent_names)
  Line 797:                 if original_info:
  Line 798:                     action_args['original_content'] = original_info.get('content', '')
  Line 799:                     action_args['original_author_name'] = original_info.get('author_name', '')
  Line 801:             # 获取引用帖子的评论内容（quote_content）
  Line 802:             if new_post_id:
  Line 803:                 cursor.execute("""
  Line 804:                     SELECT quote_content FROM post WHERE post_id = ?
  Line 805:                 """, (new_post_id,))
  Line 806:                 row = cursor.fetchone()
  Line 807:                 if row and row[0]:
  Line 808:                     action_args['quote_content'] = row[0]
  Line 810:         # 关注用户：补充被关注用户的名称
  Line 811:         elif action_type == 'FOLLOW':
  Line 812:             follow_id = action_args.get('follow_id')
  Line 813:             if follow_id:
  Line 814:                 # 从 follow 表获取 followee_id
  Line 815:                 cursor.execute("""
  Line 816:                     SELECT followee_id FROM follow WHERE follow_id = ?
  Line 817:                 """, (follow_id,))
  Line 818:                 row = cursor.fetchone()
  Line 819:                 if row:
  Line 820:                     followee_id = row[0]
  Line 821:                     target_name = _get_user_name(cursor, followee_id, agent_names)
  Line 822:                     if target_name:
  Line 823:                         action_args['target_user_name'] = target_name
  Line 825:         # 屏蔽用户：补充被屏蔽用户的名称
  Line 826:         elif action_type == 'MUTE':
  Line 827:             # 从 action_args 中获取 user_id 或 target_id

  Line 832:                     action_args['target_user_name'] = target_name
  Line 834:         # 点赞/踩评论：补充评论内容和作者

  Line 836:             comment_id = action_args.get('comment_id')

  Line 858:     cursor,
  Line 859:     post_id: int,

  Line 895:                     author_name = user_row[0] or user_row[1] or ''

  Line 984: def create_model(config: Dict[str, Any], use_boost: bool = False):
  Line 986:     创建LLM模型
  Line 988:     支持双 LLM 配置，用于并行模拟时提速：
  Line 989:     - 通用配置：LLM_API_KEY, LLM_BASE_URL, LLM_MODEL_NAME
  Line 990:     - 加速配置（可选）：LLM_BOOST_API_KEY, LLM_BOOST_BASE_URL, LLM_BOOST_MODEL_NAME
  Line 992:     如果配置了加速 LLM，并行模拟时可以让不同平台使用不同的 API 服务商，提高并发能力。
  Line 994:     Args:

  Line 996:         use_boost: 是否使用加速 LLM 配置（如果可用）
  Line 998:     # 检查是否有加速配置
  Line 999:     boost_api_key = os.environ.get("LLM_BOOST_API_KEY", "")
  Line 1000:     boost_base_url = os.environ.get("LLM_BOOST_BASE_URL", "")
  Line 1001:     boost_model = os.environ.get("LLM_BOOST_MODEL_NAME", "")
  Line 1002:     has_boost_config = bool(boost_api_key)
  Line 1004:     # 根据参数和配置情况选择使用哪个 LLM
  Line 1005:     if use_boost and has_boost_config:
  Line 1006:         # 使用加速配置
  Line 1007:         llm_api_key = boost_api_key
  Line 1008:         llm_base_url = boost_base_url
  Line 1009:         llm_model = boost_model or os.environ.get("LLM_MODEL_NAME", "")
  Line 1010:         config_label = "[加速LLM]"
  Line 1011:     else:
  Line 1012:         # 使用通用配置
  Line 1013:         llm_api_key = os.environ.get("LLM_API_KEY", "")
  Line 1014:         llm_base_url = os.environ.get("LLM_BASE_URL", "")
  Line 1015:         llm_model = os.environ.get("LLM_MODEL_NAME", "")
  Line 1016:         config_label = "[通用LLM]"
  Line 1018:     # 如果 .env 中没有模型名，则使用 config 作为备用
  Line 1019:     if not llm_model:
  Line 1020:         llm_model = config.get("llm_model", "gpt-4o-mini")
  Line 1022:     # 设置 camel-ai 所需的环境变量

  Line 1024:         os.environ["OPENAI_API_KEY"] = llm_api_key

  Line 1040: def get_active_agents_for_round(
  Line 1041:     env,
  Line 1042:     config: Dict[str, Any],
  Line 1043:     current_hour: int,
  Line 1044:     round_num: int
  Line 1045: ) -> List:

  Line 1050:     base_min = time_config.get("agents_per_hour_min", 5)
  Line 1051:     base_max = time_config.get("agents_per_hour_max", 20)
  Line 1053:     peak_hours = time_config.get("peak_hours", [9, 10, 11, 14, 15, 20, 21, 22])
  Line 1054:     off_peak_hours = time_config.get("off_peak_hours", [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5])
  Line 1056:     if current_hour in peak_hours:
  Line 1057:         multiplier = time_config.get("peak_activity_multiplier", 1.5)
  Line 1058:     elif current_hour in off_peak_hours:
  Line 1059:         multiplier = time_config.get("off_peak_activity_multiplier", 0.3)
  Line 1060:     else:
  Line 1061:         multiplier = 1.0
  Line 1063:     target_count = int(random.uniform(base_min, base_max) * multiplier)
  Line 1065:     candidates = []
  Line 1066:     for cfg in agent_configs:
  Line 1067:         agent_id = cfg.get("agent_id", 0)
  Line 1068:         active_hours = cfg.get("active_hours", list(range(8, 23)))
  Line 1069:         activity_level = cfg.get("activity_level", 0.5)
  Line 1071:         if current_hour not in active_hours:
  Line 1072:             continue
  Line 1074:         if random.random() < activity_level:
  Line 1075:             candidates.append(agent_id)
  Line 1077:     selected_ids = random.sample(
  Line 1078:         candidates,
  Line 1079:         min(target_count, len(candidates))
  Line 1080:     ) if candidates else []

  Line 1084:         try:

  Line 1086:             active_agents.append((agent_id, agent))
  Line 1087:         except Exception:
  Line 1088:             pass
  Line 1090:     return active_agents

  Line 1629:         except Exception as e:

  Line 1653: def setup_signal_handlers(loop=None):
  Line 1655:     设置信号处理器，确保收到 SIGTERM/SIGINT 时能够正确退出
  Line 1657:     持久化模拟场景：模拟完成后不退出，等待 interview 命令
  Line 1658:     当收到终止信号时，需要：
  Line 1659:     1. 通知 asyncio 循环退出等待
  Line 1660:     2. 让程序有机会正常清理资源（关闭数据库、环境等）
  Line 1661:     3. 然后才退出
  Line 1663:     def signal_handler(signum, frame):
  Line 1664:         global _cleanup_done
  Line 1665:         sig_name = "SIGTERM" if signum == signal.SIGTERM else "SIGINT"
  Line 1666:         print(f"\n收到 {sig_name} 信号，正在退出...")
  Line 1668:         if not _cleanup_done:
  Line 1669:             _cleanup_done = True
  Line 1670:             # 设置事件通知 asyncio 循环退出（让循环有机会清理资源）
  Line 1671:             if _shutdown_event:
  Line 1672:                 _shutdown_event.set()
  Line 1674:         # 不要直接 sys.exit()，让 asyncio 循环正常退出并清理资源
  Line 1675:         # 如果是重复收到信号，才强制退出
  Line 1676:         else:
  Line 1677:             print("强制退出...")
  Line 1678:             sys.exit(1)
  Line 1680:     signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, signal_handler)
  Line 1681:     signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)
  Line 1684: if __name__ == "__main__":
  Line 1685:     setup_signal_handlers()
  Line 1686:     try:
  Line 1687:         asyncio.run(main())
  Line 1688:     except KeyboardInterrupt:
  Line 1689:         print("\n程序被中断")
  Line 1690:     except SystemExit:
  Line 1691:         pass
  Line 1692:     finally:
  Line 1693:         # 清理 multiprocessing 资源跟踪器（防止退出时的警告）
  Line 1694:         try:
  Line 1695:             from multiprocessing import resource_tracker
  Line 1696:             resource_tracker._resource_tracker._stop()
  Line 1697:         except Exception:
  Line 1698:             pass
  Line 1699:         print("模拟进程已退出")

  Line 6: - 完成模拟后不立即关闭环境，进入等待命令模式

  Line 58:     def format(self, record):
  Line 59:         result = super().format(record)
  Line 61:         def replace_unicode(match):
  Line 62:             try:
  Line 63:                 return chr(int(match.group(1), 16))

  Line 170:     def poll_command(self) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
  Line 171:         """轮询获取待处理命令"""
  Line 172:         if not os.path.exists(self.commands_dir):
  Line 173:             return None
  Line 175:         # 获取命令文件（按时间排序）
  Line 176:         command_files = []
  Line 177:         for filename in os.listdir(self.commands_dir):
  Line 178:             if filename.endswith('.json'):
  Line 179:                 filepath = os.path.join(self.commands_dir, filename)
  Line 180:                 command_files.append((filepath, os.path.getmtime(filepath)))
  Line 182:         command_files.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
  Line 184:         for filepath, _ in command_files:
  Line 185:             try:
  Line 186:                 with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  Line 187:                     return json.load(f)
  Line 188:             except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
  Line 189:                 continue
  Line 191:         return None
  Line 193:     def send_response(self, command_id: str, status: str, result: Dict = None, error: str = None):

  Line 196:             "command_id": command_id,

  Line 198:             "result": result,
  Line 199:             "error": error,

  Line 209:         try:

  Line 211:         except OSError:
  Line 212:             pass
  Line 214:     async def handle_interview(self, command_id: str, agent_id: int, prompt: str) -> bool:
  Line 216:         处理单个Agent采访命令
  Line 218:         Returns:
  Line 219:             True 表示成功，False 表示失败
  Line 221:         try:
  Line 222:             # 获取Agent
  Line 223:             agent = self.agent_graph.get_agent(agent_id)
  Line 225:             # 创建Interview动作
  Line 226:             interview_action = ManualAction(
  Line 227:                 action_type=ActionType.INTERVIEW,
  Line 228:                 action_args={"prompt": prompt}
  Line 231:             # 执行Interview
  Line 232:             actions = {agent: interview_action}
  Line 233:             await self.env.step(actions)
  Line 235:             # 从数据库获取结果
  Line 236:             result = self._get_interview_result(agent_id)
  Line 238:             self.send_response(command_id, "completed", result=result)
  Line 239:             print(f"  Interview完成: agent_id={agent_id}")
  Line 240:             return True
  Line 242:         except Exception as e:
  Line 243:             error_msg = str(e)
  Line 244:             print(f"  Interview失败: agent_id={agent_id}, error={error_msg}")
  Line 245:             self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error=error_msg)
  Line 246:             return False
  Line 248:     async def handle_batch_interview(self, command_id: str, interviews: List[Dict]) -> bool:
  Line 250:         处理批量采访命令
  Line 252:         Args:
  Line 253:             interviews: [{"agent_id": int, "prompt": str}, ...]
  Line 255:         try:
  Line 256:             # 构建动作字典
  Line 257:             actions = {}
  Line 258:             agent_prompts = {}  # 记录每个agent的prompt
  Line 260:             for interview in interviews:
  Line 261:                 agent_id = interview.get("agent_id")
  Line 262:                 prompt = interview.get("prompt", "")
  Line 264:                 try:
  Line 265:                     agent = self.agent_graph.get_agent(agent_id)
  Line 266:                     actions[agent] = ManualAction(
  Line 267:                         action_type=ActionType.INTERVIEW,
  Line 268:                         action_args={"prompt": prompt}
  Line 270:                     agent_prompts[agent_id] = prompt
  Line 271:                 except Exception as e:
  Line 272:                     print(f"  警告: 无法获取Agent {agent_id}: {e}")
  Line 274:             if not actions:
  Line 275:                 self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error="没有有效的Agent")
  Line 276:                 return False
  Line 278:             # 执行批量Interview
  Line 279:             await self.env.step(actions)
  Line 281:             # 获取所有结果
  Line 282:             results = {}
  Line 283:             for agent_id in agent_prompts.keys():
  Line 284:                 result = self._get_interview_result(agent_id)
  Line 285:                 results[agent_id] = result
  Line 287:             self.send_response(command_id, "completed", result={
  Line 288:                 "interviews_count": len(results),
  Line 289:                 "results": results
  Line 290:             })
  Line 291:             print(f"  批量Interview完成: {len(results)} 个Agent")
  Line 292:             return True
  Line 294:         except Exception as e:
  Line 295:             error_msg = str(e)
  Line 296:             print(f"  批量Interview失败: {error_msg}")
  Line 297:             self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error=error_msg)
  Line 298:             return False
  Line 300:     def _get_interview_result(self, agent_id: int) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  Line 301:         """从数据库获取最新的Interview结果"""
  Line 302:         db_path = os.path.join(self.simulation_dir, "reddit_simulation.db")
  Line 304:         result = {
  Line 305:             "agent_id": agent_id,
  Line 306:             "response": None,
  Line 307:             "timestamp": None
  Line 308:         }
  Line 310:         if not os.path.exists(db_path):
  Line 311:             return result
  Line 313:         try:
  Line 314:             conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
  Line 315:             cursor = conn.cursor()
  Line 317:             # 查询最新的Interview记录
  Line 318:             cursor.execute("""
  Line 319:                 SELECT user_id, info, created_at
  Line 320:                 FROM trace
  Line 321:                 WHERE action = ? AND user_id = ?
  Line 322:                 ORDER BY created_at DESC
  Line 323:                 LIMIT 1
  Line 324:             """, (ActionType.INTERVIEW.value, agent_id))
  Line 326:             row = cursor.fetchone()
  Line 327:             if row:
  Line 328:                 user_id, info_json, created_at = row
  Line 329:                 try:
  Line 330:                     info = json.loads(info_json) if info_json else {}
  Line 331:                     result["response"] = info.get("response", info)
  Line 332:                     result["timestamp"] = created_at
  Line 333:                 except json.JSONDecodeError:
  Line 334:                     result["response"] = info_json
  Line 336:             conn.close()
  Line 338:         except Exception as e:
  Line 339:             print(f"  读取Interview结果失败: {e}")
  Line 341:         return result
  Line 343:     async def process_commands(self) -> bool:
  Line 345:         处理所有待处理命令
  Line 347:         Returns:
  Line 348:             True 表示继续运行，False 表示应该退出

  Line 352:             return True
  Line 354:         command_id = command.get("command_id")
  Line 355:         command_type = command.get("command_type")
  Line 356:         args = command.get("args", {})
  Line 358:         print(f"\n收到IPC命令: {command_type}, id={command_id}")
  Line 360:         if command_type == CommandType.INTERVIEW:
  Line 361:             await self.handle_interview(
  Line 362:                 command_id,
  Line 363:                 args.get("agent_id", 0),
  Line 364:                 args.get("prompt", "")
  Line 366:             return True
  Line 368:         elif command_type == CommandType.BATCH_INTERVIEW:
  Line 369:             await self.handle_batch_interview(
  Line 370:                 command_id,
  Line 371:                 args.get("interviews", [])
  Line 373:             return True
  Line 375:         elif command_type == CommandType.CLOSE_ENV:
  Line 376:             print("收到关闭环境命令")
  Line 377:             self.send_response(command_id, "completed", result={"message": "环境即将关闭"})
  Line 378:             return False
  Line 380:         else:
  Line 381:             self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error=f"未知命令类型: {command_type}")
  Line 382:             return True

  Line 434:     def _create_model(self):

  Line 469:     def _get_active_agents_for_round(
  Line 470:         self,
  Line 471:         env,
  Line 472:         current_hour: int,
  Line 473:         round_num: int
  Line 474:     ) -> List:
  Line 476:         根据时间和配置决定本轮激活哪些Agent
  Line 478:         time_config = self.config.get("time_config", {})
  Line 479:         agent_configs = self.config.get("agent_configs", [])
  Line 481:         base_min = time_config.get("agents_per_hour_min", 5)
  Line 482:         base_max = time_config.get("agents_per_hour_max", 20)
  Line 484:         peak_hours = time_config.get("peak_hours", [9, 10, 11, 14, 15, 20, 21, 22])
  Line 485:         off_peak_hours = time_config.get("off_peak_hours", [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5])
  Line 487:         if current_hour in peak_hours:
  Line 488:             multiplier = time_config.get("peak_activity_multiplier", 1.5)
  Line 489:         elif current_hour in off_peak_hours:
  Line 490:             multiplier = time_config.get("off_peak_activity_multiplier", 0.3)
  Line 491:         else:
  Line 492:             multiplier = 1.0
  Line 494:         target_count = int(random.uniform(base_min, base_max) * multiplier)
  Line 496:         candidates = []
  Line 497:         for cfg in agent_configs:
  Line 498:             agent_id = cfg.get("agent_id", 0)
  Line 499:             active_hours = cfg.get("active_hours", list(range(8, 23)))
  Line 500:             activity_level = cfg.get("activity_level", 0.5)
  Line 502:             if current_hour not in active_hours:
  Line 503:                 continue
  Line 505:             if random.random() < activity_level:
  Line 506:                 candidates.append(agent_id)
  Line 508:         selected_ids = random.sample(
  Line 509:             candidates,
  Line 510:             min(target_count, len(candidates))
  Line 511:         ) if candidates else []
  Line 513:         active_agents = []
  Line 514:         for agent_id in selected_ids:
  Line 515:             try:
  Line 516:                 agent = env.agent_graph.get_agent(agent_id)
  Line 517:                 active_agents.append((agent_id, agent))
  Line 518:             except Exception:
  Line 519:                 pass
  Line 521:         return active_agents
  Line 523:     async def run(self, max_rounds: int = None):
  Line 524:         """运行Reddit模拟
  Line 526:         Args:
  Line 527:             max_rounds: 最大模拟轮数（可选，用于截断过长的模拟）
  Line 529:         print("=" * 60)
  Line 530:         print("OASIS Reddit模拟")
  Line 531:         print(f"配置文件: {self.config_path}")
  Line 532:         print(f"模拟ID: {self.config.get('simulation_id', 'unknown')}")
  Line 533:         print(f"等待命令模式: {'启用' if self.wait_for_commands else '禁用'}")
  Line 534:         print("=" * 60)
  Line 536:         time_config = self.config.get("time_config", {})
  Line 537:         total_hours = time_config.get("total_simulation_hours", 72)
  Line 538:         minutes_per_round = time_config.get("minutes_per_round", 30)
  Line 539:         total_rounds = (total_hours * 60) // minutes_per_round
  Line 541:         # 如果指定了最大轮数，则截断
  Line 542:         if max_rounds is not None and max_rounds > 0:
  Line 543:             original_rounds = total_rounds
  Line 544:             total_rounds = min(total_rounds, max_rounds)
  Line 545:             if total_rounds < original_rounds:

  Line 737: def setup_signal_handlers():
  Line 739:     设置信号处理器，确保收到 SIGTERM/SIGINT 时能够正确退出
  Line 740:     让程序有机会正常清理资源（关闭数据库、环境等）
  Line 742:     def signal_handler(signum, frame):
  Line 743:         global _cleanup_done
  Line 744:         sig_name = "SIGTERM" if signum == signal.SIGTERM else "SIGINT"
  Line 745:         print(f"\n收到 {sig_name} 信号，正在退出...")
  Line 746:         if not _cleanup_done:
  Line 747:             _cleanup_done = True
  Line 748:             if _shutdown_event:
  Line 749:                 _shutdown_event.set()
  Line 750:         else:
  Line 751:             # 重复收到信号才强制退出
  Line 752:             print("强制退出...")
  Line 753:             sys.exit(1)
  Line 755:     signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, signal_handler)
  Line 756:     signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)
  Line 759: if __name__ == "__main__":
  Line 760:     setup_signal_handlers()
  Line 761:     try:
  Line 762:         asyncio.run(main())
  Line 763:     except KeyboardInterrupt:
  Line 764:         print("\n程序被中断")
  Line 765:     except SystemExit:
  Line 766:         pass
  Line 767:     finally:
  Line 768:         print("模拟进程已退出")

  Line 54:     """自定义格式化器，将 Unicode 转义序列转换为可读字符"""
  Line 56:     UNICODE_ESCAPE_PATTERN = re.compile(r'\\u([0-9a-fA-F]{4})')
  Line 58:     def format(self, record):
  Line 59:         result = super().format(record)
  Line 61:         def replace_unicode(match):
  Line 62:             try:
  Line 63:                 return chr(int(match.group(1), 16))
  Line 64:             except (ValueError, OverflowError):
  Line 65:                 return match.group(0)

  Line 170:     def poll_command(self) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
  Line 171:         """轮询获取待处理命令"""
  Line 172:         if not os.path.exists(self.commands_dir):
  Line 173:             return None
  Line 175:         # 获取命令文件（按时间排序）
  Line 176:         command_files = []
  Line 177:         for filename in os.listdir(self.commands_dir):
  Line 178:             if filename.endswith('.json'):
  Line 179:                 filepath = os.path.join(self.commands_dir, filename)
  Line 180:                 command_files.append((filepath, os.path.getmtime(filepath)))
  Line 182:         command_files.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
  Line 184:         for filepath, _ in command_files:
  Line 185:             try:
  Line 186:                 with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  Line 187:                     return json.load(f)
  Line 188:             except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
  Line 189:                 continue
  Line 191:         return None
  Line 193:     def send_response(self, command_id: str, status: str, result: Dict = None, error: str = None):
  Line 194:         """发送响应"""
  Line 195:         response = {
  Line 196:             "command_id": command_id,
  Line 197:             "status": status,
  Line 198:             "result": result,
  Line 199:             "error": error,
  Line 200:             "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat()

  Line 214:     async def handle_interview(self, command_id: str, agent_id: int, prompt: str) -> bool:
  Line 216:         处理单个Agent采访命令
  Line 218:         Returns:
  Line 219:             True 表示成功，False 表示失败
  Line 221:         try:
  Line 222:             # 获取Agent
  Line 223:             agent = self.agent_graph.get_agent(agent_id)
  Line 225:             # 创建Interview动作
  Line 226:             interview_action = ManualAction(
  Line 227:                 action_type=ActionType.INTERVIEW,
  Line 228:                 action_args={"prompt": prompt}
  Line 231:             # 执行Interview
  Line 232:             actions = {agent: interview_action}
  Line 233:             await self.env.step(actions)
  Line 235:             # 从数据库获取结果
  Line 236:             result = self._get_interview_result(agent_id)
  Line 238:             self.send_response(command_id, "completed", result=result)
  Line 239:             print(f"  Interview完成: agent_id={agent_id}")
  Line 240:             return True
  Line 242:         except Exception as e:
  Line 243:             error_msg = str(e)
  Line 244:             print(f"  Interview失败: agent_id={agent_id}, error={error_msg}")
  Line 245:             self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error=error_msg)
  Line 246:             return False
  Line 248:     async def handle_batch_interview(self, command_id: str, interviews: List[Dict]) -> bool:
  Line 250:         处理批量采访命令
  Line 252:         Args:
  Line 253:             interviews: [{"agent_id": int, "prompt": str}, ...]
  Line 255:         try:
  Line 256:             # 构建动作字典
  Line 257:             actions = {}
  Line 258:             agent_prompts = {}  # 记录每个agent的prompt
  Line 260:             for interview in interviews:
  Line 261:                 agent_id = interview.get("agent_id")
  Line 262:                 prompt = interview.get("prompt", "")
  Line 264:                 try:
  Line 265:                     agent = self.agent_graph.get_agent(agent_id)
  Line 266:                     actions[agent] = ManualAction(
  Line 267:                         action_type=ActionType.INTERVIEW,
  Line 268:                         action_args={"prompt": prompt}
  Line 270:                     agent_prompts[agent_id] = prompt
  Line 271:                 except Exception as e:
  Line 272:                     print(f"  警告: 无法获取Agent {agent_id}: {e}")
  Line 274:             if not actions:
  Line 275:                 self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error="没有有效的Agent")
  Line 276:                 return False
  Line 278:             # 执行批量Interview
  Line 279:             await self.env.step(actions)
  Line 281:             # 获取所有结果
  Line 282:             results = {}
  Line 283:             for agent_id in agent_prompts.keys():
  Line 284:                 result = self._get_interview_result(agent_id)
  Line 285:                 results[agent_id] = result
  Line 287:             self.send_response(command_id, "completed", result={
  Line 288:                 "interviews_count": len(results),
  Line 289:                 "results": results
  Line 290:             })
  Line 291:             print(f"  批量Interview完成: {len(results)} 个Agent")
  Line 292:             return True
  Line 294:         except Exception as e:
  Line 295:             error_msg = str(e)
  Line 296:             print(f"  批量Interview失败: {error_msg}")
  Line 297:             self.send_response(command_id, "failed", error=error_msg)
  Line 298:             return False
  Line 300:     def _get_interview_result(self, agent_id: int) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  Line 301:         """从数据库获取最新的Interview结果"""
  Line 302:         db_path = os.path.join(self.simulation_dir, "twitter_simulation.db")
  Line 304:         result = {
  Line 305:             "agent_id": agent_id,
  Line 306:             "response": None,
  Line 307:             "timestamp": None
  Line 308:         }
  Line 310:         if not os.path.exists(db_path):
  Line 311:             return result
  Line 313:         try:
  Line 314:             conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
  Line 315:             cursor = conn.cursor()
  Line 317:             # 查询最新的Interview记录
  Line 318:             cursor.execute("""
  Line 319:                 SELECT user_id, info, created_at
  Line 320:                 FROM trace
  Line 321:                 WHERE action = ? AND user_id = ?
  Line 322:                 ORDER BY created_at DESC
  Line 323:                 LIMIT 1
  Line 324:             """, (ActionType.INTERVIEW.value, agent_id))
  Line 326:             row = cursor.fetchone()
  Line 327:             if row:
  Line 328:                 user_id, info_json, created_at = row

  Line 330:                     info = json.loads(info_json) if info_json else {}
  Line 331:                     result["response"] = info.get("response", info)
  Line 332:                     result["timestamp"] = created_at

  Line 462:     def _get_active_agents_for_round(
  Line 463:         self,
  Line 464:         env,
  Line 465:         current_hour: int,
  Line 466:         round_num: int
  Line 467:     ) -> List:
  Line 469:         根据时间和配置决定本轮激活哪些Agent
  Line 471:         Args:
  Line 472:             env: OASIS环境
  Line 473:             current_hour: 当前模拟小时（0-23）
  Line 474:             round_num: 当前轮数
  Line 476:         Returns:
  Line 477:             激活的Agent列表
  Line 479:         time_config = self.config.get("time_config", {})
  Line 480:         agent_configs = self.config.get("agent_configs", [])
  Line 482:         # 基础激活数量
  Line 483:         base_min = time_config.get("agents_per_hour_min", 5)
  Line 484:         base_max = time_config.get("agents_per_hour_max", 20)
  Line 486:         # 根据时段调整
  Line 487:         peak_hours = time_config.get("peak_hours", [9, 10, 11, 14, 15, 20, 21, 22])
  Line 488:         off_peak_hours = time_config.get("off_peak_hours", [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5])
  Line 490:         if current_hour in peak_hours:
  Line 491:             multiplier = time_config.get("peak_activity_multiplier", 1.5)
  Line 492:         elif current_hour in off_peak_hours:
  Line 493:             multiplier = time_config.get("off_peak_activity_multiplier", 0.3)
  Line 494:         else:
  Line 495:             multiplier = 1.0
  Line 497:         target_count = int(random.uniform(base_min, base_max) * multiplier)
  Line 499:         # 根据每个Agent的配置计算激活概率
  Line 500:         candidates = []
  Line 501:         for cfg in agent_configs:
  Line 502:             agent_id = cfg.get("agent_id", 0)
  Line 503:             active_hours = cfg.get("active_hours", list(range(8, 23)))
  Line 504:             activity_level = cfg.get("activity_level", 0.5)
  Line 506:             # 检查是否在活跃时间
  Line 507:             if current_hour not in active_hours:
  Line 508:                 continue
  Line 510:             # 根据活跃度计算概率
  Line 511:             if random.random() < activity_level:
  Line 512:                 candidates.append(agent_id)
  Line 514:         # 随机选择
  Line 515:         selected_ids = random.sample(
  Line 516:             candidates,
  Line 517:             min(target_count, len(candidates))
  Line 518:         ) if candidates else []
  Line 520:         # 转换为Agent对象
  Line 521:         active_agents = []
  Line 522:         for agent_id in selected_ids:
  Line 523:             try:
  Line 524:                 agent = env.agent_graph.get_agent(agent_id)
  Line 525:                 active_agents.append((agent_id, agent))
  Line 526:             except Exception:
  Line 527:                 pass
  Line 529:         return active_agents

  Line 749: def setup_signal_handlers():
  Line 751:     设置信号处理器，确保收到 SIGTERM/SIGINT 时能够正确退出
  Line 752:     让程序有机会正常清理资源（关闭数据库、环境等）
  Line 754:     def signal_handler(signum, frame):
  Line 755:         global _cleanup_done
  Line 756:         sig_name = "SIGTERM" if signum == signal.SIGTERM else "SIGINT"
  Line 757:         print(f"\n收到 {sig_name} 信号，正在退出...")
  Line 758:         if not _cleanup_done:
  Line 759:             _cleanup_done = True
  Line 760:             if _shutdown_event:
  Line 761:                 _shutdown_event.set()
  Line 762:         else:
  Line 763:             # 重复收到信号才强制退出
  Line 764:             print("强制退出...")
  Line 765:             sys.exit(1)
  Line 767:     signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, signal_handler)
  Line 768:     signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)
  Line 771: if __name__ == "__main__":
  Line 772:     setup_signal_handlers()
  Line 773:     try:
  Line 774:         asyncio.run(main())
  Line 775:     except KeyboardInterrupt:
  Line 776:         print("\n程序被中断")
  Line 777:     except SystemExit:
  Line 778:         pass
  Line 779:     finally:
  Line 780:         print("模拟进程已退出")
