  Line 247:                     <span class="idle-label">Action Skipped</span>
  Line 248:                   </div>
  Line 249:                 </template>
  Line 251:                 <!-- 通用回退：未知类型或有 content 但未被上述处理 -->
  Line 252:                 <div v-if="!['CREATE_POST', 'QUOTE_POST', 'REPOST', 'LIKE_POST', 'CREATE_COMMENT', 'SEARCH_POSTS', 'FOLLOW', 'UPVOTE_POST', 'DOWNVOTE_POST', 'DO_NOTHING'].includes(action.action_type) && action.action_args?.content" class="content-text">
  Line 253:                   {{ action.action_args.content }}
  Line 254:                 </div>
  Line 255:               </div>
  Line 257:               <div class="card-footer">
  Line 258:                 <span class="time-tag">R{{ action.round_num }} • {{ formatActionTime(action.timestamp) }}</span>
  Line 259:                 <!-- Platform tag removed as it is in header now -->
  Line 260:               </div>
  Line 261:             </div>
  Line 262:           </div>
  Line 263:         </TransitionGroup>
  Line 265:         <div v-if="allActions.length === 0" class="waiting-state">
  Line 266:           <div class="pulse-ring"></div>
  Line 267:           <span>Waiting for agent actions...</span>
  Line 268:         </div>
  Line 269:       </div>
  Line 270:     </div>
  Line 272:     <!-- Bottom Info / Logs -->
  Line 273:     <div class="system-logs">
  Line 274:       <div class="log-header">
  Line 275:         <span class="log-title">SIMULATION MONITOR</span>
  Line 276:         <span class="log-id">{{ simulationId || 'NO_SIMULATION' }}</span>
  Line 277:       </div>
  Line 278:       <div class="log-content" ref="logContent">
  Line 279:         <div class="log-line" v-for="(log, idx) in systemLogs" :key="idx">
  Line 280:           <span class="log-time">{{ log.time }}</span>
  Line 281:           <span class="log-msg">{{ log.msg }}</span>
  Line 282:         </div>
  Line 283:       </div>
  Line 284:     </div>
  Line 285:   </div>
  Line 286: </template>
  Line 288: <script setup>
  Line 289: import { ref, computed, watch, onMounted, onUnmounted, nextTick } from 'vue'
  Line 290: import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'
  Line 291: import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
  Line 292: import {
  Line 293:   startSimulation,
  Line 294:   stopSimulation,
  Line 295:   getRunStatus,
  Line 296:   getRunStatusDetail
  Line 297: } from '../api/simulation'
  Line 298: import { generateReport } from '../api/report'
  Line 300: const { t } = useI18n()
  Line 302: const props = defineProps({
  Line 303:   simulationId: String,
  Line 304:   maxRounds: Number, // 从Step2传入的最大轮数
  Line 305:   minutesPerRound: {
  Line 306:     type: Number,
  Line 307:     default: 30 // 默认每轮30分钟
  Line 308:   },
  Line 309:   projectData: Object,
  Line 310:   graphData: Object,
  Line 311:   systemLogs: Array
  Line 312: })
  Line 314: const emit = defineEmits(['go-back', 'next-step', 'add-log', 'update-status'])
  Line 316: const router = useRouter()
  Line 318: // State
  Line 319: const isGeneratingReport = ref(false)
  Line 320: const phase = ref(0) // 0: 未开始, 1: 运行中, 2: 已完成
  Line 321: const isStarting = ref(false)
  Line 322: const isStopping = ref(false)
  Line 323: const startError = ref(null)
  Line 324: const runStatus = ref({})
  Line 325: const allActions = ref([]) // 所有动作（增量累积）
  Line 326: const actionIds = ref(new Set()) // 用于去重的动作ID集合
  Line 327: const scrollContainer = ref(null)
  Line 329: // Computed
  Line 330: // 按时间顺序显示动作（最新的在最后面，即底部）
  Line 331: const chronologicalActions = computed(() => {
  Line 332:   return allActions.value
  Line 333: })
  Line 335: // 各平台动作计数
  Line 336: const twitterActionsCount = computed(() => {
  Line 337:   return allActions.value.filter(a => a.platform === 'twitter').length
  Line 338: })
  Line 340: const redditActionsCount = computed(() => {
  Line 341:   return allActions.value.filter(a => a.platform === 'reddit').length
  Line 342: })
  Line 344: // 格式化模拟流逝时间（根据轮次和每轮分钟数计算）
  Line 345: const formatElapsedTime = (currentRound) => {
  Line 346:   if (!currentRound || currentRound <= 0) return '0h 0m'
  Line 347:   const totalMinutes = currentRound * props.minutesPerRound
  Line 348:   const hours = Math.floor(totalMinutes / 60)
  Line 349:   const minutes = totalMinutes % 60
  Line 350:   return `${hours}h ${minutes}m`
  Line 351: }
  Line 353: // Twitter平台的模拟流逝时间
  Line 354: const twitterElapsedTime = computed(() => {
  Line 355:   return formatElapsedTime(runStatus.value.twitter_current_round || 0)
  Line 356: })
  Line 358: // Reddit平台的模拟流逝时间
  Line 359: const redditElapsedTime = computed(() => {
  Line 360:   return formatElapsedTime(runStatus.value.reddit_current_round || 0)
  Line 361: })
  Line 363: // Methods
  Line 364: const addLog = (msg) => {
  Line 365:   emit('add-log', msg)
  Line 366: }
  Line 368: // 重置所有状态（用于重新启动模拟）
  Line 369: const resetAllState = () => {
  Line 370:   phase.value = 0
  Line 371:   runStatus.value = {}
  Line 372:   allActions.value = []
  Line 373:   actionIds.value = new Set()
  Line 374:   prevTwitterRound.value = 0
  Line 375:   prevRedditRound.value = 0
  Line 376:   startError.value = null
  Line 377:   isStarting.value = false
  Line 378:   isStopping.value = false
  Line 379:   stopPolling()  // 停止之前可能存在的轮询
  Line 380: }
  Line 382: // 启动模拟
  Line 383: const doStartSimulation = async () => {
  Line 384:   if (!props.simulationId) {
  Line 385:     addLog(t('log.errorMissingSimId'))
  Line 386:     return
  Line 387:   }
  Line 389:   // 先重置所有状态，确保不会受到上一次模拟的影响
  Line 390:   resetAllState()
  Line 392:   isStarting.value = true
  Line 393:   startError.value = null
  Line 394:   addLog(t('log.startingDualSim'))
  Line 395:   emit('update-status', 'processing')
  Line 397:   try {
  Line 398:     const params = {
  Line 399:       simulation_id: props.simulationId,
  Line 400:       platform: 'parallel',
  Line 401:       force: true,  // 强制重新开始
  Line 402:       enable_graph_memory_update: true  // 开启动态图谱更新
  Line 403:     }
  Line 405:     if (props.maxRounds) {
  Line 406:       params.max_rounds = props.maxRounds
  Line 407:       addLog(t('log.setMaxRounds', { rounds: props.maxRounds }))
  Line 408:     }
  Line 410:     addLog(t('log.graphMemoryUpdateEnabled'))
  Line 412:     const res = await startSimulation(params)
  Line 414:     if (res.success && res.data) {
  Line 415:       if (res.data.force_restarted) {
  Line 416:         addLog(t('log.oldSimCleared'))
  Line 417:       }
  Line 418:       addLog(t('log.engineStarted'))
  Line 419:       addLog(`  ├─ PID: ${res.data.process_pid || '-'}`)
  Line 421:       phase.value = 1
  Line 422:       runStatus.value = res.data
  Line 424:       startStatusPolling()
  Line 425:       startDetailPolling()
  Line 426:     } else {
  Line 427:       startError.value = res.error || '启动失败'
  Line 428:       addLog(t('log.startFailed', { error: res.error || t('common.unknownError') }))
  Line 429:       emit('update-status', 'error')
  Line 430:     }
  Line 431:   } catch (err) {
  Line 432:     startError.value = err.message
  Line 433:     addLog(t('log.startException', { error: err.message }))
  Line 434:     emit('update-status', 'error')
  Line 435:   } finally {
  Line 436:     isStarting.value = false
  Line 437:   }
  Line 438: }
  Line 440: // 停止模拟
  Line 441: const handleStopSimulation = async () => {
  Line 442:   if (!props.simulationId) return
  Line 444:   isStopping.value = true
  Line 445:   addLog(t('log.stoppingSim'))
  Line 447:   try {
  Line 448:     const res = await stopSimulation({ simulation_id: props.simulationId })
  Line 450:     if (res.success) {
  Line 451:       addLog(t('log.simStoppedSuccess'))
  Line 452:       phase.value = 2
  Line 453:       stopPolling()
  Line 454:       emit('update-status', 'completed')
  Line 455:     } else {
  Line 456:       addLog(t('log.stopFailed', { error: res.error || t('common.unknownError') }))
  Line 457:     }
  Line 458:   } catch (err) {
  Line 459:     addLog(t('log.stopException', { error: err.message }))
  Line 460:   } finally {
  Line 461:     isStopping.value = false
  Line 462:   }
  Line 463: }
  Line 465: // 轮询状态
  Line 466: let statusTimer = null
  Line 467: let detailTimer = null
  Line 469: const startStatusPolling = () => {
  Line 470:   statusTimer = setInterval(fetchRunStatus, 2000)
  Line 471: }
  Line 473: const startDetailPolling = () => {
  Line 474:   detailTimer = setInterval(fetchRunStatusDetail, 3000)
  Line 475: }
  Line 477: const stopPolling = () => {
  Line 478:   if (statusTimer) {
  Line 479:     clearInterval(statusTimer)
  Line 480:     statusTimer = null
  Line 481:   }
  Line 482:   if (detailTimer) {
  Line 483:     clearInterval(detailTimer)
  Line 484:     detailTimer = null
  Line 485:   }
  Line 486: }
  Line 488: // 追踪各平台的上一次轮次，用于检测变化并输出日志
  Line 489: const prevTwitterRound = ref(0)
  Line 490: const prevRedditRound = ref(0)
  Line 492: const fetchRunStatus = async () => {
  Line 493:   if (!props.simulationId) return
  Line 495:   try {
  Line 496:     const res = await getRunStatus(props.simulationId)
  Line 498:     if (res.success && res.data) {
  Line 499:       const data = res.data
  Line 501:       runStatus.value = data
  Line 503:       // 分别检测各平台的轮次变化并输出日志
  Line 504:       if (data.twitter_current_round > prevTwitterRound.value) {
  Line 505:         addLog(`[Plaza] R${data.twitter_current_round}/${data.total_rounds} | T:${data.twitter_simulated_hours || 0}h | A:${data.twitter_actions_count}`)
  Line 506:         prevTwitterRound.value = data.twitter_current_round
  Line 507:       }
  Line 509:       if (data.reddit_current_round > prevRedditRound.value) {
  Line 510:         addLog(`[Community] R${data.reddit_current_round}/${data.total_rounds} | T:${data.reddit_simulated_hours || 0}h | A:${data.reddit_actions_count}`)
  Line 511:         prevRedditRound.value = data.reddit_current_round
  Line 512:       }
  Line 514:       // 检测模拟是否已完成（通过 runner_status 或平台完成状态判断）
  Line 515:       const isCompleted = data.runner_status === 'completed' || data.runner_status === 'stopped'
  Line 517:       // 额外检查：如果后端还没来得及更新 runner_status，但平台已经报告完成
  Line 518:       // 通过检测 twitter_completed 和 reddit_completed 状态判断
  Line 519:       const platformsCompleted = checkPlatformsCompleted(data)
  Line 521:       if (isCompleted || platformsCompleted) {
  Line 522:         if (platformsCompleted && !isCompleted) {
  Line 523:           addLog(t('log.allPlatformsCompleted'))
  Line 524:         }
  Line 525:         addLog(t('log.simCompleted'))
  Line 526:         phase.value = 2
  Line 527:         stopPolling()
  Line 528:         emit('update-status', 'completed')
  Line 529:       }
  Line 530:     }
  Line 531:   } catch (err) {
  Line 532:     console.warn('获取运行状态失败:', err)
  Line 533:   }
  Line 534: }
  Line 536: // 检查所有启用的平台是否已完成
  Line 537: const checkPlatformsCompleted = (data) => {
  Line 538:   // 如果没有任何平台数据，返回 false
  Line 539:   if (!data) return false
  Line 541:   // 检查各平台的完成状态
  Line 542:   const twitterCompleted = data.twitter_completed === true
  Line 543:   const redditCompleted = data.reddit_completed === true
  Line 545:   // 如果至少有一个平台完成了，检查是否所有启用的平台都完成了
  Line 546:   // 通过 actions_count 判断平台是否被启用（如果 count > 0 或 running 曾为 true）
  Line 547:   const twitterEnabled = (data.twitter_actions_count > 0) || data.twitter_running || twitterCompleted
  Line 548:   const redditEnabled = (data.reddit_actions_count > 0) || data.reddit_running || redditCompleted
  Line 550:   // 如果没有任何平台被启用，返回 false
  Line 551:   if (!twitterEnabled && !redditEnabled) return false
  Line 553:   // 检查所有启用的平台是否都已完成
  Line 554:   if (twitterEnabled && !twitterCompleted) return false
  Line 555:   if (redditEnabled && !redditCompleted) return false
  Line 557:   return true
  Line 558: }
  Line 560: const fetchRunStatusDetail = async () => {
  Line 561:   if (!props.simulationId) return
  Line 563:   try {
  Line 564:     const res = await getRunStatusDetail(props.simulationId)
  Line 566:     if (res.success && res.data) {
  Line 567:       // 使用 all_actions 获取完整的动作列表
  Line 568:       const serverActions = res.data.all_actions || []
  Line 570:       // 增量添加新动作（去重）
  Line 571:       let newActionsAdded = 0
  Line 572:       serverActions.forEach(action => {
  Line 573:         // 生成唯一ID
  Line 574:         const actionId = action.id || `${action.timestamp}-${action.platform}-${action.agent_id}-${action.action_type}`
  Line 576:         if (!actionIds.value.has(actionId)) {
  Line 577:           actionIds.value.add(actionId)
  Line 578:           allActions.value.push({
  Line 579:             ...action,
  Line 580:             _uniqueId: actionId
  Line 581:           })
  Line 582:           newActionsAdded++
  Line 583:         }
  Line 584:       })
  Line 586:       // 不自动滚动，让用户自由查看时间轴
  Line 587:       // 新动作会在底部追加
  Line 588:     }
  Line 589:   } catch (err) {
  Line 590:     console.warn('获取详细状态失败:', err)
  Line 591:   }
  Line 592: }
  Line 594: // Helpers
  Line 595: const getActionTypeLabel = (type) => {
  Line 596:   const labels = {
  Line 597:     'CREATE_POST': 'POST',
  Line 598:     'REPOST': 'REPOST',
  Line 599:     'LIKE_POST': 'LIKE',
  Line 600:     'CREATE_COMMENT': 'COMMENT',
  Line 601:     'LIKE_COMMENT': 'LIKE',
  Line 602:     'DO_NOTHING': 'IDLE',
  Line 603:     'FOLLOW': 'FOLLOW',
  Line 604:     'SEARCH_POSTS': 'SEARCH',
  Line 605:     'QUOTE_POST': 'QUOTE',
  Line 606:     'UPVOTE_POST': 'UPVOTE',
  Line 607:     'DOWNVOTE_POST': 'DOWNVOTE'
  Line 608:   }
  Line 609:   return labels[type] || type || 'UNKNOWN'
  Line 610: }
  Line 612: const getActionTypeClass = (type) => {
  Line 613:   const classes = {
  Line 614:     'CREATE_POST': 'badge-post',
  Line 615:     'REPOST': 'badge-action',
  Line 616:     'LIKE_POST': 'badge-action',
  Line 617:     'CREATE_COMMENT': 'badge-comment',
  Line 618:     'LIKE_COMMENT': 'badge-action',
  Line 619:     'QUOTE_POST': 'badge-post',
  Line 620:     'FOLLOW': 'badge-meta',
  Line 621:     'SEARCH_POSTS': 'badge-meta',
  Line 622:     'UPVOTE_POST': 'badge-action',
  Line 623:     'DOWNVOTE_POST': 'badge-action',
  Line 624:     'DO_NOTHING': 'badge-idle'
  Line 625:   }
  Line 626:   return classes[type] || 'badge-default'
  Line 627: }
  Line 629: const truncateContent = (content, maxLength = 100) => {
  Line 630:   if (!content) return ''
  Line 631:   if (content.length > maxLength) return content.substring(0, maxLength) + '...'
  Line 632:   return content
  Line 633: }
  Line 635: const formatActionTime = (timestamp) => {
  Line 636:   if (!timestamp) return ''
  Line 637:   try {
  Line 638:     return new Date(timestamp).toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour12: false, hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' })
  Line 639:   } catch {
  Line 640:     return ''
  Line 641:   }
  Line 642: }
  Line 644: const handleNextStep = async () => {
  Line 645:   if (!props.simulationId) {
  Line 646:     addLog(t('log.errorMissingSimId'))
  Line 647:     return
  Line 648:   }
  Line 650:   if (isGeneratingReport.value) {
  Line 651:     addLog(t('log.reportRequestSent'))
  Line 652:     return
  Line 653:   }
  Line 655:   isGeneratingReport.value = true
  Line 656:   addLog(t('log.startingReportGen'))
  Line 658:   try {
  Line 659:     const res = await generateReport({
  Line 660:       simulation_id: props.simulationId,
  Line 661:       force_regenerate: true
  Line 662:     })
  Line 664:     if (res.success && res.data) {
  Line 665:       const reportId = res.data.report_id
  Line 666:       addLog(t('log.reportGenTaskStarted', { reportId }))
  Line 668:       // 跳转到报告页面
  Line 669:       router.push({ name: 'Report', params: { reportId } })
  Line 670:     } else {
  Line 671:       addLog(t('log.reportGenFailed', { error: res.error || t('common.unknownError') }))
  Line 672:       isGeneratingReport.value = false
  Line 673:     }
  Line 674:   } catch (err) {
  Line 675:     addLog(t('log.reportGenException', { error: err.message }))
  Line 676:     isGeneratingReport.value = false
  Line 677:   }
  Line 678: }
  Line 680: // Scroll log to bottom
  Line 681: const logContent = ref(null)
  Line 682: watch(() => props.systemLogs?.length, () => {
  Line 683:   nextTick(() => {
  Line 684:     if (logContent.value) {
  Line 685:       logContent.value.scrollTop = logContent.value.scrollHeight
  Line 686:     }
  Line 687:   })
  Line 688: })
  Line 690: onMounted(() => {
  Line 691:   addLog(t('log.step3Init'))
  Line 692:   if (props.simulationId) {
  Line 693:     doStartSimulation()
  Line 694:   }
  Line 695: })
  Line 697: onUnmounted(() => {
  Line 698:   stopPolling()
  Line 699: })
  Line 700: </script>

  Line 354:                     <button v-if="log.action === 'tool_result'" class="action-btn" @click.stop="toggleRawResult(log.timestamp, $event)">
  Line 355:                       {{ showRawResult[log.timestamp] ? 'Structured View' : 'Raw Output' }}
  Line 356:                     </button>
  Line 358:                     <!-- LLM Response: Show/Hide Response -->
  Line 359:                     <button v-if="log.action === 'llm_response' && log.details?.response" class="action-btn" @click.stop="toggleLogExpand(log)">
  Line 360:                       {{ expandedLogs.has(log.timestamp) ? 'Hide Response' : 'Show Response' }}
  Line 361:                     </button>
  Line 362:                   </div>
  Line 363:                 </div>
  Line 364:               </div>
  Line 365:             </div>
  Line 366:           </TransitionGroup>
  Line 368:           <!-- Empty State -->
  Line 369:           <div v-if="agentLogs.length === 0 && !isComplete" class="workflow-empty">
  Line 370:             <div class="empty-pulse"></div>
  Line 371:             <span>Waiting for agent activity...</span>
  Line 372:           </div>
  Line 373:         </div>
  Line 374:       </div>
  Line 375:     </div>
  Line 377:     <!-- Bottom Console Logs -->
  Line 378:     <div class="console-logs">
  Line 379:       <div class="log-header">
  Line 380:         <span class="log-title">CONSOLE OUTPUT</span>
  Line 381:         <span class="log-id">{{ reportId || 'NO_REPORT' }}</span>
  Line 382:       </div>
  Line 383:       <div class="log-content" ref="logContent">
  Line 384:         <div class="log-line" v-for="(log, idx) in consoleLogs" :key="idx">
  Line 385:           <span class="log-msg" :class="getLogLevelClass(log)">{{ log }}</span>
  Line 386:         </div>
  Line 387:       </div>
  Line 388:     </div>
  Line 389:   </div>
  Line 390: </template>
  Line 392: <script setup>
  Line 393: import { ref, computed, watch, onMounted, onUnmounted, nextTick, h, reactive } from 'vue'
  Line 394: import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'
  Line 395: import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
  Line 396: import { getAgentLog, getConsoleLog } from '../api/report'
  Line 398: const router = useRouter()
  Line 399: const { t } = useI18n()
  Line 401: const props = defineProps({
  Line 402:   reportId: String,
  Line 403:   simulationId: String,
  Line 404:   systemLogs: Array
  Line 405: })
  Line 407: const emit = defineEmits(['add-log', 'update-status'])
  Line 409: // Navigation
  Line 410: const goToInteraction = () => {
  Line 411:   if (props.reportId) {
  Line 412:     router.push({ name: 'Interaction', params: { reportId: props.reportId } })
  Line 413:   }
  Line 414: }
  Line 416: // State
  Line 417: const agentLogs = ref([])
  Line 418: const consoleLogs = ref([])
  Line 419: const agentLogLine = ref(0)
  Line 420: const consoleLogLine = ref(0)
  Line 421: const reportOutline = ref(null)
  Line 422: const currentSectionIndex = ref(null)
  Line 423: const generatedSections = ref({})
  Line 424: const expandedContent = ref(new Set())
  Line 425: const expandedLogs = ref(new Set())
  Line 426: const collapsedSections = ref(new Set())
  Line 427: const isComplete = ref(false)
  Line 428: const startTime = ref(null)
  Line 429: const leftPanel = ref(null)
  Line 430: const rightPanel = ref(null)
  Line 431: const logContent = ref(null)
  Line 432: const showRawResult = reactive({})
  Line 434: // Toggle functions
  Line 435: const toggleRawResult = (timestamp, event) => {
  Line 436:   // 保存按钮相对于视口的位置
  Line 437:   const button = event?.target
  Line 438:   const buttonRect = button?.getBoundingClientRect()
  Line 439:   const buttonTopBeforeToggle = buttonRect?.top
  Line 441:   // 切换状态
  Line 442:   showRawResult[timestamp] = !showRawResult[timestamp]
  Line 444:   // 等待 DOM 更新后，调整滚动位置以保持按钮在相同位置
  Line 445:   if (button && buttonTopBeforeToggle !== undefined && rightPanel.value) {
  Line 446:     nextTick(() => {
  Line 447:       const newButtonRect = button.getBoundingClientRect()
  Line 448:       const buttonTopAfterToggle = newButtonRect.top
  Line 449:       const scrollDelta = buttonTopAfterToggle - buttonTopBeforeToggle
  Line 451:       // 调整滚动位置
  Line 452:       rightPanel.value.scrollTop += scrollDelta
  Line 453:     })
  Line 454:   }
  Line 455: }
  Line 457: const toggleSectionContent = (idx) => {
  Line 458:   if (!generatedSections.value[idx + 1]) return
  Line 459:   const newSet = new Set(expandedContent.value)
  Line 460:   if (newSet.has(idx)) {
  Line 461:     newSet.delete(idx)
  Line 462:   } else {
  Line 463:     newSet.add(idx)
  Line 464:   }
  Line 465:   expandedContent.value = newSet
  Line 466: }
  Line 468: const toggleSectionCollapse = (idx) => {
  Line 469:   // 只有已完成的章节才能折叠
  Line 470:   if (!generatedSections.value[idx + 1]) return
  Line 471:   const newSet = new Set(collapsedSections.value)
  Line 472:   if (newSet.has(idx)) {
  Line 473:     newSet.delete(idx)
  Line 474:   } else {
  Line 475:     newSet.add(idx)
  Line 476:   }
  Line 477:   collapsedSections.value = newSet
  Line 478: }
  Line 480: const toggleLogExpand = (log) => {
  Line 481:   const newSet = new Set(expandedLogs.value)
  Line 482:   if (newSet.has(log.timestamp)) {
  Line 483:     newSet.delete(log.timestamp)
  Line 484:   } else {
  Line 485:     newSet.add(log.timestamp)
  Line 486:   }
  Line 487:   expandedLogs.value = newSet
  Line 488: }
  Line 490: const isLogCollapsed = (log) => {
  Line 491:   if (['tool_call', 'tool_result', 'llm_response'].includes(log.action)) {
  Line 492:     return !expandedLogs.value.has(log.timestamp)
  Line 493:   }
  Line 494:   return false
  Line 495: }
  Line 497: // Tool configurations with display names and colors

  Line 531: const getToolDisplayName = (toolName) => {
  Line 532:   return toolConfig[toolName]?.name || toolName
  Line 533: }
  Line 535: const getToolColor = (toolName) => {
  Line 536:   return toolConfig[toolName]?.color || 'gray'
  Line 537: }
  Line 539: const getToolIcon = (toolName) => {
  Line 540:   return toolConfig[toolName]?.icon || 'tool'
  Line 541: }
  Line 543: // Parse functions
  Line 544: const parseInsightForge = (text) => {
  Line 545:   const result = {
  Line 546:     query: '',
  Line 547:     simulationRequirement: '',
  Line 548:     stats: { facts: 0, entities: 0, relationships: 0 },
  Line 549:     subQueries: [],
  Line 550:     facts: [],
  Line 551:     entities: [],
  Line 552:     relations: []
  Line 553:   }
  Line 555:   try {
  Line 556:     // 提取分析问题
  Line 557:     const queryMatch = text.match(/分析问题:\s*(.+?)(?:\n|$)/)
  Line 558:     if (queryMatch) result.query = queryMatch[1].trim()
  Line 560:     // 提取预测场景
  Line 561:     const reqMatch = text.match(/预测场景:\s*(.+?)(?:\n|$)/)
  Line 562:     if (reqMatch) result.simulationRequirement = reqMatch[1].trim()
  Line 564:     // 提取统计数据 - 匹配"相关预测事实: X条"格式
  Line 565:     const factMatch = text.match(/相关预测事实:\s*(\d+)/)
  Line 566:     const entityMatch = text.match(/涉及实体:\s*(\d+)/)
  Line 567:     const relMatch = text.match(/关系链:\s*(\d+)/)
  Line 568:     if (factMatch) result.stats.facts = parseInt(factMatch[1])
  Line 569:     if (entityMatch) result.stats.entities = parseInt(entityMatch[1])
  Line 570:     if (relMatch) result.stats.relationships = parseInt(relMatch[1])
  Line 572:     // 提取子问题 - 完整提取，不限制数量
  Line 573:     const subQSection = text.match(/### 分析的子问题\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|$)/)
  Line 574:     if (subQSection) {
  Line 575:       const lines = subQSection[1].split('\n').filter(l => l.match(/^\d+\./))
  Line 576:       result.subQueries = lines.map(l => l.replace(/^\d+\.\s*/, '').trim()).filter(Boolean)
  Line 577:     }
  Line 579:     // 提取关键事实 - 完整提取，不限制数量
  Line 580:     const factsSection = text.match(/### 【关键事实】[\s\S]*?\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|$)/)
  Line 581:     if (factsSection) {
  Line 582:       const lines = factsSection[1].split('\n').filter(l => l.match(/^\d+\./))
  Line 583:       result.facts = lines.map(l => {
  Line 584:         const match = l.match(/^\d+\.\s*"?(.+?)"?\s*$/)
  Line 585:         return match ? match[1].replace(/^"|"$/g, '').trim() : l.replace(/^\d+\.\s*/, '').trim()
  Line 586:       }).filter(Boolean)
  Line 587:     }
  Line 589:     // 提取核心实体 - 完整提取，包含摘要和相关事实数
  Line 590:     const entitySection = text.match(/### 【核心实体】\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|$)/)
  Line 591:     if (entitySection) {
  Line 592:       const entityText = entitySection[1]
  Line 593:       // 按 "- **" 分割实体块
  Line 594:       const entityBlocks = entityText.split(/\n(?=- \*\*)/).filter(b => b.trim().startsWith('- **'))
  Line 595:       result.entities = entityBlocks.map(block => {
  Line 596:         const nameMatch = block.match(/^-\s*\*\*(.+?)\*\*\s*\((.+?)\)/)
  Line 597:         const summaryMatch = block.match(/摘要:\s*"?(.+?)"?(?:\n|$)/)
  Line 598:         const relatedMatch = block.match(/相关事实:\s*(\d+)/)
  Line 599:         return {
  Line 600:           name: nameMatch ? nameMatch[1].trim() : '',
  Line 601:           type: nameMatch ? nameMatch[2].trim() : '',
  Line 602:           summary: summaryMatch ? summaryMatch[1].trim() : '',
  Line 603:           relatedFactsCount: relatedMatch ? parseInt(relatedMatch[1]) : 0
  Line 604:         }
  Line 605:       }).filter(e => e.name)
  Line 606:     }
  Line 608:     // 提取关系链 - 完整提取，不限制数量
  Line 609:     const relSection = text.match(/### 【关系链】\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|$)/)
  Line 610:     if (relSection) {
  Line 611:       const lines = relSection[1].split('\n').filter(l => l.trim().startsWith('-'))
  Line 612:       result.relations = lines.map(l => {
  Line 613:         const match = l.match(/^-\s*(.+?)\s*--\[(.+?)\]-->\s*(.+)$/)
  Line 614:         if (match) {
  Line 615:           return { source: match[1].trim(), relation: match[2].trim(), target: match[3].trim() }
  Line 616:         }
  Line 617:         return null
  Line 618:       }).filter(Boolean)
  Line 619:     }
  Line 620:   } catch (e) {
  Line 621:     console.warn('Parse insight_forge failed:', e)
  Line 622:   }
  Line 624:   return result
  Line 625: }
  Line 627: const parsePanorama = (text) => {
  Line 628:   const result = {
  Line 629:     query: '',
  Line 630:     stats: { nodes: 0, edges: 0, activeFacts: 0, historicalFacts: 0 },
  Line 631:     activeFacts: [],
  Line 632:     historicalFacts: [],
  Line 633:     entities: []
  Line 634:   }
  Line 636:   try {
  Line 637:     // 提取查询
  Line 638:     const queryMatch = text.match(/查询:\s*(.+?)(?:\n|$)/)
  Line 639:     if (queryMatch) result.query = queryMatch[1].trim()
  Line 641:     // 提取统计数据
  Line 642:     const nodesMatch = text.match(/总节点数:\s*(\d+)/)
  Line 643:     const edgesMatch = text.match(/总边数:\s*(\d+)/)
  Line 644:     const activeMatch = text.match(/当前有效事实:\s*(\d+)/)
  Line 645:     const histMatch = text.match(/历史\/过期事实:\s*(\d+)/)
  Line 646:     if (nodesMatch) result.stats.nodes = parseInt(nodesMatch[1])
  Line 647:     if (edgesMatch) result.stats.edges = parseInt(edgesMatch[1])
  Line 648:     if (activeMatch) result.stats.activeFacts = parseInt(activeMatch[1])
  Line 649:     if (histMatch) result.stats.historicalFacts = parseInt(histMatch[1])
  Line 651:     // 提取当前有效事实 - 完整提取，不限制数量
  Line 652:     const activeSection = text.match(/### 【当前有效事实】[\s\S]*?\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|$)/)
  Line 653:     if (activeSection) {
  Line 654:       const lines = activeSection[1].split('\n').filter(l => l.match(/^\d+\./))
  Line 655:       result.activeFacts = lines.map(l => {
  Line 656:         // 移除编号和引号
  Line 657:         const factText = l.replace(/^\d+\.\s*/, '').replace(/^"|"$/g, '').trim()
  Line 658:         return factText
  Line 659:       }).filter(Boolean)
  Line 660:     }
  Line 662:     // 提取历史/过期事实 - 完整提取，不限制数量
  Line 663:     const histSection = text.match(/### 【历史\/过期事实】[\s\S]*?\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|$)/)
  Line 664:     if (histSection) {
  Line 665:       const lines = histSection[1].split('\n').filter(l => l.match(/^\d+\./))
  Line 666:       result.historicalFacts = lines.map(l => {
  Line 667:         const factText = l.replace(/^\d+\.\s*/, '').replace(/^"|"$/g, '').trim()
  Line 668:         return factText
  Line 669:       }).filter(Boolean)
  Line 670:     }
  Line 672:     // 提取涉及实体 - 完整提取，不限制数量
  Line 673:     const entitySection = text.match(/### 【涉及实体】\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|$)/)
  Line 674:     if (entitySection) {
  Line 675:       const lines = entitySection[1].split('\n').filter(l => l.trim().startsWith('-'))
  Line 676:       result.entities = lines.map(l => {
  Line 677:         const match = l.match(/^-\s*\*\*(.+?)\*\*\s*\((.+?)\)/)
  Line 678:         if (match) return { name: match[1].trim(), type: match[2].trim() }
  Line 679:         return null
  Line 680:       }).filter(Boolean)
  Line 681:     }
  Line 682:   } catch (e) {
  Line 683:     console.warn('Parse panorama failed:', e)
  Line 684:   }
  Line 686:   return result
  Line 687: }
  Line 689: const parseInterview = (text) => {
  Line 690:   const result = {
  Line 691:     topic: '',
  Line 692:     agentCount: '',
  Line 693:     successCount: 0,
  Line 694:     totalCount: 0,
  Line 695:     selectionReason: '',
  Line 696:     interviews: [],
  Line 697:     summary: ''
  Line 698:   }
  Line 700:   try {
  Line 701:     // 提取采访主题
  Line 702:     const topicMatch = text.match(/\*\*采访主题:\*\*\s*(.+?)(?:\n|$)/)
  Line 703:     if (topicMatch) result.topic = topicMatch[1].trim()
  Line 705:     // 提取采访人数（如 "5 / 9 位模拟Agent"）
  Line 706:     const countMatch = text.match(/\*\*采访人数:\*\*\s*(\d+)\s*\/\s*(\d+)/)
  Line 707:     if (countMatch) {
  Line 708:       result.successCount = parseInt(countMatch[1])
  Line 709:       result.totalCount = parseInt(countMatch[2])
  Line 710:       result.agentCount = `${countMatch[1]} / ${countMatch[2]}`
  Line 711:     }
  Line 713:     // 提取采访对象选择理由
  Line 714:     const reasonMatch = text.match(/### 采访对象选择理由\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n---\n|\n### 采访实录)/)
  Line 715:     if (reasonMatch) {
  Line 716:       result.selectionReason = reasonMatch[1].trim()
  Line 717:     }
  Line 719:     // 解析每个人的选择理由
  Line 720:     const parseIndividualReasons = (reasonText) => {
  Line 721:       const reasons = {}
  Line 722:       if (!reasonText) return reasons
  Line 724:       const lines = reasonText.split(/\n+/)
  Line 725:       let currentName = null
  Line 726:       let currentReason = []
  Line 728:       for (const line of lines) {
  Line 729:         let headerMatch = null
  Line 730:         let name = null
  Line 731:         let reasonStart = null
  Line 733:         // 格式1: 数字. **名字（index=X）**：理由
  Line 734:         // 例如: 1. **校友_345（index=1）**：作为武大校友...
  Line 735:         headerMatch = line.match(/^\d+\.\s*\*\*([^*（(]+)(?:[（(]index\s*=?\s*\d+[)）])?\*\*[：:]\s*(.*)/)
  Line 736:         if (headerMatch) {
  Line 737:           name = headerMatch[1].trim()
  Line 738:           reasonStart = headerMatch[2]
  Line 739:         }
  Line 741:         // 格式2: - 选择名字（index X）：理由
  Line 742:         // 例如: - 选择家长_601（index 0）：作为家长群体代表...
  Line 743:         if (!headerMatch) {
  Line 744:           headerMatch = line.match(/^-\s*选择([^（(]+)(?:[（(]index\s*=?\s*\d+[)）])?[：:]\s*(.*)/)
  Line 745:           if (headerMatch) {
  Line 746:             name = headerMatch[1].trim()
  Line 747:             reasonStart = headerMatch[2]
  Line 748:           }
  Line 749:         }
  Line 751:         // 格式3: - **名字（index X）**：理由
  Line 752:         // 例如: - **家长_601（index 0）**：作为家长群体代表...
  Line 753:         if (!headerMatch) {
  Line 754:           headerMatch = line.match(/^-\s*\*\*([^*（(]+)(?:[（(]index\s*=?\s*\d+[)）])?\*\*[：:]\s*(.*)/)
  Line 755:           if (headerMatch) {
  Line 756:             name = headerMatch[1].trim()
  Line 757:             reasonStart = headerMatch[2]
  Line 758:           }
  Line 759:         }
  Line 761:         if (name) {
  Line 762:           // 保存上一个人的理由
  Line 763:           if (currentName && currentReason.length > 0) {
  Line 764:             reasons[currentName] = currentReason.join(' ').trim()
  Line 765:           }
  Line 766:           // 开始新的人
  Line 767:           currentName = name
  Line 768:           currentReason = reasonStart ? [reasonStart.trim()] : []
  Line 769:         } else if (currentName && line.trim() && !line.match(/^未选|^综上|^最终选择/)) {
  Line 770:           // 理由的续行（排除结尾总结段落）
  Line 771:           currentReason.push(line.trim())
  Line 772:         }
  Line 773:       }
  Line 775:       // 保存最后一个人的理由
  Line 776:       if (currentName && currentReason.length > 0) {
  Line 777:         reasons[currentName] = currentReason.join(' ').trim()
  Line 778:       }
  Line 780:       return reasons
  Line 781:     }
  Line 783:     const individualReasons = parseIndividualReasons(result.selectionReason)
  Line 785:     // 提取每个采访记录
  Line 786:     const interviewBlocks = text.split(/#### 采访 #\d+:/).slice(1)
  Line 788:     interviewBlocks.forEach((block, index) => {
  Line 789:       const interview = {
  Line 790:         num: index + 1,
  Line 791:         title: '',
  Line 792:         name: '',
  Line 793:         role: '',
  Line 794:         bio: '',
  Line 795:         selectionReason: '',
  Line 796:         questions: [],
  Line 797:         twitterAnswer: '',
  Line 798:         redditAnswer: '',
  Line 799:         quotes: []
  Line 800:       }
  Line 802:       // 提取标题（如 "学生"、"教育从业者" 等）
  Line 803:       const titleMatch = block.match(/^(.+?)\n/)
  Line 804:       if (titleMatch) interview.title = titleMatch[1].trim()
  Line 806:       // 提取姓名和角色
  Line 807:       const nameRoleMatch = block.match(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*\s*\((.+?)\)/)
  Line 808:       if (nameRoleMatch) {
  Line 809:         interview.name = nameRoleMatch[1].trim()
  Line 810:         interview.role = nameRoleMatch[2].trim()
  Line 811:         // 设置该人的选择理由
  Line 812:         interview.selectionReason = individualReasons[interview.name] || ''
  Line 813:       }
  Line 815:       // 提取简介
  Line 816:       const bioMatch = block.match(/_简介:\s*([\s\S]*?)_\n/)
  Line 817:       if (bioMatch) {
  Line 818:         interview.bio = bioMatch[1].trim().replace(/\.\.\.$/, '...')
  Line 819:       }
  Line 821:       // 提取问题列表
  Line 822:       const qMatch = block.match(/\*\*Q:\*\*\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\n\*\*A:\*\*|\*\*A:\*\*)/)
  Line 823:       if (qMatch) {
  Line 824:         const qText = qMatch[1].trim()
  Line 825:         // 按数字编号分割问题
  Line 826:         const questions = qText.split(/\n\d+\.\s+/).filter(q => q.trim())
  Line 827:         if (questions.length > 0) {
  Line 828:           // 如果第一个问题前面有"1."，需要特殊处理
  Line 829:           const firstQ = qText.match(/^1\.\s+(.+)/)
  Line 830:           if (firstQ) {
  Line 831:             interview.questions = [firstQ[1].trim(), ...questions.slice(1).map(q => q.trim())]
  Line 832:           } else {
  Line 833:             interview.questions = questions.map(q => q.trim())
  Line 834:           }
  Line 835:         }
  Line 836:       }
  Line 838:       // 提取回答 - 分Twitter和Reddit
  Line 839:       const answerMatch = block.match(/\*\*A:\*\*\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=\*\*关键引言|$)/)
  Line 840:       if (answerMatch) {
  Line 841:         const answerText = answerMatch[1].trim()
  Line 843:         // 分离Twitter和Reddit回答
  Line 844:         const twitterMatch = answerText.match(/【Twitter平台回答】\n?([\s\S]*?)(?=【Reddit平台回答】|$)/)
  Line 845:         const redditMatch = answerText.match(/【Reddit平台回答】\n?([\s\S]*?)$/)
  Line 847:         if (twitterMatch) {
  Line 848:           interview.twitterAnswer = twitterMatch[1].trim()
  Line 849:         }
  Line 850:         if (redditMatch) {
  Line 851:           interview.redditAnswer = redditMatch[1].trim()
  Line 852:         }
  Line 854:         // 平台回退逻辑（兼容旧格式：只有一个平台标记的情况）
  Line 855:         if (!twitterMatch && redditMatch) {
  Line 856:           // 只有 Reddit 回答，仅在非占位文本时复制为默认显示
  Line 857:           if (interview.redditAnswer && interview.redditAnswer !== '（该平台未获得回复）') {
  Line 858:             interview.twitterAnswer = interview.redditAnswer
  Line 859:           }
  Line 860:         } else if (twitterMatch && !redditMatch) {
  Line 861:           if (interview.twitterAnswer && interview.twitterAnswer !== '（该平台未获得回复）') {
  Line 862:             interview.redditAnswer = interview.twitterAnswer
  Line 863:           }
  Line 864:         } else if (!twitterMatch && !redditMatch) {
  Line 865:           // 没有分平台标记（极旧格式），整体作为回答
  Line 866:           interview.twitterAnswer = answerText
  Line 867:         }
  Line 868:       }
  Line 870:       // 提取关键引言（兼容多种引号格式）
  Line 871:       const quotesMatch = block.match(/\*\*关键引言:\*\*\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n---|\n####|$)/)
  Line 872:       if (quotesMatch) {
  Line 873:         const quotesText = quotesMatch[1]
  Line 874:         // 优先匹配 > "text" 格式
  Line 875:         let quoteMatches = quotesText.match(/> "([^"]+)"/g)
  Line 876:         // 回退：匹配 > "text" 或 > \u201Ctext\u201D（中文引号）
  Line 877:         if (!quoteMatches) {
  Line 878:           quoteMatches = quotesText.match(/> [\u201C""]([^\u201D""]+)[\u201D""]/g)
  Line 879:         }
  Line 880:         if (quoteMatches) {
  Line 881:           interview.quotes = quoteMatches
  Line 882:             .map(q => q.replace(/^> [\u201C""]|[\u201D""]$/g, '').trim())
  Line 883:             .filter(q => q)
  Line 884:         }
  Line 885:       }
  Line 887:       if (interview.name || interview.title) {
  Line 888:         result.interviews.push(interview)
  Line 889:       }
  Line 890:     })
  Line 892:     // 提取采访摘要
  Line 893:     const summaryMatch = text.match(/### 采访摘要与核心观点\n([\s\S]*?)$/)
  Line 894:     if (summaryMatch) {
  Line 895:       result.summary = summaryMatch[1].trim()
  Line 896:     }
  Line 897:   } catch (e) {
  Line 898:     console.warn('Parse interview failed:', e)
  Line 899:   }
  Line 901:   return result
  Line 902: }
  Line 904: const parseQuickSearch = (text) => {
  Line 905:   const result = {
  Line 906:     query: '',
  Line 907:     count: 0,
  Line 908:     facts: [],
  Line 909:     edges: [],
  Line 910:     nodes: []
  Line 911:   }
  Line 913:   try {
  Line 914:     // 提取搜索查询
  Line 915:     const queryMatch = text.match(/搜索查询:\s*(.+?)(?:\n|$)/)
  Line 916:     if (queryMatch) result.query = queryMatch[1].trim()
  Line 918:     // 提取结果数量
  Line 919:     const countMatch = text.match(/找到\s*(\d+)\s*条/)
  Line 920:     if (countMatch) result.count = parseInt(countMatch[1])
  Line 922:     // 提取相关事实 - 完整提取，不限制数量
  Line 923:     const factsSection = text.match(/### 相关事实:\n([\s\S]*)$/)
  Line 924:     if (factsSection) {
  Line 925:       const lines = factsSection[1].split('\n').filter(l => l.match(/^\d+\./))
  Line 926:       result.facts = lines.map(l => l.replace(/^\d+\.\s*/, '').trim()).filter(Boolean)
  Line 927:     }
  Line 929:     // 尝试提取边信息（如果有）
  Line 930:     const edgesSection = text.match(/### 相关边:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|$)/)
  Line 931:     if (edgesSection) {
  Line 932:       const lines = edgesSection[1].split('\n').filter(l => l.trim().startsWith('-'))
  Line 933:       result.edges = lines.map(l => {
  Line 934:         const match = l.match(/^-\s*(.+?)\s*--\[(.+?)\]-->\s*(.+)$/)
  Line 935:         if (match) {
  Line 936:           return { source: match[1].trim(), relation: match[2].trim(), target: match[3].trim() }
  Line 937:         }
  Line 938:         return null
  Line 939:       }).filter(Boolean)
  Line 940:     }
  Line 942:     // 尝试提取节点信息（如果有）
  Line 943:     const nodesSection = text.match(/### 相关节点:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|$)/)
  Line 944:     if (nodesSection) {
  Line 945:       const lines = nodesSection[1].split('\n').filter(l => l.trim().startsWith('-'))
  Line 946:       result.nodes = lines.map(l => {
  Line 947:         const match = l.match(/^-\s*\*\*(.+?)\*\*\s*\((.+?)\)/)
  Line 948:         if (match) return { name: match[1].trim(), type: match[2].trim() }
  Line 949:         const simpleMatch = l.match(/^-\s*(.+)$/)
  Line 950:         if (simpleMatch) return { name: simpleMatch[1].trim(), type: '' }
  Line 951:         return null
  Line 952:       }).filter(Boolean)
  Line 953:     }
  Line 954:   } catch (e) {
  Line 955:     console.warn('Parse quick_search failed:', e)
  Line 956:   }
  Line 958:   return result
  Line 959: }
  Line 961: // ========== Sub Components ==========

  Line 1275: }
  Line 1277: // Interview Display Component - Conversation Style (Q&A Format)
  Line 1278: const InterviewDisplay = {
  Line 1279:   props: ['result', 'resultLength'],
  Line 1280:   setup(props) {
  Line 1281:     // Format result size for display
  Line 1282:     const formatSize = (length) => {
  Line 1283:       if (!length) return ''
  Line 1284:       if (length >= 1000) {
  Line 1285:         return `${(length / 1000).toFixed(1)}k chars`
  Line 1286:       }
  Line 1287:       return `${length} chars`
  Line 1288:     }
  Line 1290:     // Clean quote text - remove leading list numbers to avoid double numbering
  Line 1291:     const cleanQuoteText = (text) => {
  Line 1292:       if (!text) return ''
  Line 1293:       // Remove leading patterns like "1. ", "2. ", "1、", "（1）", "(1)" etc.
  Line 1294:       return text.replace(/^\s*\d+[\.\、\)）]\s*/, '').trim()
  Line 1295:     }
  Line 1297:     const activeIndex = ref(0)
  Line 1298:     const expandedAnswers = ref(new Set())
  Line 1299:     // 为每个问题-回答对维护独立的平台选择状态
  Line 1300:     const platformTabs = reactive({}) // { 'agentIdx-qIdx': 'twitter' | 'reddit' }
  Line 1302:     // 获取某个问题的当前平台选择
  Line 1303:     const getPlatformTab = (agentIdx, qIdx) => {
  Line 1304:       const key = `${agentIdx}-${qIdx}`
  Line 1305:       return platformTabs[key] || 'twitter'
  Line 1306:     }
  Line 1308:     // 设置某个问题的平台选择
  Line 1309:     const setPlatformTab = (agentIdx, qIdx, platform) => {
  Line 1310:       const key = `${agentIdx}-${qIdx}`
  Line 1311:       platformTabs[key] = platform
  Line 1312:     }
  Line 1314:     const toggleAnswer = (key) => {
  Line 1315:       const newSet = new Set(expandedAnswers.value)
  Line 1316:       if (newSet.has(key)) {
  Line 1317:         newSet.delete(key)
  Line 1318:       } else {
  Line 1319:         newSet.add(key)
  Line 1320:       }
  Line 1321:       expandedAnswers.value = newSet
  Line 1322:     }
  Line 1324:     const formatAnswer = (text, expanded) => {
  Line 1325:       if (!text) return ''
  Line 1326:       if (expanded || text.length <= 400) return text
  Line 1327:       return text.substring(0, 400) + '...'
  Line 1328:     }
  Line 1330:     // 检查是否为平台占位文本
  Line 1331:     const isPlaceholderText = (text) => {
  Line 1332:       if (!text) return true
  Line 1333:       const t = text.trim()
  Line 1334:       return t === '（该平台未获得回复）' || t === '(该平台未获得回复)' || t === '[无回复]'
  Line 1335:     }
  Line 1337:     // 尝试按问题编号分割回答
  Line 1338:     const splitAnswerByQuestions = (answerText, questionCount) => {
  Line 1339:       if (!answerText || questionCount <= 0) return [answerText]
  Line 1340:       if (isPlaceholderText(answerText)) return ['']
  Line 1342:       // 支持两种编号格式：
  Line 1343:       // 1. "问题X：" 或 "问题X:" （中文格式，后端新格式）
  Line 1344:       // 2. "1. " 或 "\n1. " （数字+点，旧格式兼容）
  Line 1345:       let matches = []
  Line 1346:       let match
  Line 1348:       // 优先尝试 "问题X：" 格式
  Line 1349:       const cnPattern = /(?:^|[\r\n]+)问题(\d+)[：:]\s*/g
  Line 1350:       while ((match = cnPattern.exec(answerText)) !== null) {
  Line 1351:         matches.push({
  Line 1352:           num: parseInt(match[1]),
  Line 1353:           index: match.index,
  Line 1354:           fullMatch: match[0]
  Line 1355:         })
  Line 1356:       }
  Line 1358:       // 如果没匹配到，回退到 "数字." 格式
  Line 1359:       if (matches.length === 0) {
  Line 1360:         const numPattern = /(?:^|[\r\n]+)(\d+)\.\s+/g
  Line 1361:         while ((match = numPattern.exec(answerText)) !== null) {
  Line 1362:           matches.push({
  Line 1363:             num: parseInt(match[1]),
  Line 1364:             index: match.index,
  Line 1365:             fullMatch: match[0]
  Line 1366:           })
  Line 1367:         }
  Line 1368:       }
  Line 1370:       // 如果没有找到编号或只找到一个，返回整体
  Line 1371:       if (matches.length <= 1) {
  Line 1372:         const cleaned = answerText
  Line 1373:           .replace(/^问题\d+[：:]\s*/, '')
  Line 1374:           .replace(/^\d+\.\s+/, '')
  Line 1375:           .trim()
  Line 1376:         return [cleaned || answerText]
  Line 1377:       }
  Line 1379:       // 按编号提取各部分
  Line 1380:       const parts = []
  Line 1381:       for (let i = 0; i < matches.length; i++) {
  Line 1382:         const current = matches[i]
  Line 1383:         const next = matches[i + 1]
  Line 1385:         const startIdx = current.index + current.fullMatch.length
  Line 1386:         const endIdx = next ? next.index : answerText.length
  Line 1388:         let part = answerText.substring(startIdx, endIdx).trim()
  Line 1389:         part = part.replace(/[\r\n]+$/, '').trim()
  Line 1390:         parts.push(part)
  Line 1391:       }
  Line 1393:       if (parts.length > 0 && parts.some(p => p)) {
  Line 1394:         return parts
  Line 1395:       }
  Line 1397:       return [answerText]
  Line 1398:     }
  Line 1400:     // 获取某个问题对应的回答
  Line 1401:     const getAnswerForQuestion = (interview, qIdx, platform) => {
  Line 1402:       const answer = platform === 'twitter' ? interview.twitterAnswer : (interview.redditAnswer || interview.twitterAnswer)
  Line 1403:       if (!answer || isPlaceholderText(answer)) return answer || ''
  Line 1405:       const questionCount = interview.questions?.length || 1
  Line 1406:       const answers = splitAnswerByQuestions(answer, questionCount)
  Line 1408:       // 分割成功且索引有效
  Line 1409:       if (answers.length > 1 && qIdx < answers.length) {
  Line 1410:         return answers[qIdx] || ''
  Line 1411:       }
  Line 1413:       // 分割失败：第一个问题返回完整回答，其余返回空
  Line 1414:       return qIdx === 0 ? answer : ''
  Line 1415:     }
  Line 1417:     // 检查某个问题是否有双平台回答（过滤占位文本）
  Line 1418:     const hasMultiplePlatforms = (interview, qIdx) => {
  Line 1419:       if (!interview.twitterAnswer || !interview.redditAnswer) return false
  Line 1420:       const twitterAnswer = getAnswerForQuestion(interview, qIdx, 'twitter')
  Line 1421:       const redditAnswer = getAnswerForQuestion(interview, qIdx, 'reddit')
  Line 1422:       // 两个平台都有真实回答（非占位文本）且内容不同
  Line 1423:       return !isPlaceholderText(twitterAnswer) && !isPlaceholderText(redditAnswer) && twitterAnswer !== redditAnswer
  Line 1424:     }
  Line 1426:     return () => h('div', { class: 'interview-display' }, [
  Line 1427:       // Header Section
  Line 1428:       h('div', { class: 'interview-header' }, [
  Line 1429:         h('div', { class: 'header-main' }, [
  Line 1430:           h('div', { class: 'header-title' }, 'Agent Interview'),

  Line 1702:         ])
  Line 1703:       ])
  Line 1704:     ])
  Line 1705:   }
  Line 1706: }
  Line 1708: // Computed
  Line 1709: const statusClass = computed(() => {
  Line 1710:   if (isComplete.value) return 'completed'
  Line 1711:   if (agentLogs.value.length > 0) return 'processing'
  Line 1712:   return 'pending'
  Line 1713: })

  Line 1716:   if (isComplete.value) return 'Completed'
  Line 1717:   if (agentLogs.value.length > 0) return 'Generating...'
  Line 1718:   return 'Waiting'
  Line 1719: })
  Line 1721: const totalSections = computed(() => {
  Line 1722:   return reportOutline.value?.sections?.length || 0
  Line 1723: })
  Line 1725: const completedSections = computed(() => {
  Line 1726:   return Object.keys(generatedSections.value).length
  Line 1727: })
  Line 1729: const progressPercent = computed(() => {
  Line 1730:   if (totalSections.value === 0) return 0
  Line 1731:   return Math.round((completedSections.value / totalSections.value) * 100)
  Line 1732: })
  Line 1734: const totalToolCalls = computed(() => {
  Line 1735:   return agentLogs.value.filter(l => l.action === 'tool_call').length
  Line 1736: })
  Line 1738: const formatElapsedTime = computed(() => {
  Line 1739:   if (!startTime.value) return '0s'
  Line 1740:   const lastLog = agentLogs.value[agentLogs.value.length - 1]
  Line 1741:   const elapsed = lastLog?.elapsed_seconds || 0
  Line 1742:   if (elapsed < 60) return `${Math.round(elapsed)}s`
  Line 1743:   const mins = Math.floor(elapsed / 60)
  Line 1744:   const secs = Math.round(elapsed % 60)
  Line 1745:   return `${mins}m ${secs}s`
  Line 1746: })
  Line 1748: const displayLogs = computed(() => {
  Line 1749:   return agentLogs.value
  Line 1750: })
  Line 1752: // Workflow steps overview (status-based, no nested cards)
  Line 1753: const activeSectionIndex = computed(() => {
  Line 1754:   if (isComplete.value) return null
  Line 1755:   if (currentSectionIndex.value) return currentSectionIndex.value
  Line 1756:   if (totalSections.value > 0 && completedSections.value < totalSections.value) return completedSections.value + 1
  Line 1757:   return null
  Line 1758: })
  Line 1760: const isPlanningDone = computed(() => {

  Line 1762: })

  Line 1766: })
  Line 1768: const isFinalizing = computed(() => {

  Line 1770: })
  Line 1772: // 当前活跃的步骤（用于顶部显示）
  Line 1773: const activeStep = computed(() => {
  Line 1774:   const steps = workflowSteps.value
  Line 1775:   // 找到当前 active 的步骤
  Line 1776:   const active = steps.find(s => s.status === 'active')
  Line 1777:   if (active) return active
  Line 1779:   // 如果没有 active，返回最后一个 done 的步骤
  Line 1780:   const doneSteps = steps.filter(s => s.status === 'done')
  Line 1781:   if (doneSteps.length > 0) return doneSteps[doneSteps.length - 1]
  Line 1783:   // 否则返回第一个步骤
  Line 1784:   return steps[0] || { noLabel: '--', title: '等待开始', status: 'todo', meta: '' }
  Line 1785: })
  Line 1787: const workflowSteps = computed(() => {
  Line 1788:   const steps = []
  Line 1790:   // Planning / Outline
  Line 1791:   const planningStatus = isPlanningDone.value ? 'done' : (isPlanningStarted.value ? 'active' : 'todo')
  Line 1792:   steps.push({
  Line 1793:     key: 'planning',
  Line 1794:     noLabel: 'PL',
  Line 1795:     title: 'Planning / Outline',
  Line 1796:     status: planningStatus,
  Line 1797:     meta: planningStatus === 'active' ? 'IN PROGRESS' : ''
  Line 1798:   })
  Line 1800:   // Sections (if outline exists)
  Line 1801:   const sections = reportOutline.value?.sections || []
  Line 1802:   sections.forEach((section, i) => {
  Line 1803:     const idx = i + 1
  Line 1804:     const status = (isComplete.value || !!generatedSections.value[idx])
  Line 1805:       ? 'done'
  Line 1806:       : (activeSectionIndex.value === idx ? 'active' : 'todo')
  Line 1808:     steps.push({
  Line 1809:       key: `section-${idx}`,
  Line 1810:       noLabel: String(idx).padStart(2, '0'),
  Line 1811:       title: section.title,
  Line 1812:       status,
  Line 1813:       meta: status === 'active' ? 'IN PROGRESS' : ''
  Line 1814:     })
  Line 1815:   })
  Line 1817:   // Complete
  Line 1818:   const completeStatus = isComplete.value ? 'done' : (isFinalizing.value ? 'active' : 'todo')
  Line 1819:   steps.push({
  Line 1820:     key: 'complete',
  Line 1821:     noLabel: 'OK',
  Line 1822:     title: 'Complete',
  Line 1823:     status: completeStatus,
  Line 1824:     meta: completeStatus === 'active' ? 'FINALIZING' : ''
  Line 1825:   })
  Line 1827:   return steps
  Line 1828: })
  Line 1830: // Methods

  Line 1833: }
  Line 1835: const isSectionCompleted = (sectionIndex) => {

  Line 1837: }
  Line 1839: const formatTime = (timestamp) => {
  Line 1840:   if (!timestamp) return ''
  Line 1841:   try {
  Line 1842:     return new Date(timestamp).toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {
  Line 1843:       hour12: false,
  Line 1844:       hour: '2-digit',
  Line 1845:       minute: '2-digit',
  Line 1846:       second: '2-digit'
  Line 1847:     })
  Line 1848:   } catch {
  Line 1849:     return ''
  Line 1850:   }
  Line 1851: }
  Line 1853: const formatParams = (params) => {

  Line 1855:   try {
  Line 1856:     return JSON.stringify(params, null, 2)
  Line 1857:   } catch {
  Line 1858:     return String(params)
  Line 1859:   }
  Line 1860: }
  Line 1862: const formatResultSize = (length) => {
  Line 1863:   if (!length) return ''
  Line 1864:   if (length < 1000) return `${length} chars`
  Line 1865:   return `${(length / 1000).toFixed(1)}k chars`
  Line 1866: }
  Line 1868: const truncateText = (text, maxLen) => {
  Line 1869:   if (!text) return ''
  Line 1870:   if (text.length <= maxLen) return text
  Line 1871:   return text.substring(0, maxLen) + '...'
  Line 1872: }
  Line 1874: const renderMarkdown = (content) => {
  Line 1875:   if (!content) return ''
  Line 1877:   // 去掉开头的二级标题（## xxx），因为章节标题已在外层显示
  Line 1878:   let processedContent = content.replace(/^##\s+.+\n+/, '')
  Line 1880:   // 处理代码块
  Line 1881:   let html = processedContent.replace(/```(\w*)\n([\s\S]*?)```/g, '<pre class="code-block"><code>$2</code></pre>')
  Line 1883:   // 处理行内代码
  Line 1884:   html = html.replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code class="inline-code">$1</code>')
  Line 1886:   // 处理标题
  Line 1887:   html = html.replace(/^#### (.+)$/gm, '<h5 class="md-h5">$1</h5>')
  Line 1888:   html = html.replace(/^### (.+)$/gm, '<h4 class="md-h4">$1</h4>')
  Line 1889:   html = html.replace(/^## (.+)$/gm, '<h3 class="md-h3">$1</h3>')
  Line 1890:   html = html.replace(/^# (.+)$/gm, '<h2 class="md-h2">$1</h2>')
  Line 1892:   // 处理引用块
  Line 1893:   html = html.replace(/^> (.+)$/gm, '<blockquote class="md-quote">$1</blockquote>')
  Line 1895:   // 处理列表 - 支持子列表
  Line 1896:   html = html.replace(/^(\s*)- (.+)$/gm, (match, indent, text) => {
  Line 1897:     const level = Math.floor(indent.length / 2)
  Line 1898:     return `<li class="md-li" data-level="${level}">${text}</li>`
  Line 1899:   })
  Line 1900:   html = html.replace(/^(\s*)(\d+)\. (.+)$/gm, (match, indent, num, text) => {
  Line 1901:     const level = Math.floor(indent.length / 2)
  Line 1902:     return `<li class="md-oli" data-level="${level}">${text}</li>`
  Line 1903:   })
  Line 1905:   // 包装无序列表
  Line 1906:   html = html.replace(/(<li class="md-li"[^>]*>.*?<\/li>\s*)+/g, '<ul class="md-ul">$&</ul>')
  Line 1907:   // 包装有序列表
  Line 1908:   html = html.replace(/(<li class="md-oli"[^>]*>.*?<\/li>\s*)+/g, '<ol class="md-ol">$&</ol>')
  Line 1910:   // 清理列表项之间的所有空白
  Line 1911:   html = html.replace(/<\/li>\s+<li/g, '</li><li')
  Line 1912:   // 清理列表开始标签后的空白
  Line 1913:   html = html.replace(/<ul class="md-ul">\s+/g, '<ul class="md-ul">')
  Line 1914:   html = html.replace(/<ol class="md-ol">\s+/g, '<ol class="md-ol">')
  Line 1915:   // 清理列表结束标签前的空白
  Line 1916:   html = html.replace(/\s+<\/ul>/g, '</ul>')
  Line 1917:   html = html.replace(/\s+<\/ol>/g, '</ol>')
  Line 1919:   // 处理粗体和斜体
  Line 1920:   html = html.replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
  Line 1921:   html = html.replace(/\*(.+?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
  Line 1922:   html = html.replace(/_(.+?)_/g, '<em>$1</em>')
  Line 1924:   // 处理分隔线
  Line 1925:   html = html.replace(/^---$/gm, '<hr class="md-hr">')
  Line 1927:   // 处理换行 - 空行变成段落分隔，单换行变成 <br>
  Line 1928:   html = html.replace(/\n\n/g, '</p><p class="md-p">')
  Line 1929:   html = html.replace(/\n/g, '<br>')
  Line 1931:   // 包装在段落中
  Line 1932:   html = '<p class="md-p">' + html + '</p>'
  Line 1934:   // 清理空段落
  Line 1935:   html = html.replace(/<p class="md-p"><\/p>/g, '')
  Line 1936:   html = html.replace(/<p class="md-p">(<h[2-5])/g, '$1')
  Line 1937:   html = html.replace(/(<\/h[2-5]>)<\/p>/g, '$1')
  Line 1938:   html = html.replace(/<p class="md-p">(<ul|<ol|<blockquote|<pre|<hr)/g, '$1')
  Line 1939:   html = html.replace(/(<\/ul>|<\/ol>|<\/blockquote>|<\/pre>)<\/p>/g, '$1')
  Line 1940:   // 清理块级元素前后的 <br> 标签
  Line 1941:   html = html.replace(/<br>\s*(<ul|<ol|<blockquote)/g, '$1')
  Line 1942:   html = html.replace(/(<\/ul>|<\/ol>|<\/blockquote>)\s*<br>/g, '$1')
  Line 1943:   // 清理 <p><br> 紧跟块级元素的情况（多余空行导致）
  Line 1944:   html = html.replace(/<p class="md-p">(<br>\s*)+(<ul|<ol|<blockquote|<pre|<hr)/g, '$2')
  Line 1945:   // 清理连续的 <br> 标签
  Line 1946:   html = html.replace(/(<br>\s*){2,}/g, '<br>')
  Line 1947:   // 清理块级元素后紧跟的段落开始标签前的 <br>
  Line 1948:   html = html.replace(/(<\/ol>|<\/ul>|<\/blockquote>)<br>(<p|<div)/g, '$1$2')
  Line 1950:   // 修复非连续有序列表的编号：当单项 <ol> 被段落内容隔开时，保持编号递增
  Line 1951:   const tokens = html.split(/(<ol class="md-ol">(?:<li class="md-oli"[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/li>)+<\/ol>)/g)
  Line 1952:   let olCounter = 0
  Line 1953:   let inSequence = false
  Line 1954:   for (let i = 0; i < tokens.length; i++) {
  Line 1955:     if (tokens[i].startsWith('<ol class="md-ol">')) {
  Line 1956:       const liCount = (tokens[i].match(/<li class="md-oli"/g) || []).length
  Line 1957:       if (liCount === 1) {
  Line 1958:         olCounter++
  Line 1959:         if (olCounter > 1) {
  Line 1960:           tokens[i] = tokens[i].replace('<ol class="md-ol">', `<ol class="md-ol" start="${olCounter}">`)
  Line 1961:         }
  Line 1962:         inSequence = true
  Line 1963:       } else {
  Line 1964:         olCounter = 0
  Line 1965:         inSequence = false
  Line 1966:       }
  Line 1967:     } else if (inSequence) {
  Line 1968:       if (/<h[2-5]/.test(tokens[i])) {
  Line 1969:         olCounter = 0
  Line 1970:         inSequence = false
  Line 1971:       }
  Line 1972:     }
  Line 1973:   }
  Line 1974:   html = tokens.join('')
  Line 1976:   return html
  Line 1977: }
  Line 1979: const getTimelineItemClass = (log, idx, total) => {
  Line 1980:   const isLatest = idx === total - 1 && !isComplete.value
  Line 1981:   const isMilestone = log.action === 'section_complete' || log.action === 'report_complete'
  Line 1982:   return {
  Line 1983:     'node--active': isLatest,
  Line 1984:     'node--done': !isLatest && isMilestone,
  Line 1985:     'node--muted': !isLatest && !isMilestone,
  Line 1986:     'node--tool': log.action === 'tool_call' || log.action === 'tool_result'
  Line 1987:   }
  Line 1988: }
  Line 1990: const getConnectorClass = (log, idx, total) => {
  Line 1991:   const isLatest = idx === total - 1 && !isComplete.value
  Line 1992:   if (isLatest) return 'dot-active'
  Line 1993:   if (log.action === 'section_complete' || log.action === 'report_complete') return 'dot-done'
  Line 1994:   return 'dot-muted'
  Line 1995: }
  Line 1997: const getActionLabel = (action) => {

  Line 1999:     'report_start': 'Report Started',
  Line 2000:     'planning_start': 'Planning',
  Line 2001:     'planning_complete': 'Plan Complete',

  Line 2008:     'report_complete': 'Complete'

  Line 2013: const getLogLevelClass = (log) => {
  Line 2014:   if (log.includes('ERROR') || log.includes('错误')) return 'error'
  Line 2015:   if (log.includes('WARNING') || log.includes('警告')) return 'warning'
  Line 2016:   // INFO 使用默认颜色，不标记为 success
  Line 2017:   return ''
  Line 2018: }
  Line 2020: // Polling
  Line 2021: let agentLogTimer = null
  Line 2022: let consoleLogTimer = null
  Line 2024: const fetchAgentLog = async () => {
  Line 2025:   if (!props.reportId) return
  Line 2027:   try {
  Line 2028:     const res = await getAgentLog(props.reportId, agentLogLine.value)
  Line 2030:     if (res.success && res.data) {
  Line 2031:       const newLogs = res.data.logs || []
  Line 2033:       if (newLogs.length > 0) {
  Line 2034:         newLogs.forEach(log => {
  Line 2035:           agentLogs.value.push(log)
  Line 2037:           if (log.action === 'planning_complete' && log.details?.outline) {
  Line 2038:             reportOutline.value = log.details.outline
  Line 2039:           }
  Line 2041:           if (log.action === 'section_start') {
  Line 2042:             currentSectionIndex.value = log.section_index
  Line 2043:           }
  Line 2045:           // section_complete - 章节生成完成
  Line 2046:           if (log.action === 'section_complete') {
  Line 2047:             if (log.details?.content) {
  Line 2048:               generatedSections.value[log.section_index] = log.details.content
  Line 2049:               // 自动展开刚生成的章节
  Line 2050:               expandedContent.value.add(log.section_index - 1)
  Line 2051:               currentSectionIndex.value = null
  Line 2052:             }
  Line 2053:           }
  Line 2055:           if (log.action === 'report_complete') {
  Line 2056:             isComplete.value = true
  Line 2057:             currentSectionIndex.value = null  // 确保清除 loading 状态
  Line 2058:             emit('update-status', 'completed')
  Line 2059:             stopPolling()
  Line 2060:             // 滚动逻辑统一在循环结束后的 nextTick 中处理
  Line 2061:           }
  Line 2063:           if (log.action === 'report_start') {
  Line 2064:             startTime.value = new Date(log.timestamp)
  Line 2065:           }
  Line 2066:         })
  Line 2068:         agentLogLine.value = res.data.from_line + newLogs.length
  Line 2070:         nextTick(() => {
  Line 2071:           if (rightPanel.value) {
  Line 2072:             // 如果任务已完成，滚动到顶部；否则滚动到底部跟随最新日志
  Line 2073:             if (isComplete.value) {
  Line 2074:               rightPanel.value.scrollTop = 0
  Line 2075:             } else {
  Line 2076:               rightPanel.value.scrollTop = rightPanel.value.scrollHeight
  Line 2077:             }
  Line 2078:           }
  Line 2079:         })
  Line 2080:       }
  Line 2081:     }
  Line 2082:   } catch (err) {
  Line 2083:     console.warn('Failed to fetch agent log:', err)
  Line 2084:   }
  Line 2085: }
  Line 2087: // 提取最终答案内容 - 从 LLM response 中提取章节内容
  Line 2088: const extractFinalContent = (response) => {
  Line 2089:   if (!response) return null
  Line 2091:   // 尝试提取 <final_answer> 标签内的内容
  Line 2092:   const finalAnswerTagMatch = response.match(/<final_answer>([\s\S]*?)<\/final_answer>/)
  Line 2093:   if (finalAnswerTagMatch) {
  Line 2094:     return finalAnswerTagMatch[1].trim()
  Line 2095:   }
  Line 2097:   // 尝试找 Final Answer: 后面的内容（支持多种格式）
  Line 2098:   // 格式1: Final Answer:\n\n内容
  Line 2099:   // 格式2: Final Answer: 内容
  Line 2100:   const finalAnswerMatch = response.match(/Final\s*Answer:\s*\n*([\s\S]*)$/i)
  Line 2101:   if (finalAnswerMatch) {
  Line 2102:     return finalAnswerMatch[1].trim()
  Line 2103:   }
  Line 2105:   // 尝试找 最终答案: 后面的内容
  Line 2106:   const chineseFinalMatch = response.match(/最终答案[:：]\s*\n*([\s\S]*)$/i)
  Line 2107:   if (chineseFinalMatch) {
  Line 2108:     return chineseFinalMatch[1].trim()
  Line 2109:   }
  Line 2111:   // 如果以 ## 或 # 或 > 开头，可能是直接的 markdown 内容
  Line 2112:   const trimmedResponse = response.trim()
  Line 2113:   if (trimmedResponse.match(/^[#>]/)) {
  Line 2114:     return trimmedResponse
  Line 2115:   }
  Line 2117:   // 如果内容较长且包含markdown格式，尝试移除思考过程后返回
  Line 2118:   if (response.length > 300 && (response.includes('**') || response.includes('>'))) {
  Line 2119:     // 移除 Thought: 开头的思考过程
  Line 2120:     const thoughtMatch = response.match(/^Thought:[\s\S]*?(?=\n\n[^T]|\n\n$)/i)
  Line 2121:     if (thoughtMatch) {
  Line 2122:       const afterThought = response.substring(thoughtMatch[0].length).trim()
  Line 2123:       if (afterThought.length > 100) {
  Line 2124:         return afterThought
  Line 2125:       }
  Line 2126:     }
  Line 2127:   }
  Line 2129:   return null
  Line 2130: }
  Line 2132: const fetchConsoleLog = async () => {
  Line 2133:   if (!props.reportId) return
  Line 2135:   try {
  Line 2136:     const res = await getConsoleLog(props.reportId, consoleLogLine.value)
  Line 2138:     if (res.success && res.data) {
  Line 2139:       const newLogs = res.data.logs || []
  Line 2141:       if (newLogs.length > 0) {
  Line 2142:         consoleLogs.value.push(...newLogs)
  Line 2143:         consoleLogLine.value = res.data.from_line + newLogs.length
  Line 2145:         nextTick(() => {
  Line 2146:           if (logContent.value) {
  Line 2147:             logContent.value.scrollTop = logContent.value.scrollHeight
  Line 2148:           }
  Line 2149:         })
  Line 2150:       }
  Line 2151:     }
  Line 2152:   } catch (err) {
  Line 2153:     console.warn('Failed to fetch console log:', err)
  Line 2154:   }
  Line 2155: }
  Line 2157: const startPolling = () => {
  Line 2158:   if (agentLogTimer || consoleLogTimer) return
  Line 2160:   fetchAgentLog()
  Line 2161:   fetchConsoleLog()
  Line 2163:   agentLogTimer = setInterval(fetchAgentLog, 2000)
  Line 2164:   consoleLogTimer = setInterval(fetchConsoleLog, 1500)
  Line 2165: }
  Line 2167: const stopPolling = () => {
  Line 2168:   if (agentLogTimer) {
  Line 2169:     clearInterval(agentLogTimer)
  Line 2170:     agentLogTimer = null
  Line 2171:   }
  Line 2172:   if (consoleLogTimer) {
  Line 2173:     clearInterval(consoleLogTimer)
  Line 2174:     consoleLogTimer = null
  Line 2175:   }
  Line 2176: }
  Line 2178: // Lifecycle
  Line 2179: onMounted(() => {
  Line 2180:   if (props.reportId) {
  Line 2181:     addLog(`Report Agent initialized: ${props.reportId}`)
  Line 2182:     startPolling()
  Line 2183:   }
  Line 2184: })
  Line 2186: onUnmounted(() => {
  Line 2187:   stopPolling()
  Line 2188: })
  Line 2190: watch(() => props.reportId, (newId) => {
  Line 2191:   if (newId) {
  Line 2192:     agentLogs.value = []
  Line 2193:     consoleLogs.value = []
  Line 2194:     agentLogLine.value = 0
  Line 2195:     consoleLogLine.value = 0
  Line 2196:     reportOutline.value = null
  Line 2197:     currentSectionIndex.value = null
  Line 2198:     generatedSections.value = {}
  Line 2199:     expandedContent.value = new Set()
  Line 2200:     expandedLogs.value = new Set()
  Line 2201:     collapsedSections.value = new Set()
  Line 2202:     isComplete.value = false
  Line 2203:     startTime.value = null
  Line 2205:     startPolling()
  Line 2206:   }
  Line 2207: }, { immediate: true })
  Line 2208: </script>
