  Line 411: </template>
  Line 413: <script setup>
  Line 414: import { ref, computed, watch, onMounted, onUnmounted, nextTick } from 'vue'
  Line 415: import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
  Line 416: import { chatWithReport, getReport, getAgentLog } from '../api/report'
  Line 417: import { interviewAgents, getSimulationProfilesRealtime } from '../api/simulation'
  Line 419: const { t } = useI18n()
  Line 421: const props = defineProps({
  Line 422:   reportId: String,
  Line 423:   simulationId: String
  Line 424: })
  Line 426: const emit = defineEmits(['add-log', 'update-status'])
  Line 428: // State
  Line 429: const activeTab = ref('chat')
  Line 430: const chatTarget = ref('report_agent')
  Line 431: const showAgentDropdown = ref(false)
  Line 432: const selectedAgent = ref(null)
  Line 433: const selectedAgentIndex = ref(null)
  Line 434: const showFullProfile = ref(true)
  Line 435: const showToolsDetail = ref(true)
  Line 437: // Chat State
  Line 438: const chatInput = ref('')
  Line 439: const chatHistory = ref([])
  Line 440: const chatHistoryCache = ref({}) // 缓存所有对话记录: { 'report_agent': [], 'agent_0': [], 'agent_1': [], ... }
  Line 441: const isSending = ref(false)
  Line 442: const chatMessages = ref(null)
  Line 443: const chatInputRef = ref(null)
  Line 445: // Survey State
  Line 446: const selectedAgents = ref(new Set())
  Line 447: const surveyQuestion = ref('')
  Line 448: const surveyResults = ref([])
  Line 449: const isSurveying = ref(false)
  Line 451: // Report Data
  Line 452: const reportOutline = ref(null)
  Line 453: const generatedSections = ref({})
  Line 454: const collapsedSections = ref(new Set())
  Line 455: const currentSectionIndex = ref(null)
  Line 456: const profiles = ref([])
  Line 458: // Helper Methods
  Line 459: const isSectionCompleted = (sectionIndex) => {
  Line 460:   return !!generatedSections.value[sectionIndex]
  Line 461: }
  Line 463: // Refs
  Line 464: const leftPanel = ref(null)
  Line 465: const rightPanel = ref(null)
  Line 467: // Methods
  Line 468: const addLog = (msg) => {
  Line 469:   emit('add-log', msg)
  Line 470: }
  Line 472: const toggleSectionCollapse = (idx) => {
  Line 473:   if (!generatedSections.value[idx + 1]) return
  Line 474:   const newSet = new Set(collapsedSections.value)
  Line 475:   if (newSet.has(idx)) {
  Line 476:     newSet.delete(idx)
  Line 477:   } else {
  Line 478:     newSet.add(idx)
  Line 479:   }
  Line 480:   collapsedSections.value = newSet
  Line 481: }
  Line 483: const selectChatTarget = (target) => {
  Line 484:   chatTarget.value = target
  Line 485:   if (target === 'report_agent') {
  Line 486:     showAgentDropdown.value = false
  Line 487:   }
  Line 488: }
  Line 490: // 保存当前对话记录到缓存
  Line 491: const saveChatHistory = () => {
  Line 492:   if (chatHistory.value.length === 0) return
  Line 494:   if (chatTarget.value === 'report_agent') {
  Line 495:     chatHistoryCache.value['report_agent'] = [...chatHistory.value]
  Line 496:   } else if (selectedAgentIndex.value !== null) {
  Line 497:     chatHistoryCache.value[`agent_${selectedAgentIndex.value}`] = [...chatHistory.value]
  Line 498:   }
  Line 499: }
  Line 501: const selectReportAgentChat = () => {
  Line 502:   // 保存当前对话记录
  Line 503:   saveChatHistory()
  Line 505:   activeTab.value = 'chat'
  Line 506:   chatTarget.value = 'report_agent'
  Line 507:   selectedAgent.value = null
  Line 508:   selectedAgentIndex.value = null
  Line 509:   showAgentDropdown.value = false
  Line 511:   // 恢复 Report Agent 的对话记录
  Line 512:   chatHistory.value = chatHistoryCache.value['report_agent'] || []
  Line 513: }
  Line 515: const selectSurveyTab = () => {
  Line 516:   activeTab.value = 'survey'
  Line 517:   selectedAgent.value = null
  Line 518:   selectedAgentIndex.value = null
  Line 519:   showAgentDropdown.value = false
  Line 520: }
  Line 522: const toggleAgentDropdown = () => {
  Line 523:   showAgentDropdown.value = !showAgentDropdown.value
  Line 524:   if (showAgentDropdown.value) {
  Line 525:     activeTab.value = 'chat'
  Line 526:     chatTarget.value = 'agent'
  Line 527:   }
  Line 528: }
  Line 530: const selectAgent = (agent, idx) => {
  Line 531:   // 保存当前对话记录
  Line 532:   saveChatHistory()
  Line 534:   selectedAgent.value = agent
  Line 535:   selectedAgentIndex.value = idx
  Line 536:   chatTarget.value = 'agent'
  Line 537:   showAgentDropdown.value = false
  Line 539:   // 恢复该 Agent 的对话记录
  Line 540:   chatHistory.value = chatHistoryCache.value[`agent_${idx}`] || []
  Line 541:   addLog(t('log.selectChatTarget', { name: agent.username }))
  Line 542: }
  Line 544: const formatTime = (timestamp) => {
  Line 545:   if (!timestamp) return ''
  Line 546:   try {
  Line 547:     return new Date(timestamp).toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {
  Line 548:       hour12: false,
  Line 549:       hour: '2-digit',
  Line 550:       minute: '2-digit'
  Line 551:     })
  Line 552:   } catch {
  Line 553:     return ''
  Line 554:   }
  Line 555: }
  Line 557: const renderMarkdown = (content) => {
  Line 558:   if (!content) return ''
  Line 560:   let processedContent = content.replace(/^##\s+.+\n+/, '')
  Line 561:   let html = processedContent.replace(/```(\w*)\n([\s\S]*?)```/g, '<pre class="code-block"><code>$2</code></pre>')
  Line 562:   html = html.replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code class="inline-code">$1</code>')
  Line 563:   html = html.replace(/^#### (.+)$/gm, '<h5 class="md-h5">$1</h5>')
  Line 564:   html = html.replace(/^### (.+)$/gm, '<h4 class="md-h4">$1</h4>')
  Line 565:   html = html.replace(/^## (.+)$/gm, '<h3 class="md-h3">$1</h3>')
  Line 566:   html = html.replace(/^# (.+)$/gm, '<h2 class="md-h2">$1</h2>')
  Line 567:   html = html.replace(/^> (.+)$/gm, '<blockquote class="md-quote">$1</blockquote>')
  Line 569:   // 处理列表 - 支持子列表
  Line 570:   html = html.replace(/^(\s*)- (.+)$/gm, (match, indent, text) => {
  Line 571:     const level = Math.floor(indent.length / 2)
  Line 572:     return `<li class="md-li" data-level="${level}">${text}</li>`
  Line 573:   })
  Line 574:   html = html.replace(/^(\s*)(\d+)\. (.+)$/gm, (match, indent, num, text) => {
  Line 575:     const level = Math.floor(indent.length / 2)
  Line 576:     return `<li class="md-oli" data-level="${level}">${text}</li>`
  Line 577:   })
  Line 579:   // 包装无序列表
  Line 580:   html = html.replace(/(<li class="md-li"[^>]*>.*?<\/li>\s*)+/g, '<ul class="md-ul">$&</ul>')
  Line 581:   // 包装有序列表
  Line 582:   html = html.replace(/(<li class="md-oli"[^>]*>.*?<\/li>\s*)+/g, '<ol class="md-ol">$&</ol>')
  Line 584:   // 清理列表项之间的所有空白
  Line 585:   html = html.replace(/<\/li>\s+<li/g, '</li><li')
  Line 586:   // 清理列表开始标签后的空白
  Line 587:   html = html.replace(/<ul class="md-ul">\s+/g, '<ul class="md-ul">')
  Line 588:   html = html.replace(/<ol class="md-ol">\s+/g, '<ol class="md-ol">')
  Line 589:   // 清理列表结束标签前的空白
  Line 590:   html = html.replace(/\s+<\/ul>/g, '</ul>')
  Line 591:   html = html.replace(/\s+<\/ol>/g, '</ol>')
  Line 593:   html = html.replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
  Line 594:   html = html.replace(/\*(.+?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
  Line 595:   html = html.replace(/_(.+?)_/g, '<em>$1</em>')
  Line 596:   html = html.replace(/^---$/gm, '<hr class="md-hr">')
  Line 597:   html = html.replace(/\n\n/g, '</p><p class="md-p">')
  Line 598:   html = html.replace(/\n/g, '<br>')
  Line 599:   html = '<p class="md-p">' + html + '</p>'
  Line 600:   html = html.replace(/<p class="md-p"><\/p>/g, '')
  Line 601:   html = html.replace(/<p class="md-p">(<h[2-5])/g, '$1')
  Line 602:   html = html.replace(/(<\/h[2-5]>)<\/p>/g, '$1')
  Line 603:   html = html.replace(/<p class="md-p">(<ul|<ol|<blockquote|<pre|<hr)/g, '$1')
  Line 604:   html = html.replace(/(<\/ul>|<\/ol>|<\/blockquote>|<\/pre>)<\/p>/g, '$1')
  Line 605:   // 清理块级元素前后的 <br> 标签
  Line 606:   html = html.replace(/<br>\s*(<ul|<ol|<blockquote)/g, '$1')
  Line 607:   html = html.replace(/(<\/ul>|<\/ol>|<\/blockquote>)\s*<br>/g, '$1')
  Line 608:   // 清理 <p><br> 紧跟块级元素的情况（多余空行导致）
  Line 609:   html = html.replace(/<p class="md-p">(<br>\s*)+(<ul|<ol|<blockquote|<pre|<hr)/g, '$2')
  Line 610:   // 清理连续的 <br> 标签
  Line 611:   html = html.replace(/(<br>\s*){2,}/g, '<br>')
  Line 612:   // 清理块级元素后紧跟的段落开始标签前的 <br>
  Line 613:   html = html.replace(/(<\/ol>|<\/ul>|<\/blockquote>)<br>(<p|<div)/g, '$1$2')
  Line 615:   // 修复非连续有序列表的编号：当单项 <ol> 被段落内容隔开时，保持编号递增
  Line 616:   const tokens = html.split(/(<ol class="md-ol">(?:<li class="md-oli"[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/li>)+<\/ol>)/g)
  Line 617:   let olCounter = 0
  Line 618:   let inSequence = false
  Line 619:   for (let i = 0; i < tokens.length; i++) {
  Line 620:     if (tokens[i].startsWith('<ol class="md-ol">')) {
  Line 621:       const liCount = (tokens[i].match(/<li class="md-oli"/g) || []).length
  Line 622:       if (liCount === 1) {
  Line 623:         olCounter++
  Line 624:         if (olCounter > 1) {
  Line 625:           tokens[i] = tokens[i].replace('<ol class="md-ol">', `<ol class="md-ol" start="${olCounter}">`)
  Line 626:         }
  Line 627:         inSequence = true
  Line 628:       } else {
  Line 629:         olCounter = 0
  Line 630:         inSequence = false
  Line 631:       }
  Line 632:     } else if (inSequence) {
  Line 633:       if (/<h[2-5]/.test(tokens[i])) {
  Line 634:         olCounter = 0
  Line 635:         inSequence = false
  Line 636:       }
  Line 637:     }
  Line 638:   }
  Line 639:   html = tokens.join('')
  Line 641:   return html
  Line 642: }
  Line 644: // Chat Methods
  Line 645: const sendMessage = async () => {
  Line 646:   if (!chatInput.value.trim() || isSending.value) return
  Line 648:   const message = chatInput.value.trim()
  Line 649:   chatInput.value = ''
  Line 651:   // Add user message
  Line 652:   chatHistory.value.push({
  Line 653:     role: 'user',
  Line 654:     content: message,
  Line 655:     timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  Line 656:   })
  Line 658:   scrollToBottom()
  Line 659:   isSending.value = true
  Line 661:   try {
  Line 662:     if (chatTarget.value === 'report_agent') {
  Line 663:       await sendToReportAgent(message)
  Line 664:     } else {
  Line 665:       await sendToAgent(message)
  Line 666:     }
  Line 667:   } catch (err) {
  Line 668:     addLog(t('log.sendFailed', { error: err.message }))
  Line 669:     chatHistory.value.push({
  Line 670:       role: 'assistant',
  Line 671:       content: t('step5.errorOccurred', { error: err.message }),
  Line 672:       timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  Line 673:     })
  Line 674:   } finally {
  Line 675:     isSending.value = false
  Line 676:     scrollToBottom()
  Line 677:     // 自动保存对话记录到缓存
  Line 678:     saveChatHistory()
  Line 679:   }
  Line 680: }
  Line 682: const sendToReportAgent = async (message) => {
  Line 683:   addLog(t('log.sendToReportAgent', { message: message.substring(0, 50) }))
  Line 685:   // Build chat history for API
  Line 686:   const historyForApi = chatHistory.value
  Line 687:     .filter(msg => msg.role !== 'user' || msg.content !== message)
  Line 688:     .slice(-10) // Keep last 10 messages
  Line 689:     .map(msg => ({
  Line 690:       role: msg.role,
  Line 691:       content: msg.content
  Line 692:     }))
  Line 694:   const res = await chatWithReport({
  Line 695:     simulation_id: props.simulationId,
  Line 696:     message: message,
  Line 697:     chat_history: historyForApi
  Line 698:   })
  Line 700:   if (res.success && res.data) {
  Line 701:     chatHistory.value.push({
  Line 702:       role: 'assistant',
  Line 703:       content: res.data.response || res.data.answer || t('step5.noResponse'),
  Line 704:       timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  Line 705:     })
  Line 706:     addLog(t('log.reportAgentReplied'))
  Line 707:   } else {
  Line 708:     throw new Error(res.error || t('step5.requestFailed'))
  Line 709:   }
  Line 710: }
  Line 712: const sendToAgent = async (message) => {
  Line 713:   if (!selectedAgent.value || selectedAgentIndex.value === null) {
  Line 714:     throw new Error(t('step5.selectAgentFirst'))
  Line 715:   }
  Line 717:   addLog(t('log.sendToAgent', { name: selectedAgent.value.username, message: message.substring(0, 50) }))
  Line 719:   // Build prompt with chat history
  Line 720:   let prompt = message
  Line 721:   if (chatHistory.value.length > 1) {
  Line 722:     const historyContext = chatHistory.value
  Line 723:       .filter(msg => msg.content !== message)
  Line 724:       .slice(-6)
  Line 725:       .map(msg => `${msg.role === 'user' ? '提问者' : '你'}：${msg.content}`)
  Line 726:       .join('\n')
  Line 727:     prompt = `以下是我们之前的对话：\n${historyContext}\n\n现在我的新问题是：${message}`
  Line 728:   }
  Line 730:   const res = await interviewAgents({
  Line 731:     simulation_id: props.simulationId,
  Line 732:     interviews: [{
  Line 733:       agent_id: selectedAgentIndex.value,
  Line 734:       prompt: prompt
  Line 735:     }]
  Line 736:   })
  Line 738:   if (res.success && res.data) {
  Line 739:     // 正确的数据路径: res.data.result.results 是一个对象字典
  Line 740:     // 格式: {"twitter_0": {...}, "reddit_0": {...}} 或单平台 {"reddit_0": {...}}
  Line 741:     const resultData = res.data.result || res.data
  Line 742:     const resultsDict = resultData.results || resultData
  Line 744:     // 将对象字典转换为数组，优先获取 reddit 平台的回复
  Line 745:     let responseContent = null
  Line 746:     const agentId = selectedAgentIndex.value
  Line 748:     if (typeof resultsDict === 'object' && !Array.isArray(resultsDict)) {
  Line 749:       // 优先使用 reddit 平台回复，其次 twitter
  Line 750:       const redditKey = `reddit_${agentId}`
  Line 751:       const twitterKey = `twitter_${agentId}`
  Line 752:       const agentResult = resultsDict[redditKey] || resultsDict[twitterKey] || Object.values(resultsDict)[0]
  Line 753:       if (agentResult) {
  Line 754:         responseContent = agentResult.response || agentResult.answer
  Line 755:       }
  Line 756:     } else if (Array.isArray(resultsDict) && resultsDict.length > 0) {
  Line 757:       // 兼容数组格式
  Line 758:       responseContent = resultsDict[0].response || resultsDict[0].answer
  Line 759:     }
  Line 761:     if (responseContent) {
  Line 762:       chatHistory.value.push({
  Line 763:         role: 'assistant',
  Line 764:         content: responseContent,
  Line 765:         timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  Line 766:       })
  Line 767:       addLog(t('log.agentReplied', { name: selectedAgent.value.username }))
  Line 768:     } else {
  Line 769:       throw new Error(t('step5.noResponse'))
  Line 770:     }
  Line 771:   } else {
  Line 772:     throw new Error(res.error || t('step5.requestFailed'))
  Line 773:   }
  Line 774: }
  Line 776: const scrollToBottom = () => {
  Line 777:   nextTick(() => {
  Line 778:     if (chatMessages.value) {
  Line 779:       chatMessages.value.scrollTop = chatMessages.value.scrollHeight
  Line 780:     }
  Line 781:   })
  Line 782: }
  Line 784: // Survey Methods
  Line 785: const toggleAgentSelection = (idx) => {
  Line 786:   const newSet = new Set(selectedAgents.value)
  Line 787:   if (newSet.has(idx)) {
  Line 788:     newSet.delete(idx)
  Line 789:   } else {
  Line 790:     newSet.add(idx)
  Line 791:   }
  Line 792:   selectedAgents.value = newSet
  Line 793: }
  Line 795: const selectAllAgents = () => {
  Line 796:   const newSet = new Set()
  Line 797:   profiles.value.forEach((_, idx) => newSet.add(idx))
  Line 798:   selectedAgents.value = newSet
  Line 799: }
  Line 801: const clearAgentSelection = () => {
  Line 802:   selectedAgents.value = new Set()
  Line 803: }
  Line 805: const submitSurvey = async () => {
  Line 806:   if (selectedAgents.value.size === 0 || !surveyQuestion.value.trim()) return
  Line 808:   isSurveying.value = true
  Line 809:   addLog(t('log.sendSurvey', { count: selectedAgents.value.size }))
  Line 811:   try {
  Line 812:     const interviews = Array.from(selectedAgents.value).map(idx => ({
  Line 813:       agent_id: idx,
  Line 814:       prompt: surveyQuestion.value.trim()
  Line 815:     }))
  Line 817:     const res = await interviewAgents({
  Line 818:       simulation_id: props.simulationId,
  Line 819:       interviews: interviews
  Line 820:     })
  Line 822:     if (res.success && res.data) {
  Line 823:       // 正确的数据路径: res.data.result.results 是一个对象字典
  Line 824:       // 格式: {"twitter_0": {...}, "reddit_0": {...}, "twitter_1": {...}, ...}
  Line 825:       const resultData = res.data.result || res.data
  Line 826:       const resultsDict = resultData.results || resultData
  Line 828:       // 将对象字典转换为数组格式
  Line 829:       const surveyResultsList = []
  Line 831:       for (const interview of interviews) {
  Line 832:         const agentIdx = interview.agent_id
  Line 833:         const agent = profiles.value[agentIdx]
  Line 835:         // 优先使用 reddit 平台回复，其次 twitter
  Line 836:         let responseContent = t('step5.noResponse')
  Line 838:         if (typeof resultsDict === 'object' && !Array.isArray(resultsDict)) {
  Line 839:           const redditKey = `reddit_${agentIdx}`
  Line 840:           const twitterKey = `twitter_${agentIdx}`
  Line 841:           const agentResult = resultsDict[redditKey] || resultsDict[twitterKey]
  Line 842:           if (agentResult) {
  Line 843:             responseContent = agentResult.response || agentResult.answer || t('step5.noResponse')
  Line 844:           }
  Line 845:         } else if (Array.isArray(resultsDict)) {
  Line 846:           // 兼容数组格式
  Line 847:           const matchedResult = resultsDict.find(r => r.agent_id === agentIdx)
  Line 848:           if (matchedResult) {
  Line 849:             responseContent = matchedResult.response || matchedResult.answer || t('step5.noResponse')
  Line 850:           }
  Line 851:         }
  Line 853:         surveyResultsList.push({
  Line 854:           agent_id: agentIdx,
  Line 855:           agent_name: agent?.username || `Agent ${agentIdx}`,
  Line 856:           profession: agent?.profession,
  Line 857:           question: surveyQuestion.value.trim(),
  Line 858:           answer: responseContent
  Line 859:         })
  Line 860:       }
  Line 862:       surveyResults.value = surveyResultsList
  Line 863:       addLog(t('log.receivedReplies', { count: surveyResults.value.length }))
  Line 864:     } else {
  Line 865:       throw new Error(res.error || t('step5.requestFailed'))
  Line 866:     }
  Line 867:   } catch (err) {
  Line 868:     addLog(t('log.surveySendFailed', { error: err.message }))
  Line 869:   } finally {
  Line 870:     isSurveying.value = false
  Line 871:   }
  Line 872: }
  Line 874: // Load Report Data
  Line 875: const loadReportData = async () => {
  Line 876:   if (!props.reportId) return
  Line 878:   try {
  Line 879:     addLog(t('log.loadReportData', { id: props.reportId }))
  Line 881:     // Get report info
  Line 882:     const reportRes = await getReport(props.reportId)
  Line 883:     if (reportRes.success && reportRes.data) {
  Line 884:       // Load agent logs to get report outline and sections
  Line 885:       await loadAgentLogs()
  Line 886:     }
  Line 887:   } catch (err) {
  Line 888:     addLog(t('log.loadReportFailed', { error: err.message }))
  Line 889:   }
  Line 890: }
  Line 892: const loadAgentLogs = async () => {
  Line 893:   if (!props.reportId) return
  Line 895:   try {
  Line 896:     const res = await getAgentLog(props.reportId, 0)
  Line 897:     if (res.success && res.data) {
  Line 898:       const logs = res.data.logs || []
  Line 900:       logs.forEach(log => {
  Line 901:         if (log.action === 'planning_complete' && log.details?.outline) {
  Line 902:           reportOutline.value = log.details.outline
  Line 903:         }
  Line 905:         if (log.action === 'section_complete' && log.section_index < 100 && log.details?.content) {
  Line 906:           generatedSections.value[log.section_index] = log.details.content
  Line 907:         }
  Line 908:       })
  Line 910:       addLog(t('log.reportDataLoaded'))
  Line 911:     }
  Line 912:   } catch (err) {
  Line 913:     addLog(t('log.loadReportLogFailed', { error: err.message }))
  Line 914:   }
  Line 915: }
  Line 917: const loadProfiles = async () => {
  Line 918:   if (!props.simulationId) return
  Line 920:   try {
  Line 921:     const res = await getSimulationProfilesRealtime(props.simulationId, 'reddit')
  Line 922:     if (res.success && res.data) {
  Line 923:       profiles.value = res.data.profiles || []
  Line 924:       addLog(t('log.loadedProfiles', { count: profiles.value.length }))
  Line 925:     }
  Line 926:   } catch (err) {
  Line 927:     addLog(t('log.loadProfilesFailed', { error: err.message }))
  Line 928:   }
  Line 929: }
  Line 931: // Click outside to close dropdown
  Line 932: const handleClickOutside = (e) => {
  Line 933:   const dropdown = document.querySelector('.agent-dropdown')
  Line 934:   if (dropdown && !dropdown.contains(e.target)) {
  Line 935:     showAgentDropdown.value = false

  Line 937: }
  Line 939: // Lifecycle
  Line 940: onMounted(() => {
  Line 941:   addLog(t('log.step5Init'))
  Line 942:   loadReportData()
  Line 943:   loadProfiles()
  Line 944:   document.addEventListener('click', handleClickOutside)
  Line 945: })
  Line 947: onUnmounted(() => {

  Line 949: })
  Line 951: watch(() => props.reportId, (newId) => {
  Line 952:   if (newId) {
  Line 953:     loadReportData()
  Line 954:   }

  Line 957: watch(() => props.simulationId, (newId) => {

  Line 960:   }

========================================================================================================================
FILE: frontend/src/i18n/index.js
Lines with Chinese text: 21
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Line 1: import { createI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
  Line 2: import languages from '../../../locales/languages.json'
  Line 4: const localeFiles = import.meta.glob('../../../locales/!(languages).json', { eager: true })
  Line 6: const messages = {}
  Line 7: const availableLocales = []
  Line 9: for (const path in localeFiles) {
  Line 10:   const key = path.match(/\/([^/]+)\.json$/)[1]
  Line 11:   if (languages[key]) {
  Line 12:     messages[key] = localeFiles[path].default
  Line 13:     availableLocales.push({ key, label: languages[key].label })
  Line 14:   }
  Line 15: }
  Line 17: const savedLocale = localStorage.getItem('locale') || 'zh'
  Line 19: const i18n = createI18n({
  Line 20:   legacy: false,
  Line 21:   locale: savedLocale,
  Line 22:   fallbackLocale: 'zh',
  Line 23:   messages
  Line 24: })
  Line 26: export { availableLocales }
  Line 27: export default i18n

FILE: frontend/src/main.js
Lines with Chinese text: 8
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Line 1: import { createApp } from 'vue'
  Line 2: import App from './App.vue'

  Line 2:  * 临时存储待上传的文件和需求
  Line 3:  * 用于首页点击启动引擎后立即跳转，在Process页面再进行API调用
  Line 5: import { reactive } from 'vue'
  Line 7: const state = reactive({
  Line 8:   files: [],
  Line 9:   simulationRequirement: '',
  Line 10:   isPending: false
  Line 11: })
  Line 13: export function setPendingUpload(files, requirement) {
  Line 14:   state.files = files
  Line 15:   state.simulationRequirement = requirement
  Line 16:   state.isPending = true
  Line 17: }
  Line 19: export function getPendingUpload() {
  Line 20:   return {
  Line 21:     files: state.files,
  Line 22:     simulationRequirement: state.simulationRequirement,
  Line 23:     isPending: state.isPending
  Line 24:   }
  Line 25: }
  Line 27: export function clearPendingUpload() {
  Line 28:   state.files = []
  Line 29:   state.simulationRequirement = ''
  Line 30:   state.isPending = false
  Line 31: }
  Line 33: export default state

  Line 1: <template>

  Line 49:         />
  Line 50:       </div>

  Line 54:         <Step5Interaction
  Line 55:           :reportId="currentReportId"
  Line 56:           :simulationId="simulationId"
  Line 57:           :systemLogs="systemLogs"

  Line 59:           @update-status="updateStatus"
  Line 60:         />
  Line 61:       </div>
  Line 62:     </main>
  Line 63:   </div>
  Line 64: </template>
  Line 66: <script setup>
  Line 67: import { ref, computed, onMounted, watch } from 'vue'
  Line 68: import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router'
  Line 69: import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
  Line 70: import GraphPanel from '../components/GraphPanel.vue'
  Line 71: import Step5Interaction from '../components/Step5Interaction.vue'
  Line 72: import { getProject, getGraphData } from '../api/graph'
  Line 73: import { getSimulation } from '../api/simulation'
  Line 74: import { getReport } from '../api/report'
  Line 75: import LanguageSwitcher from '../components/LanguageSwitcher.vue'
  Line 77: const route = useRoute()
  Line 78: const router = useRouter()
  Line 79: const { t } = useI18n()
  Line 81: // Props
  Line 82: const props = defineProps({
  Line 83:   reportId: String
  Line 84: })
  Line 86: // Layout State - 默认切换到工作台视角
  Line 87: const viewMode = ref('workbench')
  Line 89: // Data State
  Line 90: const currentReportId = ref(route.params.reportId)
  Line 91: const simulationId = ref(null)
  Line 92: const projectData = ref(null)
  Line 93: const graphData = ref(null)
  Line 94: const graphLoading = ref(false)
  Line 95: const systemLogs = ref([])
  Line 96: const currentStatus = ref('ready') // ready | processing | completed | error
  Line 98: // --- Computed Layout Styles ---
  Line 99: const leftPanelStyle = computed(() => {
  Line 100:   if (viewMode.value === 'graph') return { width: '100%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 101:   if (viewMode.value === 'workbench') return { width: '0%', opacity: 0, transform: 'translateX(-20px)' }
  Line 102:   return { width: '50%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 103: })
  Line 105: const rightPanelStyle = computed(() => {
  Line 106:   if (viewMode.value === 'workbench') return { width: '100%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 107:   if (viewMode.value === 'graph') return { width: '0%', opacity: 0, transform: 'translateX(20px)' }
  Line 108:   return { width: '50%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 109: })
  Line 111: // --- Status Computed ---
  Line 112: const statusClass = computed(() => {
  Line 113:   return currentStatus.value
  Line 114: })
  Line 116: const statusText = computed(() => {
  Line 117:   if (currentStatus.value === 'error') return 'Error'
  Line 118:   if (currentStatus.value === 'completed') return 'Completed'
  Line 119:   if (currentStatus.value === 'processing') return 'Processing'
  Line 120:   return 'Ready'
  Line 121: })
  Line 123: // --- Helpers ---
  Line 124: const addLog = (msg) => {
  Line 125:   const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour12: false, hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' }) + '.' + new Date().getMilliseconds().toString().padStart(3, '0')
  Line 126:   systemLogs.value.push({ time, msg })
  Line 127:   if (systemLogs.value.length > 200) {
  Line 128:     systemLogs.value.shift()
  Line 129:   }
  Line 130: }
  Line 132: const updateStatus = (status) => {
  Line 133:   currentStatus.value = status
  Line 134: }
  Line 136: // --- Layout Methods ---
  Line 137: const toggleMaximize = (target) => {
  Line 138:   if (viewMode.value === target) {
  Line 139:     viewMode.value = 'split'
  Line 140:   } else {
  Line 141:     viewMode.value = target
  Line 142:   }
  Line 143: }
  Line 145: // --- Data Logic ---
  Line 146: const loadReportData = async () => {
  Line 147:   try {
  Line 148:     addLog(t('log.loadReportData', { id: currentReportId.value }))
  Line 150:     // 获取 report 信息以获取 simulation_id
  Line 151:     const reportRes = await getReport(currentReportId.value)
  Line 152:     if (reportRes.success && reportRes.data) {
  Line 153:       const reportData = reportRes.data
  Line 154:       simulationId.value = reportData.simulation_id
  Line 156:       if (simulationId.value) {
  Line 157:         // 获取 simulation 信息
  Line 158:         const simRes = await getSimulation(simulationId.value)
  Line 159:         if (simRes.success && simRes.data) {
  Line 160:           const simData = simRes.data
  Line 162:           // 获取 project 信息
  Line 163:           if (simData.project_id) {
  Line 164:             const projRes = await getProject(simData.project_id)
  Line 165:             if (projRes.success && projRes.data) {
  Line 166:               projectData.value = projRes.data
  Line 167:               addLog(t('log.projectLoadSuccess', { id: projRes.data.project_id }))
  Line 169:               // 获取 graph 数据
  Line 170:               if (projRes.data.graph_id) {
  Line 171:                 await loadGraph(projRes.data.graph_id)
  Line 172:               }
  Line 173:             }
  Line 174:           }
  Line 175:         }
  Line 176:       }
  Line 177:     } else {
  Line 178:       addLog(t('log.getReportInfoFailed', { error: reportRes.error || t('common.unknownError') }))
  Line 179:     }
  Line 180:   } catch (err) {
  Line 181:     addLog(t('log.loadException', { error: err.message }))
  Line 182:   }
  Line 183: }
  Line 185: const loadGraph = async (graphId) => {
  Line 186:   graphLoading.value = true
  Line 188:   try {
  Line 189:     const res = await getGraphData(graphId)
  Line 190:     if (res.success) {
  Line 191:       graphData.value = res.data
  Line 192:       addLog(t('log.graphDataLoadSuccess'))
  Line 193:     }
  Line 194:   } catch (err) {
  Line 195:     addLog(t('log.graphLoadFailed', { error: err.message }))
  Line 196:   } finally {
  Line 197:     graphLoading.value = false
  Line 198:   }
  Line 199: }
  Line 201: const refreshGraph = () => {
  Line 202:   if (projectData.value?.graph_id) {
  Line 203:     loadGraph(projectData.value.graph_id)
  Line 204:   }
  Line 205: }
  Line 207: // Watch route params
  Line 208: watch(() => route.params.reportId, (newId) => {
  Line 209:   if (newId && newId !== currentReportId.value) {
  Line 210:     currentReportId.value = newId
  Line 211:     loadReportData()
  Line 212:   }
  Line 213: }, { immediate: true })
  Line 215: onMounted(() => {
  Line 216:   addLog(t('log.interactionViewInit'))
  Line 217:   loadReportData()
  Line 218: })
  Line 219: </script>

  Line 133:   if (currentPhase.value >= 2) return 'completed'
  Line 134:   return 'processing'
  Line 135: })

  Line 140:   if (currentPhase.value === 1) return 'Building Graph'
  Line 141:   if (currentPhase.value === 0) return 'Generating Ontology'

  Line 147:   const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour12: false, hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' }) + '.' + new Date().getMilliseconds().toString().padStart(3, '0')
  Line 148:   systemLogs.value.push({ time, msg })
  Line 149:   // Keep last 100 logs
  Line 150:   if (systemLogs.value.length > 100) {
  Line 151:     systemLogs.value.shift()
  Line 152:   }
  Line 153: }

  Line 160:     viewMode.value = target
  Line 161:   }
  Line 162: }

  Line 165:   if (currentStep.value < 5) {
  Line 166:     currentStep.value++

  Line 188:     await handleNewProject()
  Line 189:   } else {
  Line 190:     await loadProject()

  Line 194: const handleNewProject = async () => {
  Line 195:   const pending = getPendingUpload()
  Line 196:   if (!pending.isPending || pending.files.length === 0) {
  Line 197:     error.value = 'No pending files found.'
  Line 198:     addLog('Error: No pending files found for new project.')
  Line 199:     return
  Line 200:   }

  Line 208:     const formData = new FormData()

  Line 210:     formData.append('simulation_requirement', pending.simulationRequirement)
  Line 212:     const res = await generateOntology(formData)

  Line 214:       clearPendingUpload()

  Line 216:       projectData.value = res.data
  Line 218:       router.replace({ name: 'Process', params: { projectId: res.data.project_id } })
  Line 219:       ontologyProgress.value = null
  Line 220:       addLog(`Ontology generated successfully for project ${res.data.project_id}`)
  Line 221:       await startBuildGraph()

  Line 223:       error.value = res.error || 'Ontology generation failed'
  Line 224:       addLog(`Error generating ontology: ${error.value}`)

  Line 227:     error.value = err.message

  Line 231:   }

  Line 234: const loadProject = async () => {

  Line 237:     addLog(`Loading project ${currentProjectId.value}...`)
  Line 238:     const res = await getProject(currentProjectId.value)
  Line 239:     if (res.success) {
  Line 240:       projectData.value = res.data
  Line 241:       updatePhaseByStatus(res.data.status)
  Line 242:       addLog(`Project loaded. Status: ${res.data.status}`)
  Line 244:       if (res.data.status === 'ontology_generated' && !res.data.graph_id) {
  Line 245:         await startBuildGraph()
  Line 246:       } else if (res.data.status === 'graph_building' && res.data.graph_build_task_id) {
  Line 247:         currentPhase.value = 1
  Line 248:         startPollingTask(res.data.graph_build_task_id)
  Line 249:         startGraphPolling()
  Line 250:       } else if (res.data.status === 'graph_completed' && res.data.graph_id) {
  Line 251:         currentPhase.value = 2
  Line 252:         await loadGraph(res.data.graph_id)
  Line 253:       }
  Line 254:     } else {
  Line 255:       error.value = res.error

  Line 259:     error.value = err.message
  Line 260:     addLog(`Exception in loadProject: ${err.message}`)
  Line 261:   } finally {
  Line 262:     loading.value = false
  Line 263:   }
  Line 264: }
  Line 266: const updatePhaseByStatus = (status) => {
  Line 267:   switch (status) {
  Line 268:     case 'created':
  Line 269:     case 'ontology_generated': currentPhase.value = 0; break;
  Line 270:     case 'graph_building': currentPhase.value = 1; break;
  Line 271:     case 'graph_completed': currentPhase.value = 2; break;
  Line 272:     case 'failed': error.value = 'Project failed'; break;
  Line 273:   }
  Line 274: }
  Line 276: const startBuildGraph = async () => {
  Line 277:   try {
  Line 278:     currentPhase.value = 1
  Line 279:     buildProgress.value = { progress: 0, message: 'Starting build...' }
  Line 280:     addLog('Initiating graph build...')
  Line 282:     const res = await buildGraph({ project_id: currentProjectId.value })
  Line 283:     if (res.success) {
  Line 284:       addLog(`Graph build task started. Task ID: ${res.data.task_id}`)
  Line 285:       startGraphPolling()
  Line 286:       startPollingTask(res.data.task_id)
  Line 287:     } else {
  Line 288:       error.value = res.error
  Line 289:       addLog(`Error starting build: ${res.error}`)
  Line 290:     }
  Line 291:   } catch (err) {
  Line 292:     error.value = err.message
  Line 293:     addLog(`Exception in startBuildGraph: ${err.message}`)
  Line 294:   }
  Line 295: }
  Line 297: const startGraphPolling = () => {
  Line 298:   addLog('Started polling for graph data...')
  Line 299:   fetchGraphData()
  Line 300:   graphPollTimer = setInterval(fetchGraphData, 10000)
  Line 301: }
  Line 303: const fetchGraphData = async () => {
  Line 304:   try {
  Line 305:     // Refresh project info to check for graph_id
  Line 306:     const projRes = await getProject(currentProjectId.value)
  Line 307:     if (projRes.success && projRes.data.graph_id) {
  Line 308:       const gRes = await getGraphData(projRes.data.graph_id)
  Line 309:       if (gRes.success) {
  Line 310:         graphData.value = gRes.data
  Line 311:         const nodeCount = gRes.data.node_count || gRes.data.nodes?.length || 0
  Line 312:         const edgeCount = gRes.data.edge_count || gRes.data.edges?.length || 0
  Line 313:         addLog(`Graph data refreshed. Nodes: ${nodeCount}, Edges: ${edgeCount}`)
  Line 314:       }
  Line 315:     }
  Line 316:   } catch (err) {
  Line 317:     console.warn('Graph fetch error:', err)
  Line 318:   }
  Line 319: }
  Line 321: const startPollingTask = (taskId) => {
  Line 322:   pollTaskStatus(taskId)
  Line 323:   pollTimer = setInterval(() => pollTaskStatus(taskId), 2000)
  Line 324: }
  Line 326: const pollTaskStatus = async (taskId) => {
  Line 327:   try {
  Line 328:     const res = await getTaskStatus(taskId)
  Line 329:     if (res.success) {
  Line 330:       const task = res.data
  Line 332:       // Log progress message if it changed
  Line 333:       if (task.message && task.message !== buildProgress.value?.message) {
  Line 334:         addLog(task.message)
  Line 335:       }
  Line 337:       buildProgress.value = { progress: task.progress || 0, message: task.message }
  Line 339:       if (task.status === 'completed') {
  Line 340:         addLog('Graph build task completed.')
  Line 341:         stopPolling()
  Line 342:         stopGraphPolling() // Stop polling, do final load
  Line 343:         currentPhase.value = 2
  Line 345:         // Final load
  Line 346:         const projRes = await getProject(currentProjectId.value)
  Line 347:         if (projRes.success && projRes.data.graph_id) {
  Line 348:             projectData.value = projRes.data
  Line 349:             await loadGraph(projRes.data.graph_id)
  Line 350:         }
  Line 351:       } else if (task.status === 'failed') {
  Line 352:         stopPolling()
  Line 353:         error.value = task.error
  Line 354:         addLog(`Graph build task failed: ${task.error}`)
  Line 355:       }
  Line 356:     }
  Line 357:   } catch (e) {
  Line 358:     console.error(e)
  Line 359:   }
  Line 360: }
  Line 362: const loadGraph = async (graphId) => {
  Line 363:   graphLoading.value = true
  Line 364:   addLog(`Loading full graph data: ${graphId}`)
  Line 365:   try {
  Line 366:     const res = await getGraphData(graphId)
  Line 367:     if (res.success) {
  Line 368:       graphData.value = res.data
  Line 369:       addLog('Graph data loaded successfully.')
  Line 370:     } else {
  Line 371:       addLog(`Failed to load graph data: ${res.error}`)
  Line 372:     }
  Line 373:   } catch (e) {
  Line 374:     addLog(`Exception loading graph: ${e.message}`)
  Line 375:   } finally {
  Line 376:     graphLoading.value = false
  Line 377:   }
  Line 378: }
  Line 380: const refreshGraph = () => {
  Line 381:   if (projectData.value?.graph_id) {
  Line 382:     addLog('Manual graph refresh triggered.')
  Line 383:     loadGraph(projectData.value.graph_id)
  Line 384:   }
  Line 385: }
  Line 387: const stopPolling = () => {
  Line 388:   if (pollTimer) {
  Line 389:     clearInterval(pollTimer)
  Line 390:     pollTimer = null
  Line 391:   }
  Line 392: }
  Line 394: const stopGraphPolling = () => {
  Line 395:   if (graphPollTimer) {
  Line 396:     clearInterval(graphPollTimer)
  Line 397:     graphPollTimer = null
  Line 398:     addLog('Graph polling stopped.')
  Line 399:   }
  Line 400: }
  Line 402: onMounted(() => {
  Line 403:   initProject()
  Line 404: })
  Line 406: onUnmounted(() => {
  Line 407:   stopPolling()
  Line 408:   stopGraphPolling()
  Line 409: })
  Line 410: </script>

  Line 561:     // 加载已有项目

  Line 563:     await loadProject()
  Line 564:   }

  Line 567: // 处理新建项目 - 调用 ontology/generate API
  Line 568: const handleNewProject = async () => {
  Line 569:   const pending = getPendingUpload()
  Line 571:   if (!pending.isPending || pending.files.length === 0) {
  Line 572:     error.value = '没有待上传的文件，请返回首页重新操作'
  Line 573:     loading.value = false
  Line 574:     return
  Line 575:   }
  Line 577:   try {
  Line 578:     loading.value = true
  Line 579:     currentPhase.value = 0 // 本体生成阶段
  Line 580:     ontologyProgress.value = { message: '正在上传文件并分析文档...' }
  Line 582:     // 构建 FormData

  Line 584:     pending.files.forEach(file => {
  Line 585:       formDataObj.append('files', file)
  Line 586:     })
  Line 587:     formDataObj.append('simulation_requirement', pending.simulationRequirement)

  Line 593:       // 清除待上传数据
  Line 594:       clearPendingUpload()

  Line 597:       currentProjectId.value = response.data.project_id
  Line 598:       projectData.value = response.data
  Line 600:       // 更新URL（不刷新页面）
  Line 601:       router.replace({
  Line 602:         name: 'Process',
  Line 603:         params: { projectId: response.data.project_id }
  Line 604:       })
  Line 606:       ontologyProgress.value = null
  Line 608:       // 自动开始图谱构建
  Line 609:       await startBuildGraph()
  Line 610:     } else {
  Line 611:       error.value = response.error || '本体生成失败'
  Line 612:     }
  Line 613:   } catch (err) {
  Line 614:     console.error('Handle new project error:', err)
  Line 615:     error.value = '项目初始化失败: ' + (err.message || '未知错误')
  Line 616:   } finally {
  Line 617:     loading.value = false
  Line 618:   }
  Line 619: }
  Line 621: // 加载已有项目数据
  Line 622: const loadProject = async () => {
  Line 623:   try {
  Line 624:     loading.value = true
  Line 625:     const response = await getProject(currentProjectId.value)
  Line 627:     if (response.success) {
  Line 628:       projectData.value = response.data
  Line 629:       updatePhaseByStatus(response.data.status)

  Line 633:         await startBuildGraph()
  Line 634:       }
  Line 636:       // 继续轮询构建中的任务
  Line 637:       if (response.data.status === 'graph_building' && response.data.graph_build_task_id) {
  Line 638:         currentPhase.value = 1
  Line 639:         startPollingTask(response.data.graph_build_task_id)
  Line 640:       }

  Line 645:         await loadGraph(response.data.graph_id)

  Line 653:   } finally {
  Line 654:     loading.value = false
  Line 655:   }
  Line 656: }
  Line 658: const updatePhaseByStatus = (status) => {
  Line 659:   switch (status) {
  Line 660:     case 'created':
  Line 661:     case 'ontology_generated':
  Line 662:       currentPhase.value = 0

  Line 666:       break
  Line 667:     case 'graph_completed':
  Line 668:       currentPhase.value = 2
  Line 669:       break
  Line 670:     case 'failed':

  Line 672:       break
  Line 673:   }
  Line 674: }
  Line 676: // 开始构建图谱
  Line 677: const startBuildGraph = async () => {
  Line 678:   try {
  Line 679:     currentPhase.value = 1
  Line 680:     // 设置初始进度
  Line 681:     buildProgress.value = {
  Line 682:       progress: 0,
  Line 683:       message: '正在启动图谱构建...'

  Line 686:     const response = await buildGraph({ project_id: currentProjectId.value })

  Line 689:       buildProgress.value.message = '图谱构建任务已启动...'

  Line 694:       // 启动图谱数据轮询（独立于任务状态轮询）
  Line 695:       startGraphPolling()
  Line 697:       // 启动任务状态轮询
  Line 698:       startPollingTask(taskId)
  Line 699:     } else {
  Line 700:       error.value = response.error || '启动图谱构建失败'
  Line 701:       buildProgress.value = null
  Line 702:     }

  Line 704:     console.error('Build graph error:', err)

  Line 707:   }
  Line 708: }
  Line 710: // 图谱数据轮询定时器
  Line 711: let graphPollTimer = null
  Line 713: // 启动图谱数据轮询
  Line 714: const startGraphPolling = () => {

  Line 716:   fetchGraphData()

  Line 722: }
  Line 724: // 手动刷新图谱

  Line 729: }

  Line 739: // 获取图谱数据
  Line 740: const fetchGraphData = async () => {

  Line 742:     // 先获取项目信息以获取 graph_id
  Line 743:     const projectResponse = await getProject(currentProjectId.value)
  Line 745:     if (projectResponse.success && projectResponse.data.graph_id) {
  Line 746:       const graphId = projectResponse.data.graph_id
  Line 747:       projectData.value = projectResponse.data

  Line 752:       if (graphResponse.success && graphResponse.data) {
  Line 753:         const newData = graphResponse.data
  Line 754:         const newNodeCount = newData.node_count || newData.nodes?.length || 0
  Line 755:         const oldNodeCount = graphData.value?.node_count || graphData.value?.nodes?.length || 0
  Line 757:         console.log('Fetching graph data, nodes:', newNodeCount, 'edges:', newData.edge_count || newData.edges?.length || 0)
  Line 759:         // 数据有变化时更新渲染
  Line 760:         if (newNodeCount !== oldNodeCount || !graphData.value) {
  Line 761:           graphData.value = newData
  Line 762:           await nextTick()
  Line 763:           renderGraph()
  Line 764:         }
  Line 765:       }
  Line 766:     }
  Line 767:   } catch (err) {
  Line 768:     console.log('Graph data fetch:', err.message || 'not ready')
  Line 769:   }
  Line 770: }
  Line 772: // 轮询任务状态

  Line 778:   pollTimer = setInterval(() => {
  Line 779:     pollTaskStatus(taskId)

  Line 781: }
  Line 783: // 查询任务状态
  Line 784: const pollTaskStatus = async (taskId) => {

  Line 786:     const response = await getTaskStatus(taskId)
  Line 788:     if (response.success) {
  Line 789:       const task = response.data
  Line 791:       // 更新进度显示
  Line 792:       buildProgress.value = {
  Line 793:         progress: task.progress || 0,
  Line 794:         message: task.message || '处理中...'
  Line 795:       }
  Line 797:       console.log('Task status:', task.status, 'Progress:', task.progress)
  Line 799:       if (task.status === 'completed') {
  Line 800:         console.log('✅ 图谱构建完成，正在加载完整数据...')
  Line 802:         stopPolling()
  Line 803:         stopGraphPolling()
  Line 804:         currentPhase.value = 2
  Line 806:         // 更新进度显示为完成状态
  Line 807:         buildProgress.value = {
  Line 808:           progress: 100,
  Line 809:           message: '构建完成，正在加载图谱...'
  Line 810:         }

  Line 813:         const projectResponse = await getProject(currentProjectId.value)
  Line 814:         if (projectResponse.success) {
  Line 815:           projectData.value = projectResponse.data
  Line 817:           // 最终加载完整图谱数据
  Line 818:           if (projectResponse.data.graph_id) {
  Line 819:             console.log('📊 加载完整图谱:', projectResponse.data.graph_id)
  Line 820:             await loadGraph(projectResponse.data.graph_id)
  Line 821:             console.log('✅ 图谱加载完成')
  Line 822:           }
  Line 823:         }
  Line 825:         // 清除进度显示
  Line 826:         buildProgress.value = null
  Line 827:       } else if (task.status === 'failed') {
  Line 828:         stopPolling()
  Line 829:         stopGraphPolling()
  Line 830:         error.value = '图谱构建失败: ' + (task.error || '未知错误')
  Line 831:         buildProgress.value = null
  Line 832:       }
  Line 833:     }
  Line 834:   } catch (err) {
  Line 835:     console.error('Poll task error:', err)
  Line 836:   }
  Line 837: }

  Line 842:     pollTimer = null
  Line 843:   }
  Line 844: }
  Line 846: // 加载图谱数据
  Line 847: const loadGraph = async (graphId) => {

  Line 849:     graphLoading.value = true

  Line 852:     if (response.success) {
  Line 853:       graphData.value = response.data
  Line 854:       await nextTick()

  Line 856:     }
  Line 857:   } catch (err) {
  Line 858:     console.error('Load graph error:', err)
  Line 859:   } finally {
  Line 860:     graphLoading.value = false
  Line 861:   }
  Line 862: }
  Line 864: // 渲染图谱 (D3.js)
  Line 865: const renderGraph = () => {
  Line 866:   if (!graphSvg.value || !graphData.value) {
  Line 867:     console.log('Cannot render: svg or data missing')
  Line 868:     return
  Line 869:   }
  Line 871:   const container = graphContainer.value
  Line 872:   if (!container) {
  Line 873:     console.log('Cannot render: container missing')
  Line 874:     return
  Line 875:   }
  Line 877:   // 获取容器尺寸
  Line 878:   const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
  Line 879:   const width = rect.width || 800
  Line 880:   const height = (rect.height || 600) - 60
  Line 882:   if (width <= 0 || height <= 0) {
  Line 883:     console.log('Cannot render: invalid dimensions', width, height)
  Line 884:     return
  Line 885:   }
  Line 887:   console.log('Rendering graph:', width, 'x', height)
  Line 889:   const svg = d3.select(graphSvg.value)
  Line 890:     .attr('width', width)
  Line 891:     .attr('height', height)
  Line 892:     .attr('viewBox', `0 0 ${width} ${height}`)
  Line 894:   svg.selectAll('*').remove()
  Line 896:   // 处理节点数据
  Line 897:   const nodesData = graphData.value.nodes || []
  Line 898:   const edgesData = graphData.value.edges || []
  Line 900:   if (nodesData.length === 0) {
  Line 901:     console.log('No nodes to render')
  Line 902:     // 显示空状态
  Line 903:     svg.append('text')
  Line 904:       .attr('x', width / 2)
  Line 905:       .attr('y', height / 2)
  Line 906:       .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')
  Line 907:       .attr('fill', '#999')
  Line 908:       .text('等待图谱数据...')
  Line 909:     return
  Line 910:   }
  Line 912:   // 创建节点映射用于查找名称
  Line 913:   const nodeMap = {}
  Line 914:   nodesData.forEach(n => {
  Line 915:     nodeMap[n.uuid] = n
  Line 916:   })
  Line 918:   const nodes = nodesData.map(n => ({
  Line 919:     id: n.uuid,
  Line 920:     name: n.name || '未命名',
  Line 921:     type: n.labels?.find(l => l !== 'Entity' && l !== 'Node') || 'Entity',
  Line 922:     rawData: n // 保存原始数据
  Line 923:   }))
  Line 925:   // 创建节点ID集合用于过滤有效边
  Line 926:   const nodeIds = new Set(nodes.map(n => n.id))
  Line 928:   const edges = edgesData
  Line 929:     .filter(e => nodeIds.has(e.source_node_uuid) && nodeIds.has(e.target_node_uuid))
  Line 930:     .map(e => ({
  Line 931:       source: e.source_node_uuid,
  Line 932:       target: e.target_node_uuid,
  Line 933:       type: e.fact_type || e.name || 'RELATED_TO',
  Line 934:       rawData: {
  Line 935:         ...e,
  Line 936:         source_name: nodeMap[e.source_node_uuid]?.name || '未知',
  Line 937:         target_name: nodeMap[e.target_node_uuid]?.name || '未知'
  Line 938:       }
  Line 939:     }))
  Line 941:   console.log('Nodes:', nodes.length, 'Edges:', edges.length)
  Line 943:   // 颜色映射
  Line 944:   const types = [...new Set(nodes.map(n => n.type))]
  Line 945:   const colorScale = d3.scaleOrdinal()
  Line 946:     .domain(types)
  Line 947:     .range(['#FF6B35', '#004E89', '#7B2D8E', '#1A936F', '#C5283D', '#E9724C', '#2D3436', '#6C5CE7'])
  Line 949:   // 力导向布局
  Line 950:   const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(nodes)
  Line 951:     .force('link', d3.forceLink(edges).id(d => d.id).distance(100).strength(0.5))
  Line 952:     .force('charge', d3.forceManyBody().strength(-300))
  Line 953:     .force('center', d3.forceCenter(width / 2, height / 2))
  Line 954:     .force('collision', d3.forceCollide().radius(40))
  Line 955:     .force('x', d3.forceX(width / 2).strength(0.05))
  Line 956:     .force('y', d3.forceY(height / 2).strength(0.05))
  Line 958:   // 添加缩放功能
  Line 959:   const g = svg.append('g')
  Line 961:   svg.call(d3.zoom()
  Line 962:     .extent([[0, 0], [width, height]])
  Line 963:     .scaleExtent([0.2, 4])
  Line 964:     .on('zoom', (event) => {
  Line 965:       g.attr('transform', event.transform)
  Line 966:     }))
  Line 968:   // 绘制边（包含可点击的透明宽线）
  Line 969:   const linkGroup = g.append('g')
  Line 970:     .attr('class', 'links')
  Line 971:     .selectAll('g')
  Line 972:     .data(edges)
  Line 973:     .enter()
  Line 974:     .append('g')
  Line 975:     .style('cursor', 'pointer')
  Line 976:     .on('click', (event, d) => {
  Line 977:       event.stopPropagation()
  Line 978:       selectEdge(d.rawData)
  Line 979:     })
  Line 981:   // 可见的细线
  Line 982:   const link = linkGroup.append('line')
  Line 983:     .attr('stroke', '#ccc')
  Line 984:     .attr('stroke-width', 1.5)
  Line 985:     .attr('stroke-opacity', 0.6)
  Line 987:   // 透明的宽线用于点击
  Line 988:   linkGroup.append('line')
  Line 989:     .attr('stroke', 'transparent')
  Line 990:     .attr('stroke-width', 10)
  Line 992:   // 边标签
  Line 993:   const linkLabel = g.append('g')
  Line 994:     .attr('class', 'link-labels')
  Line 995:     .selectAll('text')
  Line 996:     .data(edges)
  Line 997:     .enter()
  Line 998:     .append('text')
  Line 999:     .attr('font-size', '9px')
  Line 1000:     .attr('fill', '#999')
  Line 1001:     .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')
  Line 1002:     .text(d => d.type.length > 15 ? d.type.substring(0, 12) + '...' : d.type)
  Line 1004:   // 绘制节点
  Line 1005:   const node = g.append('g')
  Line 1006:     .attr('class', 'nodes')
  Line 1007:     .selectAll('g')
  Line 1008:     .data(nodes)
  Line 1009:     .enter()
  Line 1010:     .append('g')
  Line 1011:     .style('cursor', 'pointer')
  Line 1012:     .on('click', (event, d) => {
  Line 1013:       event.stopPropagation()
  Line 1014:       selectNode(d.rawData, colorScale(d.type))
  Line 1015:     })
  Line 1016:     .call(d3.drag()
  Line 1017:       .on('start', dragstarted)
  Line 1018:       .on('drag', dragged)
  Line 1019:       .on('end', dragended))
  Line 1021:   node.append('circle')
  Line 1022:     .attr('r', 10)
  Line 1023:     .attr('fill', d => colorScale(d.type))
  Line 1024:     .attr('stroke', '#fff')
  Line 1025:     .attr('stroke-width', 2)
  Line 1026:     .attr('class', 'node-circle')
  Line 1028:   node.append('text')
  Line 1029:     .attr('dx', 14)
  Line 1030:     .attr('dy', 4)
  Line 1031:     .text(d => d.name?.substring(0, 12) || '')
  Line 1032:     .attr('font-size', '11px')
  Line 1033:     .attr('fill', '#333')
  Line 1034:     .attr('font-family', 'JetBrains Mono, monospace')
  Line 1036:   // 点击空白处关闭详情面板
  Line 1037:   svg.on('click', () => {
  Line 1038:     closeDetailPanel()
  Line 1039:   })
  Line 1041:   simulation.on('tick', () => {
  Line 1042:     // 更新所有边的位置（包括可见线和透明点击区域）
  Line 1043:     linkGroup.selectAll('line')
  Line 1044:       .attr('x1', d => d.source.x)
  Line 1045:       .attr('y1', d => d.source.y)
  Line 1046:       .attr('x2', d => d.target.x)
  Line 1047:       .attr('y2', d => d.target.y)
  Line 1049:     // 更新边标签位置
  Line 1050:     linkLabel
  Line 1051:       .attr('x', d => (d.source.x + d.target.x) / 2)
  Line 1052:       .attr('y', d => (d.source.y + d.target.y) / 2 - 5)
  Line 1054:     node.attr('transform', d => `translate(${d.x},${d.y})`)
  Line 1055:   })
  Line 1057:   function dragstarted(event) {
  Line 1058:     if (!event.active) simulation.alphaTarget(0.3).restart()
  Line 1059:     event.subject.fx = event.subject.x
  Line 1060:     event.subject.fy = event.subject.y
  Line 1061:   }
  Line 1063:   function dragged(event) {
  Line 1064:     event.subject.fx = event.x
  Line 1065:     event.subject.fy = event.y
  Line 1066:   }
  Line 1068:   function dragended(event) {
  Line 1069:     if (!event.active) simulation.alphaTarget(0)
  Line 1070:     event.subject.fx = null
  Line 1071:     event.subject.fy = null
  Line 1072:   }
  Line 1073: }
  Line 1075: // 监听图谱数据变化
  Line 1076: watch(graphData, () => {
  Line 1077:   if (graphData.value) {
  Line 1078:     nextTick(() => renderGraph())
  Line 1079:   }
  Line 1080: })
  Line 1082: // 生命周期
  Line 1083: onMounted(() => {
  Line 1084:   initProject()
  Line 1085: })
  Line 1087: onUnmounted(() => {
  Line 1088:   stopPolling()
  Line 1089:   stopGraphPolling()
  Line 1090: })
  Line 1091: </script>
  Line 1093: <style scoped>
  Line 1094: /* 变量 */
  Line 1095: :root {
  Line 1096:   --black: #000000;

  Line 1: <template>
  Line 2:   <div class="main-view">
  Line 3:     <!-- Header -->
  Line 4:     <header class="app-header">
  Line 5:       <div class="header-left">
  Line 6:         <div class="brand" @click="router.push('/')">HERMES</div>
  Line 7:       </div>
  Line 9:       <div class="header-center">
  Line 10:         <div class="view-switcher">
  Line 11:           <button
  Line 12:             v-for="mode in ['graph', 'split', 'workbench']"
  Line 13:             :key="mode"
  Line 14:             class="switch-btn"
  Line 15:             :class="{ active: viewMode === mode }"
  Line 16:             @click="viewMode = mode"
  Line 17:           >
  Line 18:             {{ { graph: $t('main.layoutGraph'), split: $t('main.layoutSplit'), workbench: $t('main.layoutWorkbench') }[mode] }}
  Line 19:           </button>
  Line 20:         </div>
  Line 21:       </div>
  Line 23:       <div class="header-right">
  Line 24:         <LanguageSwitcher />
  Line 25:         <div class="step-divider"></div>
  Line 26:         <div class="workflow-step">
  Line 27:           <span class="step-num">Step 4/5</span>
  Line 28:           <span class="step-name">{{ $tm('main.stepNames')[3] }}</span>
  Line 29:         </div>
  Line 30:         <div class="step-divider"></div>
  Line 31:         <span class="status-indicator" :class="statusClass">
  Line 32:           <span class="dot"></span>
  Line 33:           {{ statusText }}
  Line 34:         </span>
  Line 35:       </div>
  Line 36:     </header>
  Line 38:     <!-- Main Content Area -->
  Line 39:     <main class="content-area">
  Line 40:       <!-- Left Panel: Graph -->
  Line 41:       <div class="panel-wrapper left" :style="leftPanelStyle">
  Line 42:         <GraphPanel
  Line 43:           :graphData="graphData"
  Line 44:           :loading="graphLoading"
  Line 45:           :currentPhase="4"
  Line 46:           :isSimulating="false"
  Line 47:           @refresh="refreshGraph"
  Line 48:           @toggle-maximize="toggleMaximize('graph')"
  Line 49:         />
  Line 50:       </div>
  Line 52:       <!-- Right Panel: Step4 报告生成 -->
  Line 53:       <div class="panel-wrapper right" :style="rightPanelStyle">
  Line 54:         <Step4Report
  Line 55:           :reportId="currentReportId"
  Line 56:           :simulationId="simulationId"
  Line 57:           :systemLogs="systemLogs"
  Line 58:           @add-log="addLog"
  Line 59:           @update-status="updateStatus"
  Line 60:         />
  Line 61:       </div>
  Line 62:     </main>
  Line 63:   </div>
  Line 64: </template>
  Line 66: <script setup>
  Line 67: import { ref, computed, onMounted, watch } from 'vue'
  Line 68: import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router'
  Line 69: import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
  Line 70: import GraphPanel from '../components/GraphPanel.vue'
  Line 71: import Step4Report from '../components/Step4Report.vue'
  Line 72: import { getProject, getGraphData } from '../api/graph'
  Line 73: import { getSimulation } from '../api/simulation'
  Line 74: import { getReport } from '../api/report'
  Line 75: import LanguageSwitcher from '../components/LanguageSwitcher.vue'
  Line 77: const route = useRoute()
  Line 78: const router = useRouter()
  Line 79: const { t } = useI18n()
  Line 81: // Props
  Line 82: const props = defineProps({
  Line 83:   reportId: String
  Line 84: })
  Line 86: // Layout State - 默认切换到工作台视角
  Line 87: const viewMode = ref('workbench')
  Line 89: // Data State
  Line 90: const currentReportId = ref(route.params.reportId)
  Line 91: const simulationId = ref(null)
  Line 92: const projectData = ref(null)
  Line 93: const graphData = ref(null)
  Line 94: const graphLoading = ref(false)
  Line 95: const systemLogs = ref([])
  Line 96: const currentStatus = ref('processing') // processing | completed | error
  Line 98: // --- Computed Layout Styles ---
  Line 99: const leftPanelStyle = computed(() => {
  Line 100:   if (viewMode.value === 'graph') return { width: '100%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 101:   if (viewMode.value === 'workbench') return { width: '0%', opacity: 0, transform: 'translateX(-20px)' }
  Line 102:   return { width: '50%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 103: })
  Line 105: const rightPanelStyle = computed(() => {
  Line 106:   if (viewMode.value === 'workbench') return { width: '100%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 107:   if (viewMode.value === 'graph') return { width: '0%', opacity: 0, transform: 'translateX(20px)' }
  Line 108:   return { width: '50%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 109: })
  Line 111: // --- Status Computed ---
  Line 112: const statusClass = computed(() => {
  Line 113:   return currentStatus.value
  Line 114: })
  Line 116: const statusText = computed(() => {
  Line 117:   if (currentStatus.value === 'error') return 'Error'
  Line 118:   if (currentStatus.value === 'completed') return 'Completed'
  Line 119:   return 'Generating'
  Line 120: })
  Line 122: // --- Helpers ---
  Line 123: const addLog = (msg) => {
  Line 124:   const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour12: false, hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' }) + '.' + new Date().getMilliseconds().toString().padStart(3, '0')
  Line 125:   systemLogs.value.push({ time, msg })
  Line 126:   if (systemLogs.value.length > 200) {
  Line 127:     systemLogs.value.shift()
  Line 128:   }
  Line 129: }
  Line 131: const updateStatus = (status) => {
  Line 132:   currentStatus.value = status
  Line 133: }
  Line 135: // --- Layout Methods ---
  Line 136: const toggleMaximize = (target) => {
  Line 137:   if (viewMode.value === target) {
  Line 138:     viewMode.value = 'split'
  Line 139:   } else {
  Line 140:     viewMode.value = target
  Line 141:   }
  Line 142: }
  Line 144: // --- Data Logic ---
  Line 145: const loadReportData = async () => {
  Line 146:   try {
  Line 147:     addLog(t('log.loadReportData', { id: currentReportId.value }))
  Line 149:     // 获取 report 信息以获取 simulation_id
  Line 150:     const reportRes = await getReport(currentReportId.value)
  Line 151:     if (reportRes.success && reportRes.data) {
  Line 152:       const reportData = reportRes.data
  Line 153:       simulationId.value = reportData.simulation_id
  Line 155:       if (simulationId.value) {
  Line 156:         // 获取 simulation 信息
  Line 157:         const simRes = await getSimulation(simulationId.value)
  Line 158:         if (simRes.success && simRes.data) {
  Line 159:           const simData = simRes.data
  Line 161:           // 获取 project 信息
  Line 162:           if (simData.project_id) {
  Line 163:             const projRes = await getProject(simData.project_id)
  Line 164:             if (projRes.success && projRes.data) {
  Line 165:               projectData.value = projRes.data
  Line 166:               addLog(t('log.projectLoadSuccess', { id: projRes.data.project_id }))
  Line 168:               // 获取 graph 数据
  Line 169:               if (projRes.data.graph_id) {
  Line 170:                 await loadGraph(projRes.data.graph_id)
  Line 171:               }
  Line 172:             }
  Line 173:           }
  Line 174:         }
  Line 175:       }
  Line 176:     } else {
  Line 177:       addLog(t('log.getReportInfoFailed', { error: reportRes.error || t('common.unknownError') }))
  Line 178:     }
  Line 179:   } catch (err) {
  Line 180:     addLog(t('log.loadException', { error: err.message }))
  Line 181:   }
  Line 182: }
  Line 184: const loadGraph = async (graphId) => {
  Line 185:   graphLoading.value = true
  Line 187:   try {
  Line 188:     const res = await getGraphData(graphId)
  Line 189:     if (res.success) {
  Line 190:       graphData.value = res.data
  Line 191:       addLog(t('log.graphDataLoadSuccess'))
  Line 192:     }
  Line 193:   } catch (err) {
  Line 194:     addLog(t('log.graphLoadFailed', { error: err.message }))
  Line 195:   } finally {
  Line 196:     graphLoading.value = false
  Line 197:   }
  Line 198: }
  Line 200: const refreshGraph = () => {
  Line 201:   if (projectData.value?.graph_id) {
  Line 202:     loadGraph(projectData.value.graph_id)
  Line 203:   }
  Line 204: }
  Line 206: // Watch route params
  Line 207: watch(() => route.params.reportId, (newId) => {
  Line 208:   if (newId && newId !== currentReportId.value) {
  Line 209:     currentReportId.value = newId
  Line 210:     loadReportData()
  Line 211:   }
  Line 212: }, { immediate: true })
  Line 214: onMounted(() => {
  Line 215:   addLog(t('log.reportViewInit'))
  Line 216:   loadReportData()
  Line 217: })
  Line 218: </script>
  Line 220: <style scoped>
  Line 221: .main-view {
  Line 222:   height: 100vh;
  Line 223:   display: flex;
  Line 224:   flex-direction: column;

  Line 97: const minutesPerRound = ref(30) // 默认每轮30分钟

  Line 99: const graphData = ref(null)

  Line 104: // --- Computed Layout Styles ---

  Line 113:   if (viewMode.value === 'graph') return { width: '0%', opacity: 0, transform: 'translateX(20px)' }
  Line 114:   return { width: '50%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 115: })

  Line 118: const statusClass = computed(() => {
  Line 119:   return currentStatus.value
  Line 120: })
  Line 122: const statusText = computed(() => {
  Line 123:   if (currentStatus.value === 'error') return 'Error'
  Line 124:   if (currentStatus.value === 'completed') return 'Completed'
  Line 125:   return 'Running'
  Line 126: })
  Line 128: const isSimulating = computed(() => currentStatus.value === 'processing')
  Line 130: // --- Helpers ---
  Line 131: const addLog = (msg) => {
  Line 132:   const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour12: false, hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' }) + '.' + new Date().getMilliseconds().toString().padStart(3, '0')
  Line 133:   systemLogs.value.push({ time, msg })
  Line 134:   if (systemLogs.value.length > 200) {
  Line 135:     systemLogs.value.shift()
  Line 136:   }
  Line 137: }
  Line 139: const updateStatus = (status) => {
  Line 140:   currentStatus.value = status
  Line 141: }
  Line 143: // --- Layout Methods ---
  Line 144: const toggleMaximize = (target) => {
  Line 145:   if (viewMode.value === target) {
  Line 146:     viewMode.value = 'split'
  Line 147:   } else {
  Line 148:     viewMode.value = target
  Line 149:   }
  Line 150: }
  Line 152: const handleGoBack = async () => {
  Line 153:   // 在返回 Step 2 之前，先关闭正在运行的模拟
  Line 154:   addLog(t('log.preparingGoBack'))
  Line 156:   // 停止轮询
  Line 157:   stopGraphRefresh()
  Line 159:   try {
  Line 160:     // 先尝试优雅关闭模拟环境
  Line 161:     const envStatusRes = await getEnvStatus({ simulation_id: currentSimulationId.value })
  Line 163:     if (envStatusRes.success && envStatusRes.data?.env_alive) {
  Line 164:       addLog(t('log.closingSimEnv'))
  Line 165:       try {
  Line 166:         await closeSimulationEnv({
  Line 167:           simulation_id: currentSimulationId.value,
  Line 168:           timeout: 10
  Line 169:         })
  Line 170:         addLog(t('log.simEnvClosed'))
  Line 171:       } catch (closeErr) {
  Line 172:         addLog(t('log.closeSimEnvFailed'))
  Line 173:         try {
  Line 174:           await stopSimulation({ simulation_id: currentSimulationId.value })
  Line 175:           addLog(t('log.simForceStopSuccess'))
  Line 176:         } catch (stopErr) {
  Line 177:           addLog(t('log.forceStopFailed', { error: stopErr.message }))
  Line 178:         }
  Line 179:       }
  Line 180:     } else {
  Line 181:       // 环境未运行，检查是否需要停止进程
  Line 182:       if (isSimulating.value) {
  Line 183:         addLog(t('log.stoppingSimProcess'))
  Line 184:         try {
  Line 185:           await stopSimulation({ simulation_id: currentSimulationId.value })
  Line 186:           addLog(t('log.simStopped'))
  Line 187:         } catch (err) {
  Line 188:           addLog(t('log.stopSimFailed', { error: err.message }))
  Line 189:         }
  Line 190:       }
  Line 191:     }
  Line 192:   } catch (err) {
  Line 193:     addLog(t('log.checkStatusFailed', { error: err.message }))
  Line 194:   }
  Line 196:   // 返回到 Step 2 (环境搭建)
  Line 197:   router.push({ name: 'Simulation', params: { simulationId: currentSimulationId.value } })
  Line 198: }
  Line 200: const handleNextStep = () => {
  Line 201:   // Step3Simulation 组件会直接处理报告生成和路由跳转
  Line 202:   // 这个方法仅作为备用
  Line 203:   addLog(t('log.enterStep4'))
  Line 204: }
  Line 206: // --- Data Logic ---
  Line 207: const loadSimulationData = async () => {
  Line 208:   try {
  Line 209:     addLog(t('log.loadingSimData', { id: currentSimulationId.value }))
  Line 211:     // 获取 simulation 信息
  Line 212:     const simRes = await getSimulation(currentSimulationId.value)
  Line 213:     if (simRes.success && simRes.data) {
  Line 214:       const simData = simRes.data
  Line 216:       // 获取 simulation config 以获取 minutes_per_round
  Line 217:       try {
  Line 218:         const configRes = await getSimulationConfig(currentSimulationId.value)
  Line 219:         if (configRes.success && configRes.data?.time_config?.minutes_per_round) {
  Line 220:           minutesPerRound.value = configRes.data.time_config.minutes_per_round
  Line 221:           addLog(t('log.timeConfig', { minutes: minutesPerRound.value }))
  Line 222:         }
  Line 223:       } catch (configErr) {
  Line 224:         addLog(t('log.timeConfigFetchFailed', { minutes: minutesPerRound.value }))
  Line 225:       }
  Line 227:       // 获取 project 信息
  Line 228:       if (simData.project_id) {
  Line 229:         const projRes = await getProject(simData.project_id)
  Line 230:         if (projRes.success && projRes.data) {
  Line 231:           projectData.value = projRes.data
  Line 232:           addLog(t('log.projectLoadSuccess', { id: projRes.data.project_id }))
  Line 234:           // 获取 graph 数据
  Line 235:           if (projRes.data.graph_id) {
  Line 236:             await loadGraph(projRes.data.graph_id)
  Line 237:           }
  Line 238:         }
  Line 239:       }
  Line 240:     } else {
  Line 241:       addLog(t('log.loadSimDataFailed', { error: simRes.error || t('common.unknownError') }))
  Line 242:     }
  Line 243:   } catch (err) {
  Line 244:     addLog(t('log.loadException', { error: err.message }))
  Line 245:   }
  Line 246: }
  Line 248: const loadGraph = async (graphId) => {
  Line 249:   // 当正在模拟时，自动刷新不显示全屏 loading，以免闪烁
  Line 250:   // 手动刷新或初始加载时显示 loading
  Line 251:   if (!isSimulating.value) {
  Line 252:     graphLoading.value = true
  Line 253:   }
  Line 255:   try {
  Line 256:     const res = await getGraphData(graphId)
  Line 257:     if (res.success) {
  Line 258:       graphData.value = res.data
  Line 259:       if (!isSimulating.value) {
  Line 260:         addLog(t('log.graphDataLoadSuccess'))
  Line 261:       }
  Line 262:     }
  Line 263:   } catch (err) {
  Line 264:     addLog(t('log.graphLoadFailed', { error: err.message }))
  Line 265:   } finally {
  Line 266:     graphLoading.value = false
  Line 267:   }
  Line 268: }
  Line 270: const refreshGraph = () => {
  Line 271:   if (projectData.value?.graph_id) {
  Line 272:     loadGraph(projectData.value.graph_id)
  Line 273:   }
  Line 274: }
  Line 276: // --- Auto Refresh Logic ---
  Line 277: let graphRefreshTimer = null
  Line 279: const startGraphRefresh = () => {
  Line 280:   if (graphRefreshTimer) return
  Line 281:   addLog(t('log.graphRealtimeRefreshStart'))
  Line 282:   // 立即刷新一次，然后每30秒刷新
  Line 283:   graphRefreshTimer = setInterval(refreshGraph, 30000)
  Line 284: }
  Line 286: const stopGraphRefresh = () => {
  Line 287:   if (graphRefreshTimer) {
  Line 288:     clearInterval(graphRefreshTimer)
  Line 289:     graphRefreshTimer = null
  Line 290:     addLog(t('log.graphRealtimeRefreshStop'))
  Line 291:   }
  Line 292: }
  Line 294: watch(isSimulating, (newValue) => {
  Line 295:   if (newValue) {
  Line 296:     startGraphRefresh()
  Line 297:   } else {
  Line 298:     stopGraphRefresh()
  Line 299:   }
  Line 300: }, { immediate: true })
  Line 302: onMounted(() => {
  Line 303:   addLog(t('log.simRunViewInit'))
  Line 305:   // 记录 maxRounds 配置（值已在初始化时从 query 参数获取）
  Line 306:   if (maxRounds.value) {
  Line 307:     addLog(t('log.customRounds', { rounds: maxRounds.value }))
  Line 308:   }
  Line 310:   loadSimulationData()
  Line 311: })
  Line 313: onUnmounted(() => {
  Line 314:   stopGraphRefresh()
  Line 315: })
  Line 316: </script>
