  Line 52:       <div class="panel-wrapper right" :style="rightPanelStyle">
  Line 53:         <Step2EnvSetup
  Line 54:           :simulationId="currentSimulationId"
  Line 55:           :projectData="projectData"
  Line 56:           :graphData="graphData"
  Line 57:           :systemLogs="systemLogs"
  Line 58:           @go-back="handleGoBack"
  Line 59:           @next-step="handleNextStep"
  Line 60:           @add-log="addLog"
  Line 61:           @update-status="updateStatus"
  Line 62:         />
  Line 63:       </div>
  Line 64:     </main>
  Line 65:   </div>
  Line 66: </template>
  Line 68: <script setup>
  Line 69: import { ref, computed, onMounted, onUnmounted } from 'vue'
  Line 70: import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router'
  Line 71: import GraphPanel from '../components/GraphPanel.vue'
  Line 72: import Step2EnvSetup from '../components/Step2EnvSetup.vue'
  Line 73: import { getProject, getGraphData } from '../api/graph'
  Line 74: import { getSimulation, stopSimulation, getEnvStatus, closeSimulationEnv } from '../api/simulation'
  Line 75: import LanguageSwitcher from '../components/LanguageSwitcher.vue'
  Line 76: import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
  Line 78: const { t } = useI18n()
  Line 79: const route = useRoute()
  Line 80: const router = useRouter()
  Line 82: // Props
  Line 83: const props = defineProps({
  Line 84:   simulationId: String
  Line 85: })
  Line 87: // Layout State
  Line 88: const viewMode = ref('split')
  Line 90: // Data State
  Line 91: const currentSimulationId = ref(route.params.simulationId)
  Line 92: const projectData = ref(null)
  Line 93: const graphData = ref(null)
  Line 94: const graphLoading = ref(false)
  Line 95: const systemLogs = ref([])
  Line 96: const currentStatus = ref('processing') // processing | completed | error
  Line 98: // --- Computed Layout Styles ---
  Line 99: const leftPanelStyle = computed(() => {
  Line 100:   if (viewMode.value === 'graph') return { width: '100%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 101:   if (viewMode.value === 'workbench') return { width: '0%', opacity: 0, transform: 'translateX(-20px)' }
  Line 102:   return { width: '50%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 103: })
  Line 105: const rightPanelStyle = computed(() => {
  Line 106:   if (viewMode.value === 'workbench') return { width: '100%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 107:   if (viewMode.value === 'graph') return { width: '0%', opacity: 0, transform: 'translateX(20px)' }
  Line 108:   return { width: '50%', opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }
  Line 109: })
  Line 111: // --- Status Computed ---
  Line 112: const statusClass = computed(() => {
  Line 113:   return currentStatus.value
  Line 114: })
  Line 116: const statusText = computed(() => {
  Line 117:   if (currentStatus.value === 'error') return 'Error'
  Line 118:   if (currentStatus.value === 'completed') return 'Ready'
  Line 119:   return 'Preparing'
  Line 120: })
  Line 122: // --- Helpers ---
  Line 123: const addLog = (msg) => {
  Line 124:   const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour12: false, hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' }) + '.' + new Date().getMilliseconds().toString().padStart(3, '0')
  Line 125:   systemLogs.value.push({ time, msg })
  Line 126:   if (systemLogs.value.length > 100) {
  Line 127:     systemLogs.value.shift()
  Line 128:   }
  Line 129: }
  Line 131: const updateStatus = (status) => {
  Line 132:   currentStatus.value = status
  Line 133: }
  Line 135: // --- Layout Methods ---
  Line 136: const toggleMaximize = (target) => {
  Line 137:   if (viewMode.value === target) {
  Line 138:     viewMode.value = 'split'
  Line 139:   } else {
  Line 140:     viewMode.value = target
  Line 141:   }
  Line 142: }
  Line 144: const handleGoBack = () => {
  Line 145:   // 返回到 process 页面
  Line 146:   if (projectData.value?.project_id) {
  Line 147:     router.push({ name: 'Process', params: { projectId: projectData.value.project_id } })
  Line 148:   } else {
  Line 149:     router.push('/')
  Line 150:   }
  Line 151: }
  Line 153: const handleNextStep = (params = {}) => {
  Line 154:   addLog(t('log.enterStep3'))
  Line 156:   // 记录模拟轮数配置
  Line 157:   if (params.maxRounds) {
  Line 158:     addLog(t('log.customRoundsConfig', { rounds: params.maxRounds }))
  Line 159:   } else {
  Line 160:     addLog(t('log.useAutoRounds'))
  Line 161:   }
  Line 163:   // 构建路由参数
  Line 164:   const routeParams = {
  Line 165:     name: 'SimulationRun',
  Line 166:     params: { simulationId: currentSimulationId.value }
  Line 167:   }
  Line 169:   // 如果有自定义轮数，通过 query 参数传递
  Line 170:   if (params.maxRounds) {
  Line 171:     routeParams.query = { maxRounds: params.maxRounds }
  Line 172:   }
  Line 174:   // 跳转到 Step 3 页面
  Line 175:   router.push(routeParams)
  Line 176: }
  Line 178: // --- Data Logic ---
  Line 181:  * 检查并关闭正在运行的模拟
  Line 182:  * 当用户从 Step 3 返回到 Step 2 时，默认用户要退出模拟
  Line 184: const checkAndStopRunningSimulation = async () => {
  Line 185:   if (!currentSimulationId.value) return
  Line 187:   try {
  Line 188:     // 先检查模拟环境是否存活
  Line 189:     const envStatusRes = await getEnvStatus({ simulation_id: currentSimulationId.value })
  Line 191:     if (envStatusRes.success && envStatusRes.data?.env_alive) {
  Line 192:       addLog(t('log.detectedSimEnvRunning'))
  Line 194:       // 尝试优雅关闭模拟环境
  Line 195:       try {
  Line 196:         const closeRes = await closeSimulationEnv({
  Line 197:           simulation_id: currentSimulationId.value,
  Line 198:           timeout: 10  // 10秒超时
  Line 199:         })
  Line 201:         if (closeRes.success) {
  Line 202:           addLog(t('log.simEnvClosed'))
  Line 203:         } else {
  Line 204:           addLog(t('log.closeSimEnvFailedWithError', { error: closeRes.error || t('common.unknownError') }))
  Line 205:           // 如果优雅关闭失败，尝试强制停止
  Line 206:           await forceStopSimulation()
  Line 207:         }
  Line 208:       } catch (closeErr) {
  Line 209:         addLog(t('log.closeSimEnvException', { error: closeErr.message }))
  Line 210:         // 如果优雅关闭异常，尝试强制停止
  Line 211:         await forceStopSimulation()
  Line 212:       }
  Line 213:     } else {
  Line 214:       // 环境未运行，但可能进程还在，检查模拟状态
  Line 215:       const simRes = await getSimulation(currentSimulationId.value)
  Line 216:       if (simRes.success && simRes.data?.status === 'running') {
  Line 217:         addLog(t('log.detectedSimRunning'))
  Line 218:         await forceStopSimulation()
  Line 219:       }
  Line 220:     }
  Line 221:   } catch (err) {
  Line 222:     // 检查环境状态失败不影响后续流程
  Line 223:     console.warn('检查模拟状态失败:', err)
  Line 224:   }
  Line 225: }
  Line 228:  * 强制停止模拟
  Line 230: const forceStopSimulation = async () => {
  Line 231:   try {
  Line 232:     const stopRes = await stopSimulation({ simulation_id: currentSimulationId.value })
  Line 233:     if (stopRes.success) {
  Line 234:       addLog(t('log.simForceStopSuccess'))
  Line 235:     } else {
  Line 236:       addLog(t('log.forceStopSimFailed', { error: stopRes.error || t('common.unknownError') }))
  Line 237:     }
  Line 238:   } catch (err) {
  Line 239:     addLog(t('log.forceStopSimException', { error: err.message }))
  Line 240:   }
  Line 241: }
  Line 243: const loadSimulationData = async () => {
  Line 244:   try {
  Line 245:     addLog(t('log.loadingSimData', { id: currentSimulationId.value }))
  Line 247:     // 获取 simulation 信息
  Line 248:     const simRes = await getSimulation(currentSimulationId.value)
  Line 249:     if (simRes.success && simRes.data) {
  Line 250:       const simData = simRes.data
  Line 252:       // 获取 project 信息
  Line 253:       if (simData.project_id) {
  Line 254:         const projRes = await getProject(simData.project_id)
  Line 255:         if (projRes.success && projRes.data) {
  Line 256:           projectData.value = projRes.data
  Line 257:           addLog(t('log.projectLoadSuccess', { id: projRes.data.project_id }))
  Line 259:           // 获取 graph 数据
  Line 260:           if (projRes.data.graph_id) {
  Line 261:             await loadGraph(projRes.data.graph_id)
  Line 262:           }
  Line 263:         }
  Line 264:       }
  Line 265:     } else {
  Line 266:       addLog(t('log.loadSimDataFailed', { error: simRes.error || t('common.unknownError') }))
  Line 267:     }
  Line 268:   } catch (err) {
  Line 269:     addLog(t('log.loadException', { error: err.message }))
  Line 270:   }
  Line 271: }
  Line 273: const loadGraph = async (graphId) => {
  Line 274:   graphLoading.value = true
  Line 275:   try {
  Line 276:     const res = await getGraphData(graphId)
  Line 277:     if (res.success) {
  Line 278:       graphData.value = res.data
  Line 279:       addLog(t('log.graphDataLoadSuccess'))
  Line 280:     }
  Line 281:   } catch (err) {
  Line 282:     addLog(t('log.graphLoadFailed', { error: err.message }))
  Line 283:   } finally {
  Line 284:     graphLoading.value = false
  Line 285:   }
  Line 286: }
  Line 288: const refreshGraph = () => {
  Line 289:   if (projectData.value?.graph_id) {
  Line 290:     loadGraph(projectData.value.graph_id)
  Line 291:   }
  Line 292: }
  Line 294: onMounted(async () => {
  Line 295:   addLog(t('log.simViewInit'))
  Line 297:   // 检查并关闭正在运行的模拟（用户从 Step 3 返回时）
  Line 298:   await checkAndStopRunningSimulation()
  Line 300:   // 加载模拟数据
  Line 301:   loadSimulationData()
  Line 302: })
  Line 303: </script>

  Line 183:             <div class="state-chip">
  Line 184:               <strong>Phase</strong>
  Line 185:               <span>{{ simulation.possession_phase || 'inbound' }}</span>
  Line 186:             </div>

  Line 190:             </div>

  Line 194:             </div>

  Line 207:           </div>

  Line 209:             <div class="progress-track">
  Line 210:               <div class="progress-fill dark" :style="{ width: `${simulationProgress}%` }"></div>
  Line 211:             </div>
  Line 212:             <span>{{ simulationProgress }}%</span>
  Line 213:           </div>
  Line 214:           <div class="event-list">
  Line 215:             <article v-for="event in events.slice().reverse()" :key="`${event.step}-${event.title}`" class="event-card">
  Line 216:               <div class="event-topline">
  Line 217:                 <strong>{{ event.segment }}</strong>
  Line 218:                 <span>{{ event.clock }}</span>
  Line 219:               </div>

  Line 223:                 <span v-if="event.zone">{{ event.zone }}</span>
  Line 224:               </div>
  Line 225:               <h4>{{ event.title }}</h4>
  Line 226:               <p>{{ event.play_by_play }}</p>
  Line 227:               <small>{{ event.primary_actor }} · {{ event.coach }}</small>
  Line 228:               <small v-if="event.outcome">{{ event.outcome }}</small>
  Line 229:             </article>
  Line 230:           </div>
  Line 231:           <div class="button-row">
  Line 232:             <button class="ghost-btn" @click="currentStep = 2">Back</button>
  Line 233:             <button class="primary-btn" @click="currentStep = 4" :disabled="!simulationCompleted">Continue To Report</button>
  Line 234:           </div>
  Line 235:         </section>
  Line 237:         <section v-else-if="currentStep === 4" class="panel">
  Line 238:           <div class="panel-head">
  Line 239:             <h2>Step 4 · Report</h2>
  Line 240:             <button class="primary-btn" @click="launchReport" :disabled="reportRunning || !simulationCompleted">
  Line 241:               {{ reportRunning ? 'Generating Report...' : reportContent ? 'Regenerate Report' : 'Generate Report' }}
  Line 242:             </button>
  Line 243:           </div>
  Line 244:           <p class="status-text">{{ reportMessage }}</p>
  Line 245:           <pre v-if="reportContent" class="report-box">{{ reportContent }}</pre>
  Line 246:           <div class="button-row">
  Line 247:             <button class="ghost-btn" @click="currentStep = 3">Back</button>
  Line 248:             <button class="primary-btn" @click="currentStep = 5" :disabled="!reportContent">Continue To Chat</button>
  Line 249:           </div>
  Line 250:         </section>
  Line 252:         <section v-else class="panel">
  Line 253:           <div class="panel-head">
  Line 254:             <h2>Step 5 · Persona Chat</h2>
  Line 255:           </div>
  Line 256:           <div class="chat-controls">
  Line 257:             <label class="field">
  Line 258:               <span>Persona</span>
  Line 259:               <select v-model="selectedPersona">
  Line 260:                 <option value="Match Analyst">Match Analyst</option>
  Line 261:                 <option v-for="persona in personas" :key="persona" :value="persona">{{ persona }}</option>
  Line 262:               </select>
  Line 263:             </label>
  Line 264:           </div>
  Line 265:           <div class="chat-log">
  Line 266:             <div v-for="(entry, index) in chatLog" :key="index" class="chat-entry" :class="entry.role">
  Line 267:               <strong>{{ entry.role === 'assistant' ? selectedPersona : 'You' }}</strong>
  Line 268:               <p>{{ entry.content }}</p>
  Line 269:             </div>
  Line 270:           </div>
  Line 271:           <div class="chat-compose">
  Line 272:             <textarea v-model="chatMessage" rows="3" placeholder="Ask the coach, player, or analyst about the simulation." />
  Line 273:             <button class="primary-btn" @click="sendChat" :disabled="chatSending || !chatMessage.trim()">
  Line 274:               {{ chatSending ? 'Sending...' : 'Send' }}
  Line 275:             </button>
  Line 276:           </div>
  Line 277:         </section>
  Line 278:       </section>
  Line 279:     </main>
  Line 280:   </div>
  Line 281: </template>
  Line 283: <script setup>
  Line 284: import { computed, onMounted, onUnmounted, ref } from 'vue'
  Line 285: import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router'
  Line 286: import {
  Line 287:   chatWithSportsPersona,
  Line 288:   generateSportsReport,
  Line 289:   getSportsEvents,
  Line 290:   getSportsPlanStatus,
  Line 291:   getSportsReport,
  Line 292:   getSportsReportStatus,
  Line 293:   getSportsSimulationStatus,
  Line 294:   getSportsWorkspace,
  Line 295:   saveSportsScenario,
  Line 296:   startSportsSimulation
  Line 297: } from '../api/sports'
  Line 299: const route = useRoute()
  Line 300: const router = useRouter()
  Line 302: const createScenarioDefaults = () => ({
  Line 303:   venue: 'home',
  Line 304:   weather: 'standard',
  Line 305:   pace: 'balanced',
  Line 306:   randomness: 0.35,
  Line 307:   fatigue: 'balanced',
  Line 308:   officiating: 'standard',
  Line 309:   injuries: '',
  Line 310:   notes: '',
  Line 311:   seed: Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000) + 1
  Line 312: })
  Line 314: const steps = [
  Line 315:   { id: 1, label: 'Planner' },
  Line 316:   { id: 2, label: 'Scenario' },
  Line 317:   { id: 3, label: 'Simulation' },
  Line 318:   { id: 4, label: 'Report' },
  Line 319:   { id: 5, label: 'Chat' }
  Line 320: ]
  Line 322: const workspace = ref(null)
  Line 323: const currentStep = ref(1)
  Line 324: const plannerMessage = ref('Waiting for planner...')
  Line 325: const planProgress = ref(0)
  Line 326: const simulation = ref(null)
  Line 327: const events = ref([])
  Line 328: const reportContent = ref('')
  Line 329: const reportMessage = ref('Generate a postgame report once the simulation completes.')
  Line 330: const reportTaskId = ref(route.query.reportTask || '')
  Line 331: const scenario = ref(createScenarioDefaults())
  Line 332: const savingScenario = ref(false)
  Line 333: const chatLog = ref([])
  Line 334: const chatMessage = ref('')
  Line 335: const chatSending = ref(false)
  Line 336: const selectedPersona = ref('Match Analyst')
  Line 337: const uiError = ref('')
  Line 339: let plannerTimer = null
  Line 340: let simulationTimer = null
  Line 341: let reportTimer = null
  Line 343: const title = computed(() => {
  Line 344:   if (!workspace.value) return 'Loading workspace'
  Line 345:   return `${workspace.value.home_team_query} vs ${workspace.value.away_team_query}`
  Line 346: })
  Line 348: const planStatusLabel = computed(() => workspace.value?.status || 'planning')
  Line 349: const workspaceReady = computed(() => ['ready', 'simulated', 'report_ready'].includes(workspace.value?.status))
  Line 350: const simulationRunning = computed(() => simulation.value?.status === 'running')
  Line 351: const simulationCompleted = computed(() => simulation.value?.status === 'completed')
  Line 352: const activeError = computed(() => uiError.value || simulation.value?.error || workspace.value?.error || '')
  Line 353: const simulationProgress = computed(() => {
  Line 354:   if (!simulation.value?.target_steps) return 0
  Line 355:   return Math.round((simulation.value.current_step / simulation.value.target_steps) * 100)
  Line 356: })
  Line 357: const personas = computed(() => {
  Line 358:   if (!workspace.value?.participants) return []
  Line 359:   return workspace.value.participants.map(item => item.name).slice(0, 24)
  Line 360: })
  Line 361: const participantPreview = computed(() => {
  Line 362:   if (!workspace.value?.participants) return []
  Line 363:   return workspace.value.participants.slice(0, 8).map(item => ({
  Line 364:     name: item.name,
  Line 365:     kind: item.kind,
  Line 366:     style: item.profile?.archetype || item.profile?.pace_preference || item.role || 'profile pending'
  Line 367:   }))
  Line 368: })
  Line 369: const reportRunning = computed(() => Boolean(reportTaskId.value))
  Line 371: const clearTimers = () => {
  Line 372:   if (plannerTimer) window.clearInterval(plannerTimer)
  Line 373:   if (simulationTimer) window.clearInterval(simulationTimer)
  Line 374:   if (reportTimer) window.clearInterval(reportTimer)
  Line 375:   plannerTimer = null
  Line 376:   simulationTimer = null
  Line 377:   reportTimer = null
  Line 378: }
  Line 380: const loadWorkspace = async () => {
  Line 381:   try {
  Line 382:     const res = await getSportsWorkspace(route.params.workspaceId)
  Line 383:     workspace.value = res.data
  Line 384:     scenario.value = { ...createScenarioDefaults(), ...(workspace.value?.scenario || {}) }
  Line 385:     if (workspace.value?.latest_report_task_id && !workspace.value?.latest_report_id) {
  Line 386:       reportTaskId.value = workspace.value.latest_report_task_id
  Line 387:     }
  Line 388:     if (workspace.value?.latest_report_id) {
  Line 389:       reportTaskId.value = ''
  Line 390:     }
  Line 391:     if (workspace.value?.status === 'planning') {
  Line 392:       startPlannerPolling()
  Line 393:     }
  Line 394:     if (workspace.value?.latest_simulation_id) {
  Line 395:       await loadSimulationStatus()
  Line 396:     }
  Line 397:     if (workspace.value?.latest_report_id) {
  Line 398:       await loadReport()
  Line 399:     }
  Line 400:   } catch (err) {
  Line 401:     uiError.value = err.message || 'Unable to load workspace.'
  Line 402:   }
  Line 403: }
  Line 405: const startPlannerPolling = () => {
  Line 406:   if (plannerTimer) return
  Line 407:   plannerTimer = window.setInterval(async () => {
  Line 408:     try {
  Line 409:       const taskId = route.query.task || workspace.value?.planning_task_id
  Line 410:       const res = await getSportsPlanStatus(taskId ? { task_id: taskId } : { workspace_id: route.params.workspaceId })
  Line 411:       const data = res.data || {}
  Line 412:       plannerMessage.value = data.message || data.error || 'Planner running...'
  Line 413:       planProgress.value = data.progress || (workspace.value?.status === 'ready' ? 100 : planProgress.value)
  Line 414:       await loadWorkspace()
  Line 415:       if (workspace.value?.status !== 'planning') {
  Line 416:         window.clearInterval(plannerTimer)
  Line 417:         plannerTimer = null
  Line 418:         if (workspace.value?.status === 'ready') {
  Line 419:           planProgress.value = 100
  Line 420:         }
  Line 421:       }
  Line 422:     } catch (err) {
  Line 423:       plannerMessage.value = err.message || 'Planner polling failed.'
  Line 424:       uiError.value = plannerMessage.value
  Line 425:     }
  Line 426:   }, 1500)
  Line 427: }
  Line 429: const loadSimulationStatus = async () => {
  Line 430:   if (!workspace.value?.latest_simulation_id) return
  Line 431:   const res = await getSportsSimulationStatus({
  Line 432:     workspace_id: route.params.workspaceId,
  Line 433:     simulation_id: workspace.value.latest_simulation_id
  Line 434:   })
  Line 435:   simulation.value = res.data
  Line 436:   const eventRes = await getSportsEvents({
  Line 437:     workspace_id: route.params.workspaceId,
  Line 438:     simulation_id: workspace.value.latest_simulation_id
  Line 439:   })
  Line 440:   events.value = eventRes.data || []
  Line 441: }
  Line 443: const startSimulationPolling = () => {
  Line 444:   if (simulationTimer) return
  Line 445:   simulationTimer = window.setInterval(async () => {
  Line 446:     try {
  Line 447:       await loadSimulationStatus()
  Line 448:       await loadWorkspace()
  Line 449:       if (simulation.value?.status !== 'running') {
  Line 450:         window.clearInterval(simulationTimer)
  Line 451:         simulationTimer = null
  Line 452:       }
  Line 453:     } catch (err) {
  Line 454:       window.clearInterval(simulationTimer)
  Line 455:       simulationTimer = null
  Line 456:       uiError.value = err.message || 'Simulation polling failed.'
  Line 457:     }
  Line 458:   }, 1600)
  Line 459: }
  Line 461: const saveScenarioAndAdvance = async () => {
  Line 462:   uiError.value = ''
  Line 463:   savingScenario.value = true
  Line 464:   try {
  Line 465:     const res = await saveSportsScenario({
  Line 466:       workspace_id: route.params.workspaceId,
  Line 467:       scenario: scenario.value
  Line 468:     })
  Line 469:     workspace.value = res.data
  Line 470:     currentStep.value = 3
  Line 471:   } catch (err) {
  Line 472:     uiError.value = err.message || 'Unable to save scenario.'
  Line 473:   } finally {
  Line 474:     savingScenario.value = false
  Line 475:   }
  Line 476: }
  Line 478: const startSimulationFlow = async () => {
  Line 479:   uiError.value = ''
  Line 480:   try {
  Line 481:     const res = await startSportsSimulation({ workspace_id: route.params.workspaceId })
  Line 482:     simulation.value = res.data
  Line 483:     await loadWorkspace()
  Line 484:     startSimulationPolling()
  Line 485:   } catch (err) {
  Line 486:     uiError.value = err.message || 'Unable to start simulation.'
  Line 487:   }
  Line 488: }
  Line 490: const launchReport = async () => {
  Line 491:   uiError.value = ''
  Line 492:   reportMessage.value = 'Submitting report generation task...'
  Line 493:   try {
  Line 494:     const res = await generateSportsReport({ workspace_id: route.params.workspaceId })
  Line 495:     reportTaskId.value = res.data.task_id
  Line 496:     startReportPolling()
  Line 497:   } catch (err) {
  Line 498:     reportMessage.value = err.message || 'Unable to start report generation.'
  Line 499:     uiError.value = reportMessage.value
  Line 500:   }
  Line 501: }
  Line 503: const startReportPolling = () => {
  Line 504:   if (reportTimer || !reportTaskId.value) return
  Line 505:   reportTimer = window.setInterval(async () => {
  Line 506:     try {
  Line 507:       const res = await getSportsReportStatus({ task_id: reportTaskId.value })
  Line 508:       const data = res.data || {}
  Line 509:       reportMessage.value = data.message || 'Generating report...'
  Line 510:       if (data.status === 'completed') {
  Line 511:         window.clearInterval(reportTimer)
  Line 512:         reportTimer = null
  Line 513:         reportTaskId.value = ''
  Line 514:         await loadWorkspace()
  Line 515:         await loadReport()
  Line 516:       }
  Line 517:       if (data.status === 'failed') {
  Line 518:         window.clearInterval(reportTimer)
  Line 519:         reportTimer = null
  Line 520:         reportTaskId.value = ''
  Line 521:         reportMessage.value = data.error || 'Report generation failed.'
  Line 522:       }
  Line 523:     } catch (err) {
  Line 524:       window.clearInterval(reportTimer)
  Line 525:       reportTimer = null
  Line 526:       reportTaskId.value = ''
  Line 527:       reportMessage.value = err.message || 'Report polling failed.'
  Line 528:       uiError.value = reportMessage.value
  Line 529:     }
  Line 530:   }, 1500)
  Line 531: }
  Line 533: const loadReport = async () => {
  Line 534:   if (!workspace.value?.latest_report_id) return
  Line 535:   const res = await getSportsReport({
  Line 536:     workspace_id: route.params.workspaceId,
  Line 537:     report_id: workspace.value.latest_report_id
  Line 538:   })
  Line 539:   reportContent.value = res.data.content
  Line 540:   reportMessage.value = 'Report ready.'
  Line 541: }
  Line 543: const sendChat = async () => {
  Line 544:   if (!chatMessage.value.trim()) return
  Line 545:   uiError.value = ''
  Line 546:   const message = chatMessage.value.trim()
  Line 547:   chatLog.value.push({ role: 'user', content: message })
  Line 548:   chatMessage.value = ''
  Line 549:   chatSending.value = true
  Line 550:   try {
  Line 551:     const res = await chatWithSportsPersona({
  Line 552:       workspace_id: route.params.workspaceId,
  Line 553:       persona: selectedPersona.value,
  Line 554:       message,
  Line 555:       chat_history: chatLog.value
  Line 556:     })
  Line 557:     chatLog.value.push({ role: 'assistant', content: res.data.reply })
  Line 558:   } catch (err) {
  Line 559:     uiError.value = err.message || 'Unable to send chat message.'
  Line 560:     chatLog.value.push({ role: 'assistant', content: uiError.value })
  Line 561:   } finally {
  Line 562:     chatSending.value = false
  Line 563:   }
  Line 564: }
  Line 566: const resetScenario = () => {
  Line 567:   scenario.value = createScenarioDefaults()
  Line 568: }
  Line 570: const selectStep = (stepId) => {
  Line 571:   if (stepId === 2 && !workspaceReady.value) return
  Line 572:   if (stepId === 3 && !workspaceReady.value) return
  Line 573:   if (stepId === 4 && !simulationCompleted.value) return
  Line 574:   if (stepId === 5 && !reportContent.value) return
  Line 575:   currentStep.value = stepId
  Line 576: }
  Line 578: onMounted(async () => {
  Line 579:   await loadWorkspace()
  Line 580:   if (workspace.value?.status === 'planning') {
  Line 581:     startPlannerPolling()
  Line 582:   }
  Line 583:   if (simulation.value?.status === 'running') {
  Line 584:     startSimulationPolling()
  Line 585:   }
  Line 586:   if (reportTaskId.value) {
  Line 587:     startReportPolling()
  Line 588:   }
  Line 589: })
  Line 591: onUnmounted(clearTimers)
  Line 592: </script>
